name: James Tarantin
subject: Our Embassy in Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d6d2bb6504fe45fe9dbb4d990e1a41aa&_e=YUr023PHfBKjZG1Fc35ZDZ6VmUOUmr0LeTkFqN_PiPE3Do9H72-GnUojSWhFzfjsldMo97fvekwG5JFnbSMnBzm8zcrlSZye83XyjG8P38f4Iuxv6Uu6R5KU2pYCuTe3l5PjFNNEVbPksR5n5EyN-EuSanSa2qZh-uq5NH9lPA1XRKvIw4Mdxz_68C9s827w9Y3JcNk3Rp_Uih_AUIpHzY8YMT6VNF-NKC6t0kOwRSnYkLZlylA1W4bVnuNZdIC7yNXKwJS3cb9O-ecRc2-ym6RDAYaI9tfv0KOkd7Lx1dw57X0mOMcjv7-lFxWPLFRp6HhdvW-gWsQyc1X62qYezX5CWrM7O5CfbJ5SUc9G-aDcwZtD_G1ZJNrVjTJ6JYHvbfmS99XZqrtypA-Od3WYF5uJTFq3uzmdtKmP6roY2ZPTDU-8uICrWbLNWssgA-5aomgIBRK9JhIUeAPl-K27ICMKf_EW5Kvq-sUyqbdRXI7CZWxRCz0U7LvHXlJg9mBM)

Hey Fellow American,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d6d2bb6504fe45fe9dbb4d990e1a41aa&_e=YUr023PHfBKjZG1Fc35ZDZ6VmUOUmr0LeTkFqN_PiPE3Do9H72-GnUojSWhFzfjsldMo97fvekwG5JFnbSMnBzm8zcrlSZye83XyjG8P38f4Iuxv6Uu6R5KU2pYCuTe3l5PjFNNEVbPksR5n5EyN-EuSanSa2qZh-uq5NH9lPA1XRKvIw4Mdxz_68C9s827w9Y3JcNk3Rp_Uih_AUIpHzY8YMT6VNF-NKC6t0kOwRSnYkLZlylA1W4bVnuNZdIC7yNXKwJS3cb9O-ecRc2-ym6RDAYaI9tfv0KOkd7Lx1dyHkEfKGax-28re4Y25BSet3totIeTCKZS1jqgS8l2o1yvwNNZkB2YU407j7CryCe-qQ-qx8dzDFkwz42OKrW1W20q0Ge2CHWwqmer5ytrtK106a8llrUM4dcp16j4fC5puvJGypBdhsTN5Pmi6NWqsIVijiMzqmYF859c9Y4gbk99Ff36UHKxHNYu7gWa9Mh4y2ZbdaaSIp9KDB0hqm0zI)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. [**Don’t you agree Fellow American?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d6d2bb6504fe45fe9dbb4d990e1a41aa&_e=YUr023PHfBKjZG1Fc35ZDZ6VmUOUmr0LeTkFqN_PiPE3Do9H72-GnUojSWhFzfjsldMo97fvekwG5JFnbSMnBzm8zcrlSZye83XyjG8P38f4Iuxv6Uu6R5KU2pYCuTe3l5PjFNNEVbPksR5n5EyN-EuSanSa2qZh-uq5NH9lPA1XRKvIw4Mdxz_68C9s827w9Y3JcNk3Rp_Uih_AUIpHzY8YMT6VNF-NKC6t0kOwRSnYkLZlylA1W4bVnuNZdIC7yNXKwJS3cb9O-ecRc2-ym6RDAYaI9tfv0KOkd7Lx1dxejvKsRC4QOIRuQ3g0FJvh0_AEUz7ynB4o7_GWXtdUaX6j6wjYdCMKXN5Il32zS-s-mbthO4R9EwsW0Rw0XC2AHGhB8jUI1pQGHDVldnar8m9EJS6yPz_iXGSTmhR_tgR3jQNaKiDKySRzTSA_OQmlL3Afk4vTla3QIT_8WcIMZ7GisiEIXdC0kWZ_uDFAM_-oI_U0j0t1DjSYV0Yl1cmg)

**I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**If you agree with me then please help me become the next Republican Senator from Maryland, and let’s finally win back to the America we know and love.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d6d2bb6504fe45fe9dbb4d990e1a41aa&_e=YUr023PHfBKjZG1Fc35ZDZ6VmUOUmr0LeTkFqN_PiPE3Do9H72-GnUojSWhFzfjsldMo97fvekwG5JFnbSMnBzm8zcrlSZye83XyjG8P38f4Iuxv6Uu6R5KU2pYCuTe3l5PjFNNEVbPksR5n5EyN-EuSanSa2qZh-uq5NH9lPA1XRKvIw4Mdxz_68C9s827w9Y3JcNk3Rp_Uih_AUIpHzY8YMT6VNF-NKC6t0kOwRSnYkLZlylA1W4bVnuNZdIC7yNXKwJS3cb9O-ecRc2-ym6RDAYaI9tfv0KOkd7Lx1dwzuG_Y-BPaAGSuOy0Mqf1j-9K4uLjSEJF9l6MzFv8z-iA6oDv6amoh_6353qhB6OM4BcqR6hCkAKigIfIzGkC1klpJa2WpITuHcTcsYVhWHc1v6Gl6OzxlN6WdWNjk2oRExi43Quvw91NZ6zELhAOc0XolV2vgDBUJ9ERLcCOtdd2Ekdzcu0vJUgr31IROGewG7hR3sejfmpjC0gaH7PgP)

Thank you,

name: Trump Alert: Critical Question
subject: Will you support America or Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We need to know. | ****

Peter,

This is important.

If Democrats keep their majority in 2022 and then the White House in 2024, they will:

**_- Pack the Supreme Court_**
**_- Continue to let millions of illegal immigrants into America_**
**_- Force CRT into our education systems_**
**_- Raise your taxes_**

A Republican Majority in the Senate would serve as a check against Biden’s radical agenda, as well as preserve all of the tremendous accomplishments made under President Trump.

_With this in mind, we want to know ..._ Will you be voting to protect our American values and way of life, or voting Democrat?

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Investigation: Yes, Virginia, Critical Race Theory is in Your Schools—and in Schools Across America
body:
As parental concern mounted over racial indoctrination in local schools during the recent Virginia gubernatorial race, a mantra emerged from the Democrat camp and the media: Critical Race Theory had “never been taught” in Virginia schools.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | December 01, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57266&L=26399&F=H&)
---
# [Judicial Watch Investigation: Yes, Virginia, Critical Race Theory is in Your Schools—and in Schools Across America](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57266&L=26399&F=H&)
As parental concern mounted over racial indoctrination in local schools during the recent Virginia gubernatorial race, a mantra emerged from the Democrat camp and the media: Critical Race Theory had “never been taught” in Virginia schools. That’s from then-Democratic candidate Terry McAuliffe, who in case anyone missed the point, added that the concerns about CRT were nothing but a “racist dog whistle.” The media agreed. Critical Race Theory is “not part of classroom teaching in Virginia,” reported the New York Times. Axios managing editor Margaret Talev said on CNN’s “Inside Politics, “let’s just say for the record in case anyone doesn’t know, they don’t teach Critical Race Theory to kids in kids’ K-12 schools. That’s not a thing anywhere in the country, including Virginia.” The claim was repeated elsewhere on CNN. It was dogma over at MSNBC.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57266&L=26399&F=H&)
|
---
| |

### [Bus Co. Pays to Settle U.S. Govt. Lawsuit Over Uniform Policy Banning Islamic Robe for Muslim Driver ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57266&L=26400&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYnVzLWNvLXBheXMtdG8tc2V0dGxlLXUtcy1nb3Z0LWxhd3N1aXQtb3Zlci11bmlmb3JtLXBvbGljeS1iYW5uaW5nLWlzbGFtaWMtcm9iZS1mb3ItbXVzbGltLWRyaXZlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch The nation’s largest bus carrier will pay tens of thousands of dollars to settle a discrimination lawsuit filed by the U.S. government for refusing to bend its uniform policy to let a Muslim driver wear a long, loose-fitting robe symbolic of Islamic piety. The flowing garment, known as an abaya, looks like a frock or cloak and is designed to cover a woman’s entire body in public. A few years ago, women in Saudi Arabia, where Sharia law mandates the Islamic robes to comply with decency laws, launched a protest against the abaya. Wade ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57266&L=26401&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc2NvdHVzLXJvZS12LXdhZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that it filed an amicus curiae brief with the Supreme Court in favor of overturning Roe v. clean_body: As parental concern mounted over racial indoctrination in local schools during the recent Virginia gubernatorial race, a mantra emerged from the Democrat camp and the media: Critical Race Theory had “never been taught” in Virginia schools. | | | Because no one is above the law! | December 01, 2021 ---|---|--- | | As parental concern mounted over racial indoctrination in local schools during the recent Virginia gubernatorial race, a mantra emerged from the Democrat camp and the media: Critical Race Theory had “never been taught” in Virginia schools. That’s from then-Democratic candidate Terry McAuliffe, who in case anyone missed the point, added that the concerns about CRT were nothing but a “racist dog whistle.” The media agreed. Critical Race Theory is “not part of classroom teaching in Virginia,” reported the New York Times. Axios managing editor Margaret Talev said on CNN’s “Inside Politics, “let’s just say for the record in case anyone doesn’t know, they don’t teach Critical Race Theory to kids in kids’ K-12 schools. That’s not a thing anywhere in the country, including Virginia.” The claim was repeated elsewhere on CNN. It was dogma over at MSNBC. | | | == Judicial Watch The nation’s largest bus carrier will pay tens of thousands of dollars to settle a discrimination lawsuit filed by the U.S. government for refusing to bend its uniform policy to let a Muslim driver wear a long, loose-fitting robe symbolic of Islamic piety. The flowing garment, known as an abaya, looks like a frock or cloak and is designed to cover a woman’s entire body in public. A few years ago, women in Saudi Arabia, where Sharia law mandates the Islamic robes to comply with decency laws, launched a protest against the abaya. == = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that it filed an amicus curiae brief with the Supreme Court in favor of overturning Roe v. Wade. The brief was filed in the Dobbs case, being argued today before the Supreme Court. The Judicial Watch brief, filed in support of the constitutionality of Mississippi’s Gestational Age Act, argues that states have the right under the Constitution to regulate abortion and protect unborn life. = Judicial Watch The politicization of our nation’s justice system is unfortunately nothing new, but the recent indictment of Steve Bannon is “an outrageous use of power” according to Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. As Fitton discusses in the Weekly Update, his indictment by the Biden DOJ is part of a larger agenda to use the events of January 6 as “a vehicle to criminalize the speech of those that oppose the Biden agenda, who question issues about the election and just generally are Trump supporters.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

body:
Where is Congress? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s7-jBaUBEZt3qdud5CTJwRHl1KpUeUDVv5KarqT-5Oi4DMSk6z38sJN9-m0jCapGcIaRSEjQtD4Jr0MTSXXi46T903dmlEYcfiMt43PXb64k1YfVpnTb3s0x5zhheQnOO-uYyUDpFxBnLejFXavDnnOuSy-K6tWwZaeZdPwAvZe5e97zW7VufY9OX7GQd0thb1RxKUBFAPktvGP3gOqxqEmOKkS0rCfckRQeWq0QJJ-U/3hi/tPHe61PxQgK0xyl-q7nsKQ/h0/WwvmXXL1R8IN-g_fwB23fmB5XW6X7pFXGrVtuQ-BwBs) Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_. The name might not mean much to you now, but this case will determine the future of our fundamental right to abortion care. With this case, the right-wing majority on the Supreme Court is threatening to overturn or gut _Roe v. Wade._ Activists in the reproductive rights and justice movement have warned us of this moment for decades, but Congress has never taken our rights seriously--especially not our own Congressman Danny Davis. Now, as we are on the verge of losing all or most of our constitutional right to abortion, he is once again silent. Missing in action when the people of IL-7 need him on the steps of the Supreme Court demanding our rights be protected. **I have always been a reproductive justice champion because that’s what our community deserves.** I was proud to pass and create the Illinois Council on Women and Girls to protect our fundamental rights. I’m proud to serve on the Board of the Women’s March IL. **Because for Black women who are already disproportionately facing healthcare crisises--including a maternal mortality crisis--banning abortion threatens our lives.** **[Can you donate $15 to help send a real reproductive justice champion to Congress?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfmO1rZWHxCPB-vH10s38TJCC_4gAl32sYMfrC1tQvQK6j-uaYTGhGUUdChUcbuVntiKRxDOkxR9zYiFNYoehNa-DgwCyNimZgPtv2TGgXBX4fIiNEfA9oIo5bkve8omqsqC9vM7D14QQFgvQDALhJKL8kMYdnQYAwXMy-Qj2UuYKwmAXZAggIJoKAVxHsNCpgexMCyLRo44Om34D5tmS3jl57doVQ26Ufl_eUMCNsLlh03y_S2xZMusY8GfnKrf9ykMjgDyguO3aBfpETX0iNew/3hi/tPHe61PxQgK0xyl-q7nsKQ/h1/dovaBzISf0xPZy4Zk1lwlETPBl2j8FSz3LguiiVyM1Y)** [Contribute](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfmO1rZWHxCPB-vH10s38TJJHeOf3pK9n10K0WNFMpI1YZdhqe3vc7sNBghoik1G7KBL-jiBBUgcuKsRfj9A7B-YhtObT5se_OKMX6Ydwca77ICYYUUE5ZcSkbOwTJGcZwLM_CkPVvDUqrDbvyKbfpz0Z3UqZOVfxPyxhfky9WUVQannA4Aj3FADW3eOvNTFga_R0Mz8wGT-mmBZb4X11ijAejDcSXoz059ODyNJj2zuxJN_-Zb-xpMoA0PjrwJHVH1WrG8Iwr5UeiCSP3RqflDg/3hi/tPHe61PxQgK0xyl-q7nsKQ/h2/fsGNOUQWiK0mi7JsUMssIU2TcivJPa_kVOLcUbCt4Cw) We can’t let the right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court take away our reproductive rights. It’s time for Congress to take action. The Senate must pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and defend our fundamental reproductive rights. Anything less is insufficient. **In the meantime, please also consider giving to the**[**Chicago Abortion Fund**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGk_hudGm-xX0Xa5-cdJYZZSIPywakoOBtvy4KIgjUK2ZS91Af9rXaIIPjHyDcjqyG1JPv9tR3folgqRKGBeLRRWZr4E9H6N53H626_R9V97xHsaLOYPPvUColzpmAjBf1qOBR91TIGrb7nQ8RJIfSU1JWLNru7jmHtgYLWxcEortr9ta3b8T6XqY8DwYqD89pM-r-TOkaQga3lJzBbw0pioYRzphm-VGtCZGZgXdz7C6eFsyIbrWq9o2Dku8OzsdQ/3hi/tPHe61PxQgK0xyl-q7nsKQ/h3/FGQwu4tGAp9zPJ92yrDdKH_TlRveqtneLqOXw-Skvwk)**, who helps connect people with the care they need.** Thank you, Kina Collins

clean_body: Where is Congress? | | | Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization. The name might not mean much to you now, but this case will determine the future of our fundamental right to abortion care. With this case, the right-wing majority on the Supreme Court is threatening to overturn or gut Roe v. Wade. Activists in the reproductive rights and justice movement have warned us of this moment for decades, but Congress has never taken our rights seriously--especially not our own Congressman Danny Davis. Now, as we are on the verge of losing all or most of our constitutional right to abortion, he is once again silent. Missing in action when the people of IL-7 need him on the steps of the Supreme Court demanding our rights be protected. I have always been a reproductive justice champion because that’s what our community deserves. I was proud to pass and create the Illinois Council on Women and Girls to protect our fundamental rights. I’m proud to serve on the Board of the Women’s March IL. Because for Black women who are already disproportionately facing healthcare crisises--including a maternal mortality crisis--banning abortion threatens our lives. We can’t let the right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court take away our reproductive rights. It’s time for Congress to take action. The Senate must pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and defend our fundamental reproductive rights. Anything less is insufficient. In the meantime, please also consider giving to the, who helps connect people with the care they need. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Perhaps the most irresponsible bill in the history of our nation passed the House last week. If it actually becomes law, hold onto your wallets. Wasteful spending will skyrocket. Taxes will spike. body:
to cure our country's ills

---
Peter,

_**I 'm running for the U.S. Senate because America is sick, and we need a doctor to cure our country.**_

I'm Dr. Oz -- I'm a world-class surgeon, fighter, and health care advocate. I've spent the last 30 years in medicine taking on powerful special interests and telling people like it is - **that you have the power to change your life for the better.** Now, I'm running for the U.S. Senate to take on the out-of-touch Washington establishment and to fight for policies that empower the American people to change our country for the better.

**WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO HERE!**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58916465:6W-kdjExN:m:1:3253819041:027546D39D7EA735A7184B138A5F0023:r)
I know the truth, the data, and the science about combatting COVID and understand how it affects you and your family. While Washington elites tell you to stay inside and mask up, I've been putting my expertise to work on our behalf. I won't stand by on the sidelines while out-of-touch politicians force our businesses to shut down and keep our children out of schools.

**The federal government exists to protect you - not control you.** Whether it's modernizing health care so it's more affordable and accessible, fighting for more school choice for all Americans, protecting us by securing our borders and stopping illegal immigration, telling the truth about corporate America like how pharmaceutical companies charge too much for prescription drugs, or making sure people know the truth about COVID, I'm promising to help re-light the "divine spark" inside every American and empower us to live better lives.

**Join my campaign today!**

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8117%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ECgKHxk%2beS7VdLvB5Qb5zQ&sysid=1)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vBGaJRVNn1VrtxDeuR2oUg&sysid=1) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DjBaFrmxWDngoJgxO%2blP1g&sysid=1)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19769%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pSpqFzdFYFRKtqQCbLcz8A&sysid=1) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19760%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d3gaiHt0roGhpDA2uJYUVQ&sysid=1) [**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19761%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cYxwLKwdXH%2fABUVcfZ41Ug&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19762%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z6GJrTVPEHYVEJ%2bmZw1r4A&sysid=1) | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19763%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lQkYyiR1Pb5KCU9V99CD9w&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19764%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L8%2bbt0K2OHyhdn7wi0wCGQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19775%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZFdQBjk4rKVOYwHzhFUyew&sysid=1)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19776%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7wFtgiO4lDWjHIxeMHxn5w&sysid=1)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19777%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1OiJYmPQFD%2b77J13vPgobg&sysid=1) **
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8117%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ECgKHxk%2beS7VdLvB5Qb5zQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8117%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ECgKHxk%2beS7VdLvB5Qb5zQ&sysid=1)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Top 5 media lies of 2021
body:
The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception... Their true objective is NOT to report the news but push
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpk124c55o8u3ff3kja5ft94s2cmbkone3oqani8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm4o73c9h2bs)
Friend,

The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception... Their true objective is NOT to report the news but push their radical agenda.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

Thanks to MRC, roughly 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore.

You and I are winning the war against Fake News media outlets such as MSNBC, NBC, CNN, and more. You can support MRC's mission to expose the Leftwing media by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or any by clicking here.

Radical leftists in the media are attempting to take over our elections, pass budgets that will bankrupt our nation, chip away at the Second Amendment, and destroy our culture.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm5d0d7counq9e199idcfhn6ut9fcmgnnbuvbvug_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm4o70sph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2obmmeoe2t33c9oe2ohgc5ge7chhekq7applmqqrapj1clhmfd36e9g74d3icurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eao6ctb76momfdr0cpo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5toms3sdimn70ct1hqlvnvcga8i1cge2r76t288_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm4o70sph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu3t1jv9l73635it08015amkss877r7h7fl3u7pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm4o70sph2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn7mbau706mpljtlbe525c35so8a2b2vcj5bs7sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm4o70sph2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znsj9bbe6ppq8p5mmb13bdt02s4s1a6cap1ua730_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm4o70sph2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zpt0l5gs8087q66dsm5g5uvcbve3v34fg5i7d5c8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj2po8v5h3nm3dkjo32ak369o27kmfg0bu108am0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c3gm2oj0s3j649fg)

name: The Dr. Bob for Congress Team
subject: This is why Dr. Bob Lorinser is so passionate about affordable, accessible, quality healthcare for everyone.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
There's no question about it. Healthcare is fundamental. There are many ways to get there, but this is what Dr. Bob believes we need to address in a national healthcare plan. The United States is the most developed nation in the world, yet we're one of the few of the top 50 countries where citizens face significant financial limitations in accessing quality care. **"There's no question about it. Everyone deserves access to affordable, quality healthcare." –Dr. Bob** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39252655/319018908/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=) _**Friend, The United States is the most developed nation in the world, yet we're one of a few top 50 countries where citizens face significant financial limitations in accessing quality care.**_ [HELP DR. BOB FIGHT FOR HEALTHCARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39252656/319018909/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39252657/319018910/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=) Dr. Bob Lorinser believes all people must have access to the health services they need, when and where they need them, without financial hardship. Dr. Bob will champion initiatives the provide United States citizens the full range of essential health services they deserve – from health promotion to prevention, treatment, rehabilitation, mental health, and palliative care. Referencing the World Health Organization (WHO), Lorinser says the expansion of healthcare initiatives must include:
* Accessibility to high-quality health services
* Receiving necessary health services without suffering financial hardship
* A robust and skilled healthcare workforce
* Strong, people-centered primary healthcare
* Care rooted in the local community, including rural accessibility
* A focus not only on preventing and treating disease and illness but also on wellness and quality of life
* Full-spectrum of essential, quality health services, from health promotion to prevention, treatment, rehabilitation, and palliative care across the life course.
* Equal treatment for all health issues, including behavioral health issues (Substance use disorders, mental illness, etc.)

Protecting people from the financial consequences of paying out-of-pocket for health services reduces the risk of poverty due to unexpected illness. Often, hospitalization and essential life-saving medicine require citizens to use their life savings, sell assets, or borrow – destroying their futures and often burdening their children. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39252658/319018911/-1384958470?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=&emci=97407d19-5553-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=abb2c142-6753-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15167427)

**Is it socialized medicine?**

No. Socialized medicine is often mentioned in conversations about universal coverage, but Dr. Bob says we must recognize the difference. In a socialized medicine system, the government pays for healthcare, operates hospitals, and employs medical staff.

Veterans Affairs (VA) is the closest we have in the US. The VA is unique.

"Do I think the government should direct all medical care? **Absolutely not.** " – Dr. Bob Lorinser

Dr. Bob Lorinser supports
* The VA
* The expansion of Medicare and Medicaid
* Privately operated employer directed medical care facilities like the Mayo Clinics or Cleveland Clinics

"The United States is the most developed nation in the world," said Dr. Bob. "Yet, we're one of the few top 50 countries where citizens face significant financial limitations in accessing quality care."

Dr. Lorinser says unchecked, in the next 30 years healthcare may exceed 30% of the GDP. He believes the United States must do something to address medical costs and that healthcare and education should be two fundamental services affordable to all payers.

"Nothing is free and there are multiple ways of achieving universal coverage," says Dr. Bob. "We need to explore new avenues, and I support _many_ plans that will address this issue and move our country forward. No one should suffer because of their ability to pay for medical care."

**Why is Dr. Lorinser so passionate about healthcare?**

It's how he's served his country for over three decades. Dr. Lorinser has three advanced degrees in medicine, social work, and public health administration. He worked as a social worker in a VA hospital and a physician for the American Indian Health Service in Navajo Nation. Lorinser then spent 30 years practicing and teaching family medicine in Marquette before the hospital's for-profit sale.

Dr. Lorinser served low-income families, children in need of behavioral health services, and patients suffering from substance abuse, alcoholism, and addiction. Administratively, Lorinser also worked to help Upper Peninsula citizens access Medicaid and Medicare for essential care.

After three decades in family medicine and as a hospitalist, Dr. Bob served nearly 10 years in the United States State Department as a regional medical director. Stationed in Pakistan, Afghanistan, Korea, North Africa, and Iraq, Dr. Bob oversaw American service members' diplomatic and administrative medical needs across millions of square miles in dozens of countries.

Lorinser returned to Northern Michigan and continued his service as the medical director of the Marquette County Health Department to help citizens stay safe and healthy during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic.

[HELP DR. BOB FIGHT FOR HEALTHCARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39252659/319018912/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39252660/319018913/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39252661/319018914/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=)
If you believe you received this message in error, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/97407d19-5553-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/abb2c142-6753-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmIyYzE0Mi02NzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJhpyDd5wc71Ze_dwCWtLprOcKZLVPo3gJNXYE4oPGA=&id=116937387).

PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9v1sujet9iisqtif4dj112af04g1i5vmpe812mo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbcbie1i39c3i64qj8dj1mjjr1dlj6ioj2o3mc4qe1ori6hqedd74cepj8srk6srt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo7ed9icup30pjksipm6ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdj61ob1c3h68or24no)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh433i35qq7k4jl011fng5d4k65mrm1v03voaiug_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm1oj4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z20prebapfaln62aj0bnd390bo6igg9m6n0487kg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm1oj4cdh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znmac3mi9rd644mqn6u4nn58558dt8jqem0v8b4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm1oj4cdh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq7a9775g0pd6ofchnc3o65tgpn67btkpqfb78l0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5gm1oj4cdh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn8idnd0c3jp4os35a8tj54d56o1f96sgcns21ho_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr34s9kcepr6shncsq6eotim6pjcs9ic5pb0tdn6cpr3djie3j6ephgc3gm3cdn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im1j7ap5lm1jrcp366aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpge2pb0c1gm9oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqnrm9b93a07k7q2fq6umfmr85es607oheus3768_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5im0o31cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zshcdo165sdujfb4o2d7aut5npo2fs4f4lkhcnjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5im0o31cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc872vt06q3mprshqo5qs3ndu213v8l2gj8jr8io_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5im0o31cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Did we already discuss this? FWD: This is bad. Really bad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It's Dan Crenshaw. Did you ignore my last email?
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2zfjo--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | |
It’s Congressman Dan Crenshaw. I wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t dire. Let me give it to you straight:

Too many patriots ignored my humble plea, and we blew our fundraising goal for November. **That leaves us completely defenseless, underfunded, and TRAILING behind Nancy Pelosi’s National Democrats by MILLIONS.**
---
| | | [GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1necu-4qqlpo2/ "GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP")
---
_**Your contribution has 300% impact until midnight.**_
Last month, we blew our goal because too many true Americans ignored my humble request. So, when the Democrats spent a ton of money attacking Republicans,**we didn’t have enough resources to fight back. **

**Now, we’re being outraised, outspent, and important polls predict us LOSING in some key districts. **

We literally cannot afford to lose support from anyone reading this email. Without your full support, we’re doomed. **[Please make a 300% matched donation immediately to avoid falling into a pattern of losing to Biden and the radical left.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1necv-4qqlpo3/ "Please make a 300% matched donation immediately to avoid falling into a pattern of losing to Biden and the radical left.")**
---
| | | [GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1necw-4qqlpo4/ "GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP")
---
_**Your contribution has 300% impact until midnight.**_
Please, it would mean a lot to me and House Republicans.

Thank you,
Congressman Dan Crenshaw

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: This is bad. Really bad.

---
It’s Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1necx-4qqlpo5/)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn’t what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn’t an option – falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1necy-4qqlpo6/ "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won’t either, which is why today I’m coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1necz-4qqlpo7/ "Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**

I can’t extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time – but it’s critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it’s indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1ned0-4qqlpo4/ "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1ned1-4qqlpo5/ "Generic Button")
---

We’re in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi – we’re just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she’s panicking._

_She’s dialing up dark money donors.

She’s depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi’s working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can’t let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There’s no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1ned2-4qqlpo6/ "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zfjo-1ned3-4qqlpo7/)
---
Dan Crenshaw

---

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: BREAKING: LAWSUIT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
I'm suing the Wisconsin Elections Commission to protect your vote.
| [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246914:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)
---
Peter,
---
After a non-partisan audit of the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) identified _numerous instances_ of the Commission issuing _unlawful_ guidance on the 2020 election, I knew we couldn't wait to act.
---
**That's why I'm SUING the WEC to ensure our elections are FREE and FAIR with less than 1 year to go until Election Day.**
---
_But I'm counting on our grassroots supporters like YOU to help me marshal the resources to win this fight in the courts._
---
**[Please make a contribution to my Election Integrity Fund to help fuel our legal battle to SECURE our elections.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246914:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246915:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246916:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246917:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246918:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246919:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246914:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
If we don't secure Wisconsin's elections ahead of this MUST-WIN governor's race, 2022 will be nothing more than a repeat of 2020.
---
We cannot wait until the eve of next year's election to address the WEC's failure and willful neglect of the law.
---
_Which is exactly why I'm asking the state Supreme court to immediately SUSPEND the unlawful guidance the WEC issued on the 2020 election._
---
**[SECURE OUR ELECTIONS](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246914:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)**
---
Our lawsuit is focusing on 3 key areas where the WEC failed to follow the law in its guidance:
1\. Allowing municipalities to establish unattended absentee ballot drop boxes
2\. Banning special voting deputies from long term care facilities
3\. Relocating and closing polling places on the eve of an election
---
There's too much at stake for us to lose this battle in the courts, Peter.
---
**Our freedom, our way of life, and the future of our great nation all depend on free and fair elections -- elections where every voter can trust the process and the result.**
---
Now more than ever, I need you fighting by my side to ensure our elections are free and fair.
---
**[So please, make a contribution to my Election Integrity Fund to help fuel our legal battle to SECURE our elections now that we're suing the WEC.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246914:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r) **
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59246914:W5NZBlHcN:m:1:1155937413:3A5602F30A5C655996D2796CB098C179:r)
---
Rebecca Kleefisch
Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin
Republican Candidate for Governor
---
Paid for by People for Rebecca.
---
PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562
---

subject: Thank you, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39255090/319031073/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczZmUyYS03ODUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Tr1XGcnnynKz0nyNL7fRMkfUMQW_s-rEDclna9G-I8=)

| | Folks, I launched my campaign with a message of treating human dignity as a human right. Since then, my team and I have heard from people across the state and country who share our values. Y’all believe what I believe, that I am the Democrat who can win in a competitive southern district because of my integrity and because I’ve done it before -- in North Carolina’s General Assembly. As a result of our message and your support, we raised nearly $200,000 within just one week of launching our campaign. And you kept up that momentum -- I’m reaching out today to say thank you for helping my team and I reach our fundraising goal for November. I’m also reaching out to give a bit more background about our new district, NC-04. NC-04 includes Cumberland County, which is just down the road from the county I grew up in, Robeson. It’s a rural community with strong family values, and a whole lot of Lumbees live there -- of about 55,000 Lumbees in the state, most of them live in Robeson, Cumberland, or in just two other nearby counties. The issues facing Robeson are much like the issues facing Cumberland and the rest of NC-04. But, NC-04 has a lot of new voters that I need to talk to -- and for that, I need resources. This seat is shaping up to be one of the most competitive districts in the nation. **[Will you make a contribution of $25 or whatever you can today? It will go towards hiring staff, training volunteers, and helping me talk to as many folks as possible about the values on which this campaign is built.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39255093/319031079/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211202_FR_EOMTYNewDistrict_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczZmUyYS03ODUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Tr1XGcnnynKz0nyNL7fRMkfUMQW_s-rEDclna9G-I8=)** | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39255096/319031089/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211202_FR_EOMTYNewDistrict_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczZmUyYS03ODUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Tr1XGcnnynKz0nyNL7fRMkfUMQW_s-rEDclna9G-I8=)

Hello,
We’re emailing to ask you to give $5 to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Here’s why: Iowa will be one of the closest races in the country next year, and Senate control is at stake in Mike’s campaign against Grassley. But right now, we’re still 30 donations short of our daily goal and what we’ll need to win.
Mike’s not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, he’s relying on grassroots donors like you to fund his campaign.
But here’s the truth: We need to hit this goal if we're going to be able to fully fund our campaign to take on Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs. We just can't afford to fall short right now.
**There’s still time for us to make up the difference, but we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**Please, can you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare today – to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue? Every dollar you give today will help us get back on track to hitting our goal and expand our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39260885/319052590/-42398318?refcode=em20211202am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzg1ZWI5MS04MDUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y9kROM_5FpfpYBI4inO1R1msiaSwaqqOuug6Te0mJMw=)
Hitting these goals sets the tone for the entire campaign, and it will decide whether or not we’re able to elect a bold Democrat like Mike to the Senate and confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, and rein in Wall Street.
Thank you for being a part of the campaign,
Team Franken

name: Tom Nelson
subject: we have what it takes to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Team, thanks to folks like you, we smashed our fundraising goal last month!

**Just like Thanksgiving leftovers, people are tired of same old, same old in Washington.** Politicians like Ron Johnson have abandoned the people they’re meant to represent, and spend all of their time sucking up to out of touch billionaires.

I’m running to flip that approach upside down. By refusing to take money from Wall Street, Big Pharma, or Big Business, I’m putting the focus back on regular Wisconsinites.

With your help, we’ve created a grassroots movement powerful enough to win, and for that, I thank you. As we move forward into the last month of the year, I hope you’ll continue to be a part of this journey to bring progressive, people-focused leadership to Washington.

Onward,

Tom

---
|
---

clean_body: | | Team, thanks to folks like you, we smashed our fundraising goal last month! Just like Thanksgiving leftovers, people are tired of same old, same old in Washington. Politicians like Ron Johnson have abandoned the people they’re meant to represent, and spend all of their time sucking up to out of touch billionaires. I’m running to flip that approach upside down. By refusing to take money from Wall Street, Big Pharma, or Big Business, I’m putting the focus back on regular Wisconsinites. With your help, we’ve created a grassroots movement powerful enough to win, and for that, I thank you. As we move forward into the last month of the year, I hope you’ll continue to be a part of this journey to bring progressive, people-focused leadership to Washington. Onward, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Dr. Annie Andrews is running for Congress in SC-01 to make sure our elected officials put our children's future first. | I’m so grateful for the outpouring of grassroots support we saw ahead of our first budget deadline this week, and I’m so glad you’re on our team to defeat Nancy Mace and bring real, rational leadership to Congress.

Amid rising concerns about a new COVID variant and yet another tragic school shooting in Michigan, I wish I could say Mace spoke out this week to protect Lowcountry kids and families.

**Instead, she engaged in a childish Twitter spat with Marjorie Taylor Greene, engaging in self-absorbed showmanship and ignoring the very real problems threatening our community.**

[Lowcountry families deserve better — that’s why I’m asking 500 supporters to sign on as Digital Endorsers to prove we want real leadership in Congress →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39263231/319062273/74806484?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211202_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=Q0lFZ3iF5r0xq%2FmQ2CT8KWGEUFPVUKSgiulAVJrK2pdn5lc%2FHqWOVbSEwYLz%2Fbqw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzIyYzM5My04NDUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4voiP-HyQ2lHtM0DEEsv6DHqkT1Q4YeOGTDfbRRjq4E=&emci=3b22c393-8453-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=3c22c393-8453-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=6125529)

Lowcountry families are facing several ongoing crises — from a potential new phase of the pandemic to the gun violence epidemic and an impending climate catastrophe.

The solutions to all of these issues are rooted in science and require putting our trust in public health experts, doctors, and climate scientists.

So we need public officials who believe in science and prioritize fact-based information, not politically motivated misinformation and misleading half-truths.

## Are Your Water Rights in Idaho Safe? (Video)

body:
We’re running out of time to protect our environment

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39263867/319074608/380302539?refcode=enviro122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOGQyNi04NjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-7mXSknLoei2yX3gV1BtW30XACghnFWBzxXEkkqAS4=) Peter, In my time in office, I’ve taken action to ensure access to clean water, hold noncompliant farms accountable for not abiding by regulations, and set Florida on the path to a renewable energy future. But we need to step up our efforts, Peter. **We’re running out of time to protect our health, our economy, and our environment from the impact of climate change. We need to take bold action, and we need to do it now. ** That’s why, earlier this week, I joined members of the Legislature to announce our top environmental legislative priorities. From working to limit greenhouse gas emissions to banning unsafe packaging, I’m doing everything in my power to keep Floridians safe and keep our state moving toward a sustainable future. **And as your Governor, I’ll be ready on day one to take bold, aggressive action to protect our environment. After more than 20 years of Republican governors, that’s something new.** [**With so much at stake, Floridians deserve a leader who will make our environment a priority — not a do-nothing Governor who will stand in the way of our progress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39263999/319075240/-913685435?refcode=e20211202_ck-photo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGI2NDU0Yy04NjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rrqZQPA0QAc-sUhdfSRcjJecYVt3-xDbLAr8TmhKEIE=) Hi Friend, I first met Maggie Hassan when she was running for the New Hampshire State Senate in 2004. Granite Staters saw how hard she worked and how much she cared about the issues that kept them up at night—and she won that race! **Granite Staters know a leader when they see one. They subsequently elected Maggie to serve as New Hampshire’s governor and then U.S. Senator.** Voters in New Hampshire are famously independent. And that’s why Republicans are not merely using every trick in the book to defeat Maggie—they’re expanding the book to include heinous tactics! **[Will you join me in supporting Senator Hassan by chipping in $5 to her campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39264000/319075241/-913685435?refcode=e20211202_ck&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGI2NDU0Yy04NjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rrqZQPA0QAc-sUhdfSRcjJecYVt3-xDbLAr8TmhKEIE=)** We’ve seen millions of Americans come together to support leaders like Maggie who fight fiercely to get things done for their constituents and all Americans. Our superpower is staying engaged!** **[Can I count on you to chip in $5 to Maggie’s campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39264001/319075242/-913685435?refcode=e20211202_ck&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGI2NDU0Yy04NjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rrqZQPA0QAc-sUhdfSRcjJecYVt3-xDbLAr8TmhKEIE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39264002/319075243/-913685435?refcode=e20211202_ck&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGI2NDU0Yy04NjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rrqZQPA0QAc-sUhdfSRcjJecYVt3-xDbLAr8TmhKEIE=)

**REMEMBER who delivered COVID relief, shots in arms, and meaningful investments in America's infrastructure this year:[DEMOCRATS.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39264007/319075248/-913685435?refcode=e20211202_ck&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGI2NDU0Yy04NjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rrqZQPA0QAc-sUhdfSRcjJecYVt3-xDbLAr8TmhKEIE=)**

SCOTUS takes up major pro-life case. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d7968e1995406dcb/33d15451f36649b1c3d6b838967d376c/35903)
---
Peter, This week could mark a major turning point for the pro-life movement.
As you read this email, the U.S. Supreme Court is debating a Mississippi law that bans abortions after 15 weeks of pregnancy. If the state of Mississippi wins, it would be the first time in the Roe vs. Wade era that the court has upheld a 15-week abortion ban.
**TAKE A STAND:**
---
[**FIGHT FOR LIFE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d7968e1995406dcb/bc7f569f421d8f57c3d6b838967d376c/35903)
---
**I hope and pray the justices will do the right thing and uphold this law, as it would be a huge step toward overturning Roe v. Wade. Preborn babies and their moms deserve protection and compassionate care, not the distortion and lies of the abortion industry**.
Peter, I’m proud to be the most pro-life candidate in this race, and I’ll do everything in my power to protect innocent life in the U.S. Senate. **[Can I count on you to support my pro-life campaign with a generous contribution of $5, $15, $35, $50, or more?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d7968e1995406dcb/96470c150b50bcf6c3d6b838967d376c/35903)**
We cannot allow the Left’s abortion lobby to influence the court in their decision. We must fight back to protect this law and the millions of unborn lives. Thank you,
Mark Walker

On Tuesday, we faced our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Thanks to an outpouring of support from this grassroots team, I'm excited to announce that we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39264626/319079723/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDdlODZmMy04ODUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99TAg6Xf82GfNr_0pVghillUVnO701XcXn-kIRwnQkM=&emci=f4883733-f152-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=507e86f3-8853-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

On Tuesday, we faced our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Thanks to an outpouring of support from this grassroots team, I'm excited to announce that **we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal!**

I can't thank you enough, Peter. Reaching our November end-of-month goal was particularly important because we just learned _yet another_ conservative Republican entered the race against me -- and the Republican establishment is lining up behind his campaign.

While we may not know who my opponent will be next November, we do know this will be our toughest race yet. Your support in helping us hit our end-of-month goal puts us in a better position to defend this seat.

So, thank you again for stepping up when I needed you the most. It won't be easy, but together, we can protect my seat and defend our Democratic House majority.

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. name: Ras Smith
subject: permission.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Thank you for not waiting for anyone's permission to get involved with our campaign. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39265059/319082301/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjUwMDEwYS04YTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqfXU-UEwQdapWo2T00UHgn8oKhQcUfwO-IAVLpkDIA=)
Team,

I know my team and I have been in touch a lot the past week. That's because we had an important end-of-month deadline. Thanks to you, I'm happy to report that we met the mark on our goal. _Thank you!_

I want to thank you specifically friend, for NOT waiting for anyone's permission to get involved with our campaign. Thank you for believing we have what it takes to defeat Kim Reynolds.

That said, with fundraising reports due at the end of the year, we have a big month ahead of us. I'm confident we'll be able to power through and put up the best number possible that shows the strength of our grassroots movement.

name: Carol Donovan
subject: I'm with Charlie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

When the Texas state House district lines were redrawn in late September, I, like many of you, was drawn into the new House District 114. The seat is being vacated by my friend the retiring Rep. John Turner. Several candidates jumped into the race to succeed John, but I was most excited to see Charlie Gearing’s candidacy.

The recent extremism of some in our state government, including their attacks on reproductive and voting rights, has only reaffirmed the importance of having qualified, prepared, and effective representatives like Charlie in Austin. Can you chip in today to help Charlie run the strong campaign he needs to win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Charlie has been working tirelessly for years in our community, serving our neighbors who are experiencing homelessness by providing them with free legal services and advocating for equality, inclusion, and protection for every Texan. To put it plainly, Charlie is the most experienced candidate in this race, with a long history of strong leadership that has led to meaningful progress for our neighborhoods in Texas House District 114.

He has done all of this while building a successful legal career with some of the best law firms in the state. Charlie’s record of service to others, and his preparedness for and commitment to the hard work that must be done in Austin, are why I’m proudly endorsing Charlie Gearing to represent us in Texas House District 114 . Will you join me in supporting his campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Charlie is uniquely qualified not only to run a successful campaign but to enact meaningful progress as a respected legislator in the 88th Texas state legislative session. He is a distinguished attorney who advises clients on complex legal issues every day. He has run large organizations and unified disparate interests and opinions. And his record of servant leadership demonstrates he will fight for every Texan— including women, the LGBTQ+ community, and all minority populations, all of whom have been unfairly targeted by the extremism of Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick.

Charlie is the leader we need representing us in Austin, standing up for our values, and bringing people together. Please join me in supporting Charlie and help him get to Austin. Charlie needs our help to reach voters and to make sure they know about his exemplary record of leadership and service.

Can you chip in $114 today to help Charlie build a strong campaign? Chip in here >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Thank you,

Carol Donovan, Past Chair
Dallas County Democratic Party

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
Charlie Gearing for Texas
10440 N. Central Expressway Suite 1400 Dallas, TX 75231

https://www.facebook.com/gearingfortexas [https://www.facebook.com/gearingfortexas] https://twitter.com/gearingfortexas [https://twitter.com/gearingfortexas] https://instagram.com/gearingfortexas [https://instagram.com/gearingfortexas] campaign@gearingfortexas.com [campaign@gearingfortexas.com]

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fauci is absolutely out of control, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r)** __ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r) | |
---
Peter, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _ "really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r)
__
Peter, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_" I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It's clear all the power has gotten to his head and it's about time we send him home.

**If you 're with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you'll chip in now: [https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that's why he's spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58921444:6ImSnjEMN:m:1:3253819041:22F867FC561BFC037B7B3BEF6962A549:r)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__
