name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Yesterday's oral arguments at the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=t%2Be7IduJuPMh1Of02%2FjFuuTBkuOiLJxc&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
[ ](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1109-su-nd)
Friend,
Yesterday, the U.S. Supreme Court heard arguments in a case challenging Mississippi's extreme abortion ban - the greatest test of _Roe v. Wade 's_ precedent in decades.
**Despite yesterday's legal arguments, conservative justices seem ready to roll back abortion rights drastically. I 've never needed you to join me in taking action more than at this moment, and I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why.**
Yesterday, I was standing outside the Supreme Court, rallying with grassroots activists who are on the front lines of the fight to protect women's healthcare. It was an honor to participate and support their tireless efforts to guard the liberty of American women - liberty that is enshrined in our Constitution's 14th Amendment, but is at risk of being trampled over by the right-wing conservative ideologues who sit on our Supreme Court.
The justices' questions and attitudes suggested that we can no longer rely on this Court to defend our fundamental human rights. A Court with six conservative justices -- three extremists appointed by Donald Trump -- is a Court that no longer cares either about legal precedent or the rights of all Americans. Congress owes it to the women of our nation _and_ has a constitutional duty to take action that unequivocally _protects_ women's health. Otherwise, draconian laws like those in Mississippi and Texas will put women further at risk with each passing day and hour.
Thankfully, the House has already taken action by passing companion legislation to my bill, the Women's Health Protection Act. If passed by the Senate and signed into law by the president, it would guarantee a woman's right to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions. It would stop right-wing, extremist attempts to undermine the rule of law and legal precedent. **That 's why I am once again calling on this team to help me pass this lifesaving bill through the Senate.**
**[Please, Friend, with conservative justices likely to undermine Roe v. Wade's precedent, we must pass the Women's Health Protection Act into law and safeguard a woman's right to abortion services in all situations. Will you sign my urgent petition now demanding the Senate enshrine abortion rights into law?](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1109-su-nd)**
[ADD YOUR NAME >>>](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1109-su-nd)
If the Supreme Court, as many expect it to, upholds Mississippi's abortion ban, then a woman's right to exercise her constitutionally guaranteed liberty over her own body and her health could disappear overnight in America. It's why legislative action to _protect_ women's healthcare decisions is so urgent. We must act this instant, and I so appreciate you joining me in this fight.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Vpw7jnVHQXh2MYKlszzXpeTBkuOiLJxc&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

# Stop the stranglehold on U.S. energy
---
The United States Strategic Petroleum Reserves is to be used in an emergency only, not because of incompetence. Yet last week, the Biden Administration authorized the use of 50 million barrels of oil from the strategic reserve, while calling for increased costs for drilling on American public lands. And rather than supporting domestic producers, Biden continues to look to OPEC and Russia for supply, further weakening American by leaving us vulnerable to our enemies.
Colorado is an energy producing state that can help fuel America by heating our homes, lowering the price of gas, and employing thousands of workers. It's estimated that Biden's insipid action of ending new federal lands leases will cost Colorado 18,000 jobs and $108 million in state revenue.
We are more dependent on foreign energy, our fuel prices are still skyrocketing, we are losing jobs and revenue, and we are tapping our strategic reserve. This is insanity and it has to stop.
As your next U.S. Senator, I will work to formulate a balanced energy policy, one that allows U.S producers to help us regain energy independence, while seeking ways to keep our environment clean and our economy strong.
Please help me by giving what you can to our cause. Together, we can stop the insanity in Washington and restore strength to Colorado and our nation. Stand with me today.
Kindly,
---

clean_body: CRT should be eliminated from military training | | | | == | | Stop the stranglehold on U.S. energy The United States Strategic Petroleum Reserves is to be used in an emergency only, not because of incompetence. Yet last week, the Biden Administration authorized the use of 50 million barrels of oil from the strategic reserve, while calling for increased costs for drilling on American public lands. And rather than supporting domestic producers, Biden continues to look to OPEC and Russia for supply, further weakening American by leaving us vulnerable to our enemies. Colorado is an energy producing state that can help fuel America by heating our homes, lowering the price of gas, and employing thousands of workers. It's estimated that Biden's insipid action of ending new federal lands leases will cost Colorado 18,000 jobs and $108 million in state revenue. We are more dependent on foreign energy, our fuel prices are still skyrocketing, we are losing jobs and revenue, and we are tapping our strategic reserve. This is insanity and it has to stop. As your next U.S. Senator, I will work to formulate a balanced energy policy, one that allows U.S producers to help us regain energy independence, while seeking ways to keep our environment clean and our economy strong. Please help me by giving what you can to our cause. Together, we can stop the insanity in Washington and restore strength to Colorado and our nation. Stand with me today. Kindly, | | | | | == | | | == | | I need your help. Please donate to our fight so I can stand for you in the U.S. Senate. A quick donation from you goes a long way. Meanwhile, I'll work to make your donation matter. | You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker opposing this outrage. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | | == | Together we can stand against the destructive policies of a heartless Biden administration. Peter,

Thank you for your continued support of me and The Dr. Oz Show.

**You might have heard that I 've announced that I am running for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.** You know that I've never shied away from telling my patients and my audience that you're the key to solving many of your problems. Feckless leadership in Congress means that too often, representatives are more interested in winning re-election than bravely challenging political orthodoxy. _I 'm running for Senate to change that._

You've been a loyal supporter of mine, so now I'm reaching out to you personally to ask you to join my campaign for Senate. Can I count on your support as I embark on this next step to empower the people of Pennsylvania and improve their lives?

name: Wes Moore
subject: Thank you
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39274177/319102220/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_na_20211202thankyou_wm_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE5OGE4Zi05NzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RFN9lIXO48PNbcZF3G9PNXy8_-Mo3VurtKRer3dIclY=)
---
Friends, I wanted to reach out directly to say thank you. For all of the support you’ve shown me, from pitching in before our November fundraising deadline to spreading the word about our campaign to friends and family, you have my immense gratitude. Now that December has begun, we’re just eleven months away from the 2022 election for Maryland’s next governor, an opportunity to bring new leadership to Annapolis and positive change across our state. I’m running for governor because I believe that every Marylander deserves the opportunity to hold a decent job, earn a living wage, and have the ability to build wealth for their family. We need a governor who lifts our communities up and makes sure no Marylander is left behind. That’s my vision for Maryland because that’s how I’ve led my whole career as a combat veteran, former small business owner, and former CEO of one of the nation’s largest non-profits. And with the team we’re building, and the support we’re receiving from across the state, I’m more confident than ever that we can do this together. **But this is one of the most competitive gubernatorial elections in the country, and it’s going to be one of the most expensive, too.** That’s why I’m so grateful for grassroots supporters like you. Together, I know we can win this and move Maryland forward in 2022. Let’s keep up the momentum in this final month of 2021! Elevate, Wes PS — I’ve you’re able to help us start December off strong, **[pitch in a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39274178/319102221/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_na_20211202thankyou_wm_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE5OGE4Zi05NzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RFN9lIXO48PNbcZF3G9PNXy8_-Mo3VurtKRer3dIclY=)** I truly appreciate it. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39274179/319102222/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_na_20211202thankyou_wm_30da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE5OGE4Zi05NzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RFN9lIXO48PNbcZF3G9PNXy8_-Mo3VurtKRer3dIclY=)
---

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

For all of the support you’ve shown me, from pitching in before our November fundraising deadline to spreading the word about our campaign to friends and family, you have my immense gratitude. Now that December has begun, we’re just eleven months away from the 2022 election for Maryland’s next governor, an opportunity to bring new leadership to Annapolis and positive change across our state. I’m running for governor because I believe that every Marylander deserves the opportunity to hold a decent job, earn a living wage, and have the ability to build wealth for their family. We need a governor who lifts our communities up and makes sure no Marylander is left behind. That’s my vision for Maryland because that’s how I’ve led my whole career as a combat veteran, former small business owner, and former CEO of one of the nation’s largest non-profits. And with the team we’re building, and the support we’re receiving from across the state, I’m more confident than ever that we can do this together. But this is one of the most competitive gubernatorial elections in the country, and it’s going to be one of the most expensive, too. That’s why I’m so grateful for grassroots supporters like you. Together, I know we can win this and move Maryland forward in 2022. Let’s keep up the momentum in this final month of 2021! Elevate, Wes PS — I’ve you’re able to help us start December off strong, = I truly appreciate it. | = | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, LISSA MUSCATINE, TREASURER. body:
# [#]I wanted to take a minute to thank you for supporting our efforts in the push for bipartisan progress. With your help, we have been able to enact historic bipartisan legislation like the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, creating millions of jobs for hardworking Americans.

There is always more to be done. My position in Congress continues to be threatened as our razor-thin majority remains vulnerable. I need your help so that I can continue to represent Jersey Values.

Thank you again for all of your support, with your help we can continue to make bipartisan progress, and fight for the needs of all Americans.

Best,

Josh

P.S. If you didn’t get the chance to support our efforts last month, consider chipping in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2112?amount=20]

name: Nikki Haley
subject: If you support Israel, you need to read this immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Nothing is more important than stopping Huwaida Arraf
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2zi1u--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Fellow Conservative,

If you don’t know who Huwaida Arraf is, I need you to keep reading this email.

**[If you do know who she is, I need you to donate right away to help us stop her.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zi1u-1ngtr-4qqlpo0/ "If you do know who she is, I need you to donate right away to help us stop her.")**

---
| | | [STOP HUWAIDA ARRAF NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zi1u-1ngts-4qqlpo1/)
---

Here are five things you need to know about Huwaida Arraf:
1. She founded an anti-Israel group _**known for provoking violent confrontations**_ with the Israeli military that _**has been investigated by the FBI for possible ties to terrorism.**_
2. She co-authored an op-ed that promoted violence against Israelis and said: “ _**Yes, people will get killed and injured,**_ ” but these deaths are “no less noble than carrying out a suicide operation. And we are certain that if these men were killed during such an action, _**they would be considered shaheed Allah.**_ ”
3. She has _**provided protection for terrorists,**_ even acting as a voluntary human shield for them.
4. She co-organized the “Free Gaza Flotilla” _**which led to violent clashes**_ with the Israeli Navy.
5. Now, _**she’s running for Congress**_ in Michigan’s 10th Congressional District.

Nothing is more important than stopping Huwaida Arraf.

In order to do that, we must support Rep. Lisa McClain – the pro-Israel Republican who is currently representing the district.

---
| | | [SUPPORT REP. LISA McCLAIN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zi1u-1ngtt-4qqlpo2/)
---

**[If you stand with Israel, I am urging you to rush anything you can to help Rep. Lisa McClain defeat Huwaida Arraf.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zi1u-1ngtu-4qqlpo3/ "If you stand with Israel, I am urging you to rush anything you can to help Rep. Lisa McClain defeat Huwaida Arraf.")**

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

My very best,

Nikki R. Haley

| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zi1u-1ngtv-4qqlpo4/)

I’m focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Peter, I wanted to personally reach out and talk to you about last month's fundraising.

We came really close to reaching our end-of-month fundraising goal, **but we didn't reach it before the deadline of midnight on November 30th.**

Reaching our goals is critical to the success of our campaign. When we don't meet our marks, we have to make sacrifices that could be damning.

We don't want to have to choose between not running digital advertisements and voter outreach. We especially don't want to have to cut down on our rapid response funding, since one of our Republican opponents has continuously taken shots at Michele.

**[December's fundraising deadline just got real as hell, Peter. It's the final month of 2021, PLUS, it's the FEC quarterly fundraising deadline too. We need to step things up. Please, if you're able to spare $5 or something else, chip in now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39274914/319105075/-465419534?refcode=em21_211202_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzkyYjFhYy05OTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCmAvc0uAMrDMV70lhjnaOBxMmV0DFm_8C7Pk9cUjBo=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39274915/319105076/-465419534?refcode=em21_211202_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzkyYjFhYy05OTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCmAvc0uAMrDMV70lhjnaOBxMmV0DFm_8C7Pk9cUjBo=) When we DO meet our fundraising goals, it means we are on track to _win._

Keeping this campaign going strong means strengthening our ability to push for bold legislation that would benefit essential workers, families, and marginalized communities.

**Our district deserves a leader who's ready to fight the good fight -- NOT one who's focused on upholding a Trump legacy (cough cough, Anna Paulina Luna.)**

**[This is a 100% people-powered grassroots campaign, and solidifying our place in this race is crucial to showing how politics should be. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Invoice: Mask Fines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter --

$70,000
That's how much Nancy Pelosi is fining me for
REFUSING to comply with her mask mandate.
It wasn't enough that Nancy Pelosi tried to
expel me from Congress or kick me off my committees.
Now, Nancy Pelosi is trying to crush me with
tens of thousands of dollars in mask fines. . .
But I'm not backing down.
In fact, I'm suing Nancy Pelosi for these
ridiculous mask rules that she herself doesn't even follow!

HELP MTG SUE PELOSI
DONATE TODAY!

Can I count on your financial support to help
me sue Nancy Pelosi?

Nancy Pelosi slapped a target on my back and
declared me public enemy #1 because she fears the strength of the
America First movement.

After the results in Virginia, socialist
Democrats should be scared.

America First Patriots rose up and rejected
illegal and unethical vaccine mandates that public health tyrants
want to force on our children...

. . .Tyrants like Dr. Fauci exploiting the
China virus to rule every aspect of our lives...

. . .Joe Biden's open borders policies allow
mobs of illegal aliens to invade our country...

. . .And Racist Critical Race Theory and woke
indoctrination poisoning student's minds by twisting children
into hating their classmates because of the color of their skin.

So please, help me sue Nancy Pelosi and stop
this madness by chipping in a contribution right away.

Nancy Pelosi thinks if she can take me down,
she can silence your voice.

That's why Pelosi and the Jihad Squad were
hell-bent on canceling me out of Congress.

But I refuse to bend the knee before Pelosi's
dictatorial mask mandate.

And now I'm suing Nancy Pelosi to fight back.

I need your support right away.

If America First conservatives don't draw a
line in the sand and push back against Pelosi's socialist cancel
culture, China virus vaccine and mask mandates will spread across
the country.

That's why I'm asking for you to chip in a
contribution of $17.76 and help me sue Nancy Pelosi.

I'll keep you updated.
HELP MTG SUE PELOSI
DONATE TODAY!
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene for Congress.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Thank you for your ongoing support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/knwXUU43iwsPQJI4-U60OaHxUYgD1K2UdkW4J0XMoxk=/Wo6iFwE9VTfJYdf4FfnD8QxTAWvDSF9TvD559HPTQzM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211202-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

On Tuesday, another fundraising month for our campaign came to a close. **Thanks to your commitment to progress and your support for our campaign, we exceeded our November fundraising goal.**

I could not be prouder of the community of supporters this campaign has behind it and I am so grateful for your contributions as we power towards re-election in 2022.

Our success this month is a resounding confirmation that people care about what we're accomplishing for Central Virginians - whether by making the historic infrastructure bill law or passing the Build Back Better bill through the House.

No matter what we're able to accomplish, there's no changing the fact that our district is one of the most competitive in the nation. But because of your unwavering support and the momentum we're building on the heels of transformative policy, I know we'll win in 2022 so I can continue working on behalf of our community in Congress.

**It 's a privilege to serve you, and I look forward to accomplishing more with you by my side.**

Thank you again,

Abigail
---

subject: Liz Cheney Republicans are after me

The Washington Post ran the opinion piece below in February of this year, and it looks like someone in Georgia was paying attent
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ec8cvgoja4gintau2v4dddqgrj3bon3vqe9fco_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpr2ptgmsobdcpledj7dclh6sr74sb468pj4ormekor6or5e5r79p1hemqm5c30sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661rjacj7m9omctj4mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpge2or4s3i6aoh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6lrbqab73lhj3u8815tv14jiiovprreb6f2ak60_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5hm9o74clh2bs "Headline") Fellow Patriot: The Washington Post ran the opinion piece below in February of this year, and it looks like someone in Georgia was paying attention. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zthqt5ajkqofbsan2995c2c2svrgalo0nplgmkso_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5hm9o74clh2bs "Headline")Legislators in Georgia - REPUBLICAN legislators no less - the same ones that refused to audit the election--have finished the process of re-drawing the Congressional seats and have added a massive amount of Democrat voters to my new district. They are hoping to get me out of Congress. **They can't beat me, so they are gerrymandering me out of Congress.** They have been planning this all along because I am standing up for you, not for them. _They hate me for it, and they 're never going to stop._ **[And, I hate to admit it, but this time their plan may work unless loyal supporters like you help me raise enough campaign funds to scare them off before the end of this year. I know I've asked for your help before, and I'm thankful that you've stepped up, but I truly need your support of just $25, $50, or $100 before the end of the year.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqgu9ie4o3sqabbva22t9ae684guqom7hdocnugo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5hm9o74clh2bs "And, I hate to admit it, but this time their plan may work unless loyal supporters like you help me raise enough campaign funds to scare them off before the end of this year. I know I’ve asked for your help before, and I’m thankful that you’ve stepped up, but I truly need your support of just $25, $50, or $100 before the end of the year.")** This redistricting was a fool's errand that was led by power-obsessed state legislators. These are Republicans, but they aren't MY kind of Republicans - they are the Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger type of Republicans. I know that Joe Biden's inflation is hurting your family, and everything from filling up your gas tank to filling up the grocery cart is more demanding these days. Still, I need you to do all you can to help me fight back against the RINOs and radical leftists who are helping Biden force socialism upon this great nation. **[_If you supported me before,_ I need you to dig even deeper and do all you can to help me. _If you haven 't stood with me before,_ I need you to step up and help me continue the fight for freedom in the Halls of Congress while Nancy looks for the next way to punish me.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztpquh37prlak92mfi43uk046eqgl9devrmh76r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5hm9o74clh2bs "If you supported me before, I need you to dig even deeper and do all you can to help me. If you haven’t stood with me before, I need you to step up and help me continue the fight for freedom in the Halls of Congress while Nancy looks for the next way to punish me.")** If we allow them to do this, if we allow them to squeeze out any America First candidate they don't like, then everything President Trump stood for is lost. Our nation faces challenging times, and I'm working day and night to fight the radical socialists. **[I need to hear from you today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpvvh8pce5pj6qhg1unea9cctqn5vf1p6ao2ajq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5hm9o74clh2bs "I need to hear from you today.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9vktvu8vvrc8o4pglekr07jrtue6m9ck9bs5lhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5hm9o74clh2bs "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. Every day, I work hard for my constituents and people around this nation who are counting on me to put an end to Biden and Pelosi's tyranny. I will never stop fighting. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5gc1qcdt443sse4fatm89pqat5dplggjrdabao8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5hm9o74clh2bs "Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me.")** Thank you.
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**

Now more than ever, we need Stacey’s fearless leadership and impassioned advocacy for justice, for equality, and for our democracy. Time and time again, Stacey has shown her dedication to this country by championing voting rights and fighting for marginalized communities.
Stacey never gave up on Georgia even though many national Democrats wrote it off as a ‘red’ state. She put her whole being into rebuilding Georgia’s Democratic infrastructure from the ground up and her tireless efforts paid off big time in 2020 when Georgia elected Senators Ossoff and Warnock to flip the Senate Majority Blue.
In 2018, Stacey narrowly lost to Brian Kemp when he administered an election he was running in as Georgia’s sitting secretary of state. Since then, Georgia Republicans have rammed through voter suppression legislation to make winning elections even tougher for people of color and marginalized communities.
Now it’s our turn to help her win. I know that with a strong campaign and big push, Stacey has what it takes to win Georgia’s governorship, keep Raphael Warnock in the Senate, and rebuild the foundation of our Democracy.
**Please Derek, rush in a split contribution of any amount right now to be among the first to help win Georgia and protect our Democratic majorities.**

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Twitter has a new CEO and he’s plotting to KILL free speech >>a
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922697:6_IHxjENd:m:1:3253819041:9C4762850BEB5232353EFE347892565D:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| Twitter announced a new CEO, Parag Agrawal, and his comments on censorship should TERRIFY any American who believes in free speech:
> _" Our role is _**_not to be bound by the First Amendment_** _... focus[ing] less on thinking about free speech, but_** _thinking about how the times have changed._**_"_ _" Most people can speak. Where our role is particularly emphasized is _**_who can be heard._**_"_
You hear that, Peter? Big Tech thinks your **_Right to Freedom of Speech_ is a relic of the past**. "Times have changed" and now **they alone should decide who gets to be heard.** Big tech is trying to stack the deck against an entire generation of conservatives if we don't join together, recruit and FIGHT. We need your support now or **America will never be free again.** Turning Point Action is ready to **mobilize** the American Majority... and **unleash** our collective power AGAINST Big Tech censorship. **[But we don't stand a chance without the support of every patriot like you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922697:6_IHxjENd:m:1:3253819041:9C4762850BEB5232353EFE347892565D:r "But we donâ€TMt stand a chance without the support of every patriot like you.")** **[Pitch in $9. Friend,

Thank you so much for your support last month. Because of you, we're building a broad and powerful coalition that's taking on career politician and GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.

With the fate of _Roe v. Wade_ in the hands of the US Supreme Court this week, the stakes in my race have never been higher. A few months ago, McCarthy joined over 200 Republican members of Congress to urge the Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ Now our constitutional reproductive rights are facing their biggest threat yet.

**As a mother of a daughter, and a teacher of many young women, I'll make this as clear as possible: I support efforts _to expand,_ not restrict, women's health care and reproductive rights.**

The House recently passed a bill that would make protections under Roe the law of the land, no matter what the Court decides. The bill is now in the Senate and they need to hear from us.

**[Will you add your name next to mine to tell the Senate that it's time to pass the Women's Health Protection Act? Our voices are stronger together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39276142/319111029/-969738095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjA3ZTIxZS1hMTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKIbFRggFhcZHP1xKPVcJukOzaZsdrPvoKIDweUQBYo=&emci=9e07e21e-a153-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a207e21e-a153-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21170704)**

name: Derek Marshall
subject: What I’m thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**I wanted to reach out and extend my thanks to you for a successful fundraising month in November.** With every month that passes, we get closer to our primary next June and build up more of the resources we will need to take on Jay Obernolte and defeat the Republican establishment. Thanks to supporters like you, we came close to hitting our goal and can stay on track to reach our fundraising target for the 4th Quarter.

As we enter this holiday season, we have much to be thankful for. I myself am thankful for many things, not the least the doctors, innovators, and researchers who worked so hard on the COVID vaccines that made it safe enough for me to travel to see my family this year. **The past two years have certainly taken their toll on us, and we have much left to fight for, but moments like these remind me of what’s important and what my true inspiration is.**
We will need each other to remain in this fight and continue to battle on. None of this work comes easy. **Educating, organizing, mobilizing: it all takes work, and time, and energy.** As we face down decisions like the upcoming Supreme Court’s on abortion access, I am focusing on the importance of standing together in community and working as one to change the state of this nation and build the better future we need.

I know that these are incredibly trying times we live in, but we are the only ones capable of changing it. We cannot wait on others to do the work for us. We must act now. **That is my promise to you—to always act with intention, with urgency, and with my community at the forefront of my mind. **
Thanks again, and wishing you a happy holiday season,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

clean_body: Peter, I wanted to reach out and extend my thanks to you for a successful fundraising month in November. With every month that passes, we get closer to our primary next June and build up more of the resources we will need to take on Jay Obernolte and defeat the Republican establishment. Thanks to supporters like you, we came close to hitting our goal and can stay on track to reach our fundraising target for the 4th Quarter. As we enter this holiday season, we have much to be thankful for. I myself am thankful for many things, not the least the doctors, innovators, and researchers who worked so hard on the COVID vaccines that made it safe enough for me to travel to see my family this year. The past two years have certainly taken their toll on us, and we have much left to fight for, but moments like these remind me of what’s important and what my true inspiration is. We will need each other to remain in this fight and continue to battle on. None of this work comes easy. Educating, organizing, mobilizing: it all takes work, and time, and energy. As we face down decisions like the upcoming Supreme Court’s on abortion access, I am focusing on the importance of standing together in community and working as one to change the state of this nation and build the better future we need. I know that these are incredibly trying times we live in, but we are the only ones capable of changing it. We cannot wait on others to do the work for us. We must act now. That is my promise to you—to always act with intention, with urgency, and with my community at the forefront of my mind. name: Charlie Crist | Left Action
subject: Is Florida too red for us to win?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHARLIE CRIST, DEMOCRAT, FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges.
| | | | |
---
| | | | | Folks, Florida has always been a swing state -- but recently, I’ve heard folks say it’s swung too red for us to win. They’re wrong. Florida is a tough state to win, but I’ve done it before, and I can do it again. In fact, recent polls have me neck and neck with Gov. DeSantis! We can beat him -- but we have to do it together. Let’s show the doubters that we’re willing to fight for Florida: today, tomorrow, and every day between now and Election Day 2022. [I need 5,000 grassroots Democrats to show their support for my campaign to defeat Gov. DeSantis and flip Florida blue. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf48a91ab-eedb-4da4-b3c6-fab9a960cfca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Sign the Petition](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf60abb2-6f63-4346-91dc-8bbfcaccae77/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges. He’s failed to lead on the COVID-19 pandemic, signed laws restricting abortion access, suppressed the vote, damaged Florida’s economy with his hyperpartisan actions, and refused to tackle the existential threat of climate change. If Gov. DeSantis wins reelection and keeps Florida red, Republican governors across America will use him and his horrific record as a template in their own states. We cannot allow that to happen. [Please add your name to my petition and publicly show that we need to keep fighting for Florida. Together, we can defeat Gov. DeSantis and turn Florida blue once more.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97629d41-808e-46a4-a2ef-e9e9d74eaa60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Charlie Crist
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: he said “I represent science”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Fauci is absolutely out of control. He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about fundin
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvgig6cpbji79eh2v9edjedo0mrgt5q6hdfn9o6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4oniehom4c9nc8q78s34mdom7cpimhhnao5gc3i7cp74eho6co366hr3eddmeppjfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75c36elhbbc77m9p6cd70m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaai8kcin1joicn0gv0uoc38dleg2p3humbgk3o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs)** __ [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zurf2nvi17b49c8m6hjuvg9cu05g3ualt7fisomo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs) | |
---
Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _"really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn9ejr9q26lst8p3p8af5l0tpqg3a4n84caqlfro_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs)
__
Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_"I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It’s clear all the power has gotten to his head and it’s about time we send him home.

**If you’re with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you’ll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zflqlp9m0jugu7p3jp8akqqq9t08alq75suk65e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that’s why he’s spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsbb4t5l29u0boftloihr699mmivd7s89lq0lr40_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8sqmofot4ll6f8ovpa722skm22vkrvsc726kp20_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu1jvf2ta2a5u0begodabie1jqqmvtsbiv70igu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhbt64cftjvu1d9k8ge4i8ld1flm1g5oi8o08m8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2c9h2bs)
In Liberty,

name: Kelly Hall
subject: Thank you for making our first #GivingTuesday one for the books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39276859/319114542/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODAwYTk5My1hMjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1VPLuMo9tD3ysuiHo0cEujVFgHXXExQpUk8vjF0cs-w=&emci=14278d40-9453-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d800a993-a253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=561582) | Dear friend, **From each and every one of us at The Fairness Project, I want to personally thank you for your dedication and support this Giving Tuesday. ** When we asked if you would step up and help us defend the ballot measure process as we head into the new year, you did just that. **Thanks to you, not only did we hit our $5,000 goal — _we exceeded it!_ Your generosity helped make our first Giving Tuesday fundraiser one for the books, and we are so grateful for your support.** **Friend: We hope you celebrate this amazing success with us and know just how important you are to our fight to enact progressive policies via the ballot box. ** The hard work is unfortunately never done, but your generosity this Giving Tuesday will go far in 2022 as we continue to run powerful ballot measure campaigns across the country and as we fight back against attacks on the ballot measure process through our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign. **There will be more battles ahead in 2022, but in the meantime, friend, from all of us here at The Fairness Project: Thank you for your generosity and help in reaching our Giving Tuesday goal.** Kelly Hall
_Executive Director
The Fairness Project_
---

clean_body: | | Dear friend, From each and every one of us at The Fairness Project, I want to personally thank you for your dedication and support this Giving Tuesday. Friend: We hope you celebrate this amazing success with us and know just how important you are to our fight to enact progressive policies via the ballot box. The hard work is unfortunately never done, but your generosity this Giving Tuesday will go far in 2022 as we continue to run powerful ballot measure campaigns across the country and as we fight back against attacks on the ballot measure process through our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign. There will be more battles ahead in 2022, but in the meantime, friend, from all of us here at The Fairness Project: Thank you for your generosity and help in reaching our Giving Tuesday goal. name: Elections Alert
subject: Stacey Abrams has joined the race for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Here’s what that means for Georgia and our race --

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39277190/319116490/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA4YmY3NC1hMzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gclXvzPI5tXqNr2A3Yt7_4XNnxSj5l7AdGKdLUo8g2E=) **Stacey Abrams announces she's running for Governor in Georgia** Did you hear the news? Stacey Abrams just announced her candidacy for Governor of Georgia in 2022! Stacey Abrams came within inches of the governorship in 2018. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: ALERT: Swamp Fires Back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
The Washington Post ran the opinion piece below in February of this year, and it looks like someone in Georgia was paying attent
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z44hkbdfl40vu080m3k7476jcsjqdu5dv9k2tm58_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2cjh2bs "Headline") Fellow Patriot: The Washington Post ran the opinion piece below in February of this year, and it looks like someone in Georgia was paying attention. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8gf2tbh8ff1q8t9v7qrcv336faknhkt3c2guhjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2cjh2bs "Headline")Legislators in Georgia - REPUBLICAN legislators no less - the same ones that refused to audit the election--have finished the process of re-drawing the Congressional seats and have added a massive amount of Democrat voters to my new district. They are hoping to get me out of Congress. **They can't beat me, so they are gerrymandering me out of Congress.** They have been planning this all along because I am standing up for you, not for them. _They hate me for it, and they 're never going to stop._ **[And, I hate to admit it, but this time their plan may work unless loyal supporters like you help me raise enough campaign funds to scare them off before the end of this year. I know I've asked for your help before, and I'm thankful that you've stepped up, but I truly need your support of just $25, $50, or $100 before the end of the year.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvf32a11crof3o3pkng0gv1qleb3fukgtqgu4elo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2cjh2bs "And, I hate to admit it, but this time their plan may work unless loyal supporters like you help me raise enough campaign funds to scare them off before the end of this year. I know I’ve asked for your help before, and I’m thankful that you’ve stepped up, but I truly need your support of just $25, $50, or $100 before the end of the year.")** This redistricting was a fool's errand that was led by power-obsessed state legislators. These are Republicans, but they aren't MY kind of Republicans - they are the Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger type of Republicans. I know that Joe Biden's inflation is hurting your family, and everything from filling up your gas tank to filling up the grocery cart is more demanding these days. Still, I need you to do all you can to help me fight back against the RINOs and radical leftists who are helping Biden force socialism upon this great nation. **[_If you supported me before,_ I need you to dig even deeper and do all you can to help me. _If you haven 't stood with me before,_ I need you to step up and help me continue the fight for freedom in the Halls of Congress while Nancy looks for the next way to punish me.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsra4mn49dtpjp03kicrjhlifc49ik3bd7jntreg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2cjh2bs "If you supported me before, I need you to dig even deeper and do all you can to help me. If you haven’t stood with me before, I need you to step up and help me continue the fight for freedom in the Halls of Congress while Nancy looks for the next way to punish me.")** If we allow them to do this, if we allow them to squeeze out any America First candidate they don't like, then everything President Trump stood for is lost. Our nation faces challenging times, and I'm working day and night to fight the radical socialists. **[I need to hear from you today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf95bc6iej670ctdmdl2cgtoe6r3n0dcbflj4ehg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2cjh2bs "I need to hear from you today.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq9oidmmmvn156b9gv9ivsme2aj3odjobu1s75qg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2cjh2bs "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. Every day, I work hard for my constituents and people around this nation who are counting on me to put an end to Biden and Pelosi's tyranny. I will never stop fighting. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcsp38ch4vu0rpoomhqmhgmdojmrnoast840saq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s5jm8or2cjh2bs "Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me.")** Thank you.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: we can't stop fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | |
---

| | Derek, Nearly one year ago, we began the Terry for Virginia campaign on the idea that if we think big and boldly about the challenges facing our Commonwealth, we can provide a better future for every single Virginian and fight for an economy that lifts up everyone. One where every Virginian can get a world-class education, quality, affordable healthcare, and a good-paying job. While we didn't get the outcome we wanted, we should still be proud of what we accomplished. With your generosity and support, we built the largest grassroots army in the history of Virginia politics. Thanks to you, we received over 1.6 million votes in support of our vision to build a stronger, better future for the Commonwealth -- nearly 200,000 more than any Democratic candidate that has run for governor in Virginia’s history. I'm forever grateful for everything you did for Virginia and my campaign. There are truly no words that can describe how meaningful your support and friendship are to me and my family. But we can’t stop fighting. There is too much at stake. Your support for Democratic candidates and campaigns is more critical now than ever before. We must work together to elect Democrats in 2022 and beyond so we can protect the right to vote, defend a woman's right to choose, build thriving public schools, and lead by the common values we all believe in. We absolutely can not let extremists take us back to the days of division and dysfunction that we worked so hard to put behind us. Since its founding in 2014, Common Good has raised and given millions to Democrats in key races at every level of government across Virginia and the United States. With so much on the line for our future, I'm not about to stop pushing for a better Virginia and a better nation, and I need you with me. In the coming days and months, you'll continue to hear directly from candidates and campaigns asking for your support in key races in Virginia and across the country. I hope you'll continue to support them just like you supported me. Serving as the 72nd Governor of Virginia was the highest honor of my life. I will never stop fighting to make our Commonwealth and our country stronger and brighter for all. Thank you, Terry [**P.S. If Democrats are to keep our majority in the House in 2022, right here in Virginia we need to send my friends Elaine Luria, Abigail Spanberger, and Jennifer Wexton back to Congress. clean_body: | | | | | Derek, Nearly one year ago, we began the Terry for Virginia campaign on the idea that if we think big and boldly about the challenges facing our Commonwealth, we can provide a better future for every single Virginian and fight for an economy that lifts up everyone. One where every Virginian can get a world-class education, quality, affordable healthcare, and a good-paying job. While we didn't get the outcome we wanted, we should still be proud of what we accomplished. With your generosity and support, we built the largest grassroots army in the history of Virginia politics. Thanks to you, we received over 1.6 million votes in support of our vision to build a stronger, better future for the Commonwealth -- nearly 200,000 more than any Democratic candidate that has run for governor in Virginia’s history. I'm forever grateful for everything you did for Virginia and my campaign. There are truly no words that can describe how meaningful your support and friendship are to me and my family. But we can’t stop fighting. There is too much at stake. Your support for Democratic candidates and campaigns is more critical now than ever before. We must work together to elect Democrats in 2022 and beyond so we can protect the right to vote, defend a woman's right to choose, build thriving public schools, and lead by the common values we all believe in. We absolutely can not let extremists take us back to the days of division and dysfunction that we worked so hard to put behind us. Since its founding in 2014, Common Good has raised and given millions to Democrats in key races at every level of government across Virginia and the United States. With so much on the line for our future, I'm not about to stop pushing for a better Virginia and a better nation, and I need you with me. In the coming days and months, you'll continue to hear directly from candidates and campaigns asking for your support in key races in Virginia and across the country. I hope you'll continue to support them just like you supported me. Serving as the 72nd Governor of Virginia was the highest honor of my life. I will never stop fighting to make our Commonwealth and our country stronger and brighter for all. Thank you, Terry = Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click. Paid for by Common Good Virginia

Peter,

**Democrats are in TROUBLE.** Yesterday my opponent, Chairman Peter DeFazio of the House Transportation Committee, announced that he is retiring.

It’s clear to even one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress that running for elected office with a “D” next to one’s name comes at one’s own peril.

On Tuesday I woke up running against the 4th longest serving member of the U.S. House. **Tomorrow I’ll wake up with no opponent ... _but that won’t last long._**

**This is the first time since 1986 that Democrat’s in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District will have the opportunity to launch a campaign for the House.**

**And I’ll be waiting for whomever Democrats decide to run against me.**

While Peter DeFazio has decided to call it quits, I’m under no illusion that DEMS will do everything in their power to retain this seat. They will do everything they can to tarnish my name by dragging my reputation through the mud and worse.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Roe v. Wade is in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Friend,
Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard oral argument in the case _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ — one of the most important cases regarding reproductive rights in our lifetime.
A majority of justices made clear that they were skeptical of the original ruling in _Roe v. Wade_.
**Friend, our fundamental rights are under attack.**
And we will continue to see egregious attacks on our fundamental rights as long as the far-right holds a supermajority on the Supreme Court.
But all hope is not lost — Congress has changed the size of the Supreme Court seven times in the past and has the authority to expand the Court once again.
**[Friend, will you join me in calling on Congress to expand the Court? We must protect our reproductive freedom and our democracy. clean_body: Friend, Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard oral argument in the case Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization — one of the most important cases regarding reproductive rights in our lifetime. A majority of justices made clear that they were skeptical of the original ruling in Roe v. Wade. Friend, our fundamental rights are under attack. And we will continue to see egregious attacks on our fundamental rights as long as the far-right holds a supermajority on the Supreme Court. But all hope is not lost — Congress has changed the size of the Supreme Court seven times in the past and has the authority to expand the Court once again. Since Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation last year, I’ve been fighting tooth and nail to expand the Supreme Court and save our democracy from the far-right and their anti-democratic agenda. Earlier this year, I co-introduced the Judiciary Act of 2021 — which is legislation that will expand the Supreme Court for a total of 13 justices. I will not stop fighting until a pro-democracy majority is restored to our nation’s highest court. | Peter,

I know we’ve reached out to you plenty over the last couple of days as we worked toward our November fundraising goal, but **I wanted to borrow a brief moment of your time to thank you sincerely for helping us meet it.**

Meeting yet another fundraising goal confirms for our team and myself that Marylanders believe in the progressive momentum we’re building, and I’m so grateful for your continued support. **To share our appreciation for all that you do, the team and I put together a new playlist to motivate us and fuel our momentum through the end of the year.**

Meeting yet another fundraising goal confirms for our team and myself that Marylanders believe in the progressive momentum we’re building, and I’m so grateful for your continued support. To share our appreciation for all that you do, the team and I put together a new playlist to motivate us and fuel our momentum through the end of the year. You can give it a listen , or let me know what you’re listening to lately by replying to this email! | We still have a long road ahead, and I look forward to having you with us as we fight to deliver paid family leave and affordable childcare, strengthen our schools, take meaningful climate action, and ensure everyone has a fair shot at success – not just those at the top. Together, I know we can create a brighter, more equitable future for all Marylanders. With gratitude, John King | = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . If you would prefer to not get updates from the campaign, please

body:
|
| | |
It's Congressman Dan Crenshaw. I wouldn't be reaching out if it weren't dire. Let me give it to you straight:

Too many patriots ignored my humble plea, and we blew our fundraising goal for November. **That leaves us completely defenseless, underfunded, and TRAILING behind Nancy Pelosi 's National Democrats by MILLIONS.**
---
| | | [GIVE $35 - HELP DAN CATCH UP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP")
---
_**Your contribution has 300% impact until midnight.**_
Last month, we blew our goal because too many true Americans ignored my humble request. So, when the Democrats spent a ton of money attacking Republicans,**we didn 't have enough resources to fight back. **

**Now, we 're being outraised, outspent, and important polls predict us LOSING in some key districts. **

We literally cannot afford to lose support from anyone reading this email. Without your full support, we're doomed. **[Please make a 300% matched donation immediately to avoid falling into a pattern of losing to Biden and the radical left.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "Please make a 300%
matched donation immediately to avoid falling into a pattern of losing to Biden and the radical left.")**
---
| | | [GIVE $35 - HELP DAN CATCH UP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP")
---
_**Your contribution has 300% impact until midnight.**_
Please, it would mean a lot to me and House Republicans.

Thank you,
Congressman Dan Crenshaw

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: This is bad. Really bad.

---
It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "Can I count on
you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please,
rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58922588:JJCISjENh:m:1:3253819041:BA6765FF1CEA35C654EA4D5136251E51:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

body:
We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. |

**Republican State Senator Chuck Edwards just answered Cawthorn's call.**

This week, Senator Edwards made his NC-14 campaign official and instantly became one of the most formidable Republicans in this race. This proves that NC-14 will be among the most competitive races in the country.

We're confident that we can win this, but National Republicans are going to spend MILLIONS to run deceptive TV ads in support of Republicans like Edwards. Their gambit to win the majority hinges on winning this race.

clean_body: | = We have a new opponent, friend. Last month, Madison Cawthorn dropped out of the race for NC-14 after the new district lines gave Democrats a significant edge. In his announcement, he said he has every confidence in the world that the 14th District will send a "patriotic fighter to D.C." -- at least his version of it. Republican State Senator Chuck Edwards just answered Cawthorn's call. This week, Senator Edwards made his NC-14 campaign official and instantly became one of the most formidable Republicans in this race. This proves that NC-14 will be among the most competitive races in the country. We're confident that we can win this, but National Republicans are going to spend MILLIONS to run deceptive TV ads in support of Republicans like Edwards. Their gambit to win the majority hinges on winning this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Team Gash = | = Eric Gash is a teacher, pastor, former professional football player, and high school football coach running to flip NC-14 blue. subject: Critical Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=ba1cbb0044&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | Friends,

This month we are up against a critical end-of-year fundraising deadline. With more challengers entering the race, we need to be well-positioned to enter the new year.

Winning this race will take enough money to get our message to every resident and business in the district. Your support now will help ensure we have the resources to bring a strong voice to Harrisburg, fighting for healthcare reform, improved infrastructure, fully-funded public education, the creation of more family-sustaining union jobs, and policies that address economic resurgence in the district. [**Can you chip in a donation of any amount to**
**help us meet our fundraising deadline?**](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=4b80f78825&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done.

We hope you can make it to our final event of 2021, [a fundraiser at one of my favorite local restaurants, MIXTO](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=d9ca223983&e=3f8e2ea1e3). Please find details below – and share with friends
_Deja_

| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=9bdd8854c6&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Why we need Democrats like Nikki Budzinski
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
There’s more progress that Democrats like Nikki Budzinski and I want to make for working families in Illinois and across the country.
#
Peter,
Last week, I proudly endorsed fellow Springfield resident Nikki Budzinski for Illinois’ 13th District.
I endorsed her because she is a strong candidate who has spent her career in public service or in the labor movement.
She has been working for the same issues that I am dedicated to: paid sick time, raising the minimum wage, and making college more affordable for all families.
**[We work for you, Peter. That’s why I’m asking: Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount to ensure we get more Democrats like Nikki Budzinski elected in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39278048/319121510/-833910006?refcode=dd_em_211202_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U3MDA0NS1hYTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cR1-aZa6spERBJtt4a54K9Me_FTnS1w6wWxf8CtUaJg=)**
There’s more progress that Democrats like Nikki Budzinski and I want to make for working families in Illinois and across the country.
We want to make sure we can help American families deal with everyday challenges.
**[Will you join us and chip in $5 or any amount to protect working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39278049/319121511/-833910006?refcode=dd_em_211202_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U3MDA0NS1hYTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cR1-aZa6spERBJtt4a54K9Me_FTnS1w6wWxf8CtUaJg=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39278050/319121512/-833910006?refcode=dd_em_211202_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U3MDA0NS1hYTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cR1-aZa6spERBJtt4a54K9Me_FTnS1w6wWxf8CtUaJg=)****

clean_body: There’s more progress that Democrats like Nikki Budzinski and I want to make for working families in Illinois and across the country. Peter, Last week, I proudly endorsed fellow Springfield resident Nikki Budzinski for Illinois’ 13th District. I endorsed her because she is a strong candidate who has spent her career in public service or in the labor movement. She has been working for the same issues that I am dedicated to: paid sick time, raising the minimum wage, and making college more affordable for all families. = There’s more progress that Democrats like Nikki Budzinski and I want to make for working families in Illinois and across the country. We want to make sure we can help American families deal with everyday challenges. = My best, Dick Durbin **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: MondaireforCongress.com
subject: Endorse Mondaire Jones for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Hi friend,
In 2020, Mondaire ran a historic campaign centered around empowering working and middle-class families and marginalized communities.
Our efforts last year proved what’s possible for a grassroots campaign when you build a movement that brings folks of all backgrounds together to fight for a better future.
Mondaire was raised in a working-class family and became the first openly gay, Black member of Congress. For him, policy is personal.
Since taking office, Mondaire has championed life-changing legislation for struggling Americans and Axios rated him the most active freshman in Congress across the House and Senate.
From passing the American Rescue Plan to playing a leading role in passing both the bipartisan infrastructure bill and the _Build Back Better Act_ , Mondaire continues to fight for policies that invest in the American people, our infrastructure, and our planet.
As we look ahead to the 2022 midterms, it's clear that Mondaire and other House Democrats will be top targets as Republicans gather support from lobbyists, corporations, and billionaires to propel their efforts to retake control of Congress.
If we want to keep our Democratic majority, then we’ll need all hands on deck to help Mondaire defend his seat. He can’t do it without your support.
_Before the day ends, we’re hoping that we can get 10,000 people to sign on and publicly support Mondaire. This is a quick and simple action, but it will let our team know that we have you and thousands of other supporters that we can count on._

name: Roger Misso
subject: Come on. We can't just LET Army win!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=)

Peter,

Yesterday, we announced our [_**SECOND ANNUAL INTRA-SERVICE RAISE-OFF**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=)! We asked you to show us how much you love your favorite branch of service by _[chipping in](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=)_.

Well, the first day of fundraising results are in, and I've gotta say, as a Navy veteran, I am DISAPPOINTED - Army is out to a COMMANDING lead! Here are the full standings, in order:

1. [_**ARMY**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/NsFMO_avA66fVZOyC7yuXVDC8PgVnO65ArmHzp7YRc0=)
2. [_**NAVY + MARINE CORPS**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/dzYTBjPjPlUyY91w6nbRDgyiqoawVJpxeeO9N_JLjq0=)
3. [_**COAST GUARD**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/b_EEXi-sGEpGTt5d7xUXKBKdoXZJHHBt1iLhA20-uIs=)
4. [_**AIR FORCE**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/-8HOmpKF_qceRqwTj2duIM55N82f0lNyHaRFDbdhy9A=)

Let's go, everybody! [_**Chip in TODAY to help your service family get to the top of the standings.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=)

As a reminder: next Wednesday, December 8th, we will announce the results of the raise-off at an [_**ARMY/NAVY RIVALRY RALLY on Capitol Hill**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=) where we'll be joined by Senators Gary Peters and Patty Murray, Reps. Tim Ryan and Mike Thompson, Missouri Senate candidate Tim Kunce, and dozens of veterans serving in Congress. If you're in DC next Wednesday, you won't want to miss this, so [_**RSVP by clicking here**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=). And, [_**if you give at the Champion level or higher for our event and raise-off, you 'll receive a special gift from our special guests sent right to your front door!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=)

[_**RSVP FOR YOUR DEC 8TH TICKET**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p0_huhQWZP8d660UPlfQYLs2rd8l3yw-fklgIk_Yzcc=/D5fw3_Pl8KNO9NsFoHODt68W1XjI4WUVv2CCVNoCH74=)

Yours in (naval) service,
Roger

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: I Will BAN CRT
body:
| Peter -- The secret is out on Critical Race Theory, and parents are fed up. [New social studies proposals](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkDbcGeTipYGCrzGajuIlN_jaJT-mhnZ8-s0icvLeqiQvjbAcOaJehXZdXFEShjbyM7uwU_4pIfEdeWpXWtyY5Vl-gVu1eZrUUtylyNw9B7dP&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ban_crt&n=1) announced over the summer blatantly adopt CRT as the backbone of the new sets of statewide academic standards. The outcry of implementing Marxism in our educational system was heard loud and clear across the country, resulting in Youngkin’s victory in Virginia and a slew of school board election upsets nationwide. For decades now, the radical left has been waging a slow and insidious war to gain control of our education system. We’ve already seen it take hold in the universities, and now the Minnesota public schools have begun indoctrinating our children as early as kindergarten! Enough is Enough! **Your children’s education is far too important to cede to the radical left.** Florida Governor Ron DeSantis got it right - We need bold decisive action to stop this cancer dead in its tracks. We need to BAN CRT immediately! As your next governor, that is exactly what I’ll do. If you’re tired of politicians making empty promises and failing to safeguard your liberties and your children’s future, there is another choice you can make this election cycle. Stand with me and Demand that the Minnesota Department of Education drops CRT from any and all curricula and academic standards. Sign the petition [here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rEls0UjuaesyDZp4Mf1t4O4&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ban_crt&n=2) if you support taking aggressive action to take back control of our schools from the radical left. The time for playing nice and ‘having a conversation’ with the enemy has long passed. Here in Minnesota and all across the country, conservatives are at an inflection point. We need leaders who understand our values of faith, family, and freedom are worth fighting tooth and nail for. We cannot keep giving the radical left an inch. When it comes to education, that inch becomes ten miles, and we don’t have a lot of ground left. Who is ready to stand with me? Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor www.electneil.com
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
