The outcry of implementing Marxism in our educational system was heard loud and clear across the country, resulting in Youngkin’s victory in Virginia and a slew of school board election upsets nationwide. For decades now, the radical left has been waging a slow and insidious war to gain control of our education system. We’ve already seen it take hold in the universities, and now the Minnesota public schools have begun indoctrinating our children as early as kindergarten! Enough is Enough! Your children’s education is far too important to cede to the radical left. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis got it right - We need bold decisive action to stop this cancer dead in its tracks. We need to BAN CRT immediately! As your next governor, that is exactly what I’ll do. If you’re tired of politicians making empty promises and failing to safeguard your liberties and your children’s future, there is another choice you can make this election cycle. Stand with me and Demand that the Minnesota Department of Education drops CRT from any and all curricula and academic standards. Sign the petition if you support taking aggressive action to take back control of our schools from the radical left. The time for playing nice and ‘having a conversation’ with the enemy has long passed. Here in Minnesota and all across the country, conservatives are at an inflection point. We need leaders who understand our values of faith, family, and freedom are worth fighting tooth and nail for. We cannot keep giving the radical left an inch. When it comes to education, that inch becomes ten miles, and we don’t have a lot of ground left. Who is ready to stand with me? Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor www.electneil.com -=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States

name: Emily  Burns
subject: Pre-Event Mini-Conference w/Jay Bhattacharya and Jodi Shaw (Smith College Whistleblower) 2
body:
Hello!

Still on the fence about making the trip north for our [campaign kick-off event](http://www.reunitedfortheholidays.com/)? Time to get off 😊

The nature of the guest list begged for a conference. So Rational Ground is hosting a pre-event mini-conference on-site from 9:30 – 12:30. The topic is basically, tools to get back to normal. Speakers include **Dr. Jay Bhattacharya** , one of the principal signatories of [The Great Barrington Declaration](https://gbdeclaration.org/); Jodi Shaw, the [Smith College Whistleblower](https://bariweiss.substack.com/p/whistleblower-at-smith-college-resigns); NCLU civil rights lawyer Jenin Younes, and more. Registration for that event is [here](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/rational-ground-in-person-meet-up-tickets-217640888757). This mini-conference is free, and being put on by [Rational Ground](http://www.rationalground.com/) (not affiliated with the campaign).

All of the speakers for that event, will be staying on for [our kick-off event](http://www.reunitedfortheholidays.com/), from 1:00 – 5:00 pm. Register for that [here](http://www.reunitedfortheholidays.com/ "http://www.reunitedfortheholidays.com/"). Our kick off event will be teeming with children, and will truly be a celebration of our march back to normalcy 😊

I hope to see you at one (or both) of the events this weekend!

Sincerely,

Emily Burns

U.S. Congressional Candidate, Massachusetts’ 4th District
[www.emilyburns.vote](http://www.emilyburns.vote/)
Twitter: @Emily_Burns_V

**About Rational Ground:**
Rational Ground formed in response to COVID policy failures. Notably, Rational Ground, and its contributors—all pro-bono—provided much of the data analysis to Scott Atlas that allowed him to provide a reasoned, data-driven pushback against the throw-the-plan-out-the-window, fly-by-the-seat-of-the-pants pandemic policies of Drs. Birx and Fauci. Ultimately, Fauci prevailed, but Atlas’s efforts provided the only real effort to re-establish our public policy response to COVID on foundations of pragmatism, and data-driven decision-making. Many of the people who supported those efforts will be present at this conference, and the subsequent celebration.

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Rhode Islanders need relief from the rising cost of living
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
**Commentary: Rhode Islanders need relief from rising cost of living**

"The state treasurer suggests giving grocery gift cards to households making less than $125,000 a year is one way to support families until prices normalize" | [READ THE OP-ED](https://www.bostonglobe.com/2021/11/30/metro/rhode-islanders-need-relief-rising-costs/)
---
Peter,

Rhode Islanders urgently need relief from the rising cost of living. Right now, even Rhode Islanders with good-paying jobs are getting squeezed by rising prices in food, essential goods and housing - just about everything.

Over the past year, the Consumer Price Index has risen by 6.2% and while prices are increasing, wages are not keeping up. **We need to take action now to help Rhode Islanders keep up with the rising cost of living.**

In addition to taking immediate action to help people buy groceries and toys for the holidays, our campaign has a plan to help Rhode Islanders save money by reducing prescription drug costs, bringing down utility bills, expanding down payment assistance for first-time homebuyers, building more affordable housing, and making child care and higher education more affordable.

[**I'm ready to get to work as Governor to build an economy that works for everyone. You can read my op-ed in the _Boston Globe_ to learn more about my plan to address the rising cost of living. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39278942/319128123/1950738874?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2RiOWE5ZS1hZTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxafr0pi022SJqtG0mS3ObhVoQZyyivPVEvzQkaNLF8=&emci=0c1ea3bb-9453-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=73db9a9e-ae53-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15384964)

Fellow Conservative,

**Democrats are in TROUBLE.** Today my opponent, Chairman Peter DeFazio of the House Transportation Committee, announced that he is retiring.

It’s clear to even one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress that running for elected office with a “D” next to one’s name comes at one’s own peril.

Yesterday I woke up running against the 4th longest serving member of the U.S. House. **Tomorrow I’ll wake up with no opponent ... _but that won’t last long._**

**This is the first time since 1986 that Democrat’s in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District will have the opportunity to launch a campaign for the House.**

**And I’ll be waiting for whomever Democrats decide to run against me.**

While Peter DeFazio has decided to call it quits, I’m under no illusion that DEMS will do everything in their power to retain this seat. They will do everything they can to tarnish my name by dragging my reputation through the mud and worse.

Thank you for being a part of Michael Bennet’s grassroots team. You play a big role in this campaign, so I think it’s important you know the latest on this race: We saw a slump in fundraising last month. _And we get it_ — folks are spending time with their loved ones and shopping for the holidays. Unfortunately our fundraising fell short as a result and with just one month left to go before the midterm election is in full swing, the progress Michael has secured on fighting child poverty, combating climate change, and creating good-paying jobs is on the line. Michael’s opponents have made clear they want to halt the progress he’s made. The National GOP's fundraising has been super-charged to back their final candidate. We have to close the gap in our fundraising to start 2022 on the right foot. That’s why we’re setting a 24-hour goal to close this $15,144 gap. Michael’s work to strengthen our economy and democracy impacts families in Colorado and nationwide. So, we’re asking just 5 supporters from Monroe County to pitch in before our 24-hour deadline. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations, not corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. With your help, we can build the power we need to take on the National GOP and all of Michael’s Republican opponents. subject: shocked and disappointed 👈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58923542:JtbG4jENI:m:1:3253819041:D203C8F990D76B554531F3F3C7709919:r)

name: Mike Collier HQ
subject: Take our Team Collier survey >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Will you take our official Team Collier survey, friend? While Mike's name may be the one on the ticket, our grassroots campaign will always be about folks like you. Period. That's a commitment that Mike takes incredibly seriously, which is why as we enter this next phase of the race — more challenges, more opponents — we wanted to pause for a second to get your thoughts on our campaign strategy so far and what issues matter most to you. [**Will you take our official Team Collier survey? It’ll only take a quick moment (promise)!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39279611/319131489/-1691607341?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211202_PM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTkxNTVlNi1iMjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLs44Ykfn3P_TqsA2NU_YwiqgSwCrBvhY-VRYYO8Oq4=&emci=c8f7c7de-b253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ba9155e6-b253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7689298) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39279612/319131490/-1691607341?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211202_PM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTkxNTVlNi1iMjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLs44Ykfn3P_TqsA2NU_YwiqgSwCrBvhY-VRYYO8Oq4=&emci=c8f7c7de-b253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ba9155e6-b253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7689298)
---
We've had an amazing two months since Mike officially launched this campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and that's because of none other than this grassroots team. But it's only going to get more challenging from here on out. The field is wider, our goals will need to get higher. We’re also running up against the clock ahead of our March 1st primary.
But look, like Mike always says, we're in this together — we mean that. And no matter what, we’re not going to shy away from the toughest and most urgent issues facing our beloved Texas.
[**We've got big decisions coming up for our campaign, and Mike wants to know where you're at before we finalize our strategy for this next phase of the race. clean_body: Soros and Kamala know they’re in trouble. | Peter, I wanted to make sure you heard the news... A brand-new poll shows we’re now LEADING any Democrat challenger by 13 points in the OPEN Senate race that will decide the fate of Kamala’s 50-50 majority! But after shady billionaire George Soros already paid a liberal watchdog and a radicalized prosecutor to try and stop us, you can rest assured he’ll only double down on his attacks. Which is why I’m counting on my army of grassroots patriots to take advantage of this limited-time 200% MATCH to help me double down before we close our books on 2021. With this brand-new poll giving us all the momentum, the Left knows they’re in jeopardy of losing the 1 SEAT needed to FLIP the Senate. But we can’t take this for granted... Soros spent MILLIONS to flip the Senate in 2020 and give Kamala her 50-50 majority. And now that he sees the Senate slipping through his fingers, he’s gearing up to spend millions more to save Kamala’s majority. While Soros continues to funnel mountains of dark money into his shadowy Super PACs, we simply can’t afford to close out the year behind budget. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

body:
In just a few short weeks, my campaign will file our end-of-the-year campaign finance reports. |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9ICWYVhFMQAvHc5NlgAHWbQH81JbIpg9Qb5UwLNTaXJlQOn_bDti41yPrS4w4pAgbuDECO3FSmzHd-or7EoJBdK_bOAn7nKcRZdiAJSCI0BH-88KUIPnftk1q-GcCeOYn9wdC27mJ5CsatmtTOzet2IVQ9zjuaUFLoJHPr-OZp2_hx-VF7R0I_uUv6ipEUOVHmHCZ-t7zd2ZZ6wZ8TJzgV-LQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American - Where has this year gone?

Can you believe it is December already? In just a few short weeks, my campaign will file our end-of-the-year campaign finance reports. This is one of the most critical campaign disclosures of the entire election cycle.

One of the first things the media will do in January is look at the financial reports and see which candidates are raising money. They will only cover the campaigns that are making a serious effort to raise money.

[**So my team and I set a goal to find 500 conservatives who will make at least a $100 contribution.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9ICW48BJvn6YIfRaCKNijjnYJAeh8euYCDfvyAWJSNq4l-AjAT0ysVmeqnfxqbj5FfDk04ltsZ4gcwdRVfw8ou75zv0YUheguJH01ZTh_LiTZE8eLfjGTsyxwVHdcz6g1ofCU_0OI2XfvB9geW8ktIvBmaVeOW1AigXqnlfFVsYM9uReNaU4CtIUkWtCVC4W1T4hDBEPzxNKNrAbWB3H3F2MQ%3D%3D) This kind of grassroots support will go a long way in showing the media that we are a serious campaign.

[**Can I ask you to be one of those 500 donors? Will you make a $100 contribution today?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9ICxHCWExjY4VrsBfMDu9uUV0yEk3w1XprKUr6NZ29dhOSj1D7qgIwCyVRe-wNYzHloRZ5Kf9PkVroLQLUan39HiZxSifOsPjvLRGx0IKa5Ym52MNNJ0pbn3DUUHIElT6ogWGV6PoRyEzEk81Q2xEULd1PFPjcQwKznWZKR28cAKNiBnaZ6SkObiXfigBu1LbGKo-GpToQ665k26Af_Z5v13Q%3D%3D)

[** Donate $100**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9IC-AN9flTht20thPORwBI6rQ4gmosgquFHYrl-tdPykww5pijohBIVWWbkZxv3aeM6XzHQrzpVBLyrRoM8H3jqYp680jn8mMsVz50d73qCdb5rgai4ksCQbmMErGr-btYyS3WWQqDnjuqfhNqk1B4Cdy2smuOTOYqaZkrmUsDRMq0yOcr3grUy_RJu3iGgZQ0IZZBROz1SYXjOaJKeP7HE8w%3D%3D)
**A generous contribution of $100 or more will show that this campaign is ready to ride the Red Wave all the way to Election Day 2022.**

I understand that you might not be in the position this holiday season to make a contribution that large. [**But even a small monthly commitment of $5 or $10 can make a major impact on my campaign.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9ICOBklSsPF7XktkCLjuGG7C27pT0SniNuv3jX2j3MvDpmNd1jpRTf-uYYeN67_qsb883IMqAl16CaChzBcG51jBwy-hiVX-zJPb5yVAYQ68pifC5BetE3H_XRzAKrRydXTLJ2tka1-mTV9GWI_qKjc0ZLIJXKHFjDk2AyBJFY-vWV2QT2sSaev0VdWkynohl3_PDGAldjlXaCwmpkTwd7pZg%3D%3D)

These monthly contributions help us plan our budget for the next 11 months.

[** make a monthly contribution**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9ICrLXf2vdQz9gPqYjVKzQs34SbWNTQ4WgtbJXF-EAnP-woUf8Z9KLACE0Jg2yX472F9k4WuNKMZJ-vsBEzOlx9_TVMyCTfUbicSVn-ZaBgNE1RJkUk_LcGzCEkOP9VsQr_d1CAd_L_eFAPqJXEwB_z6k_FCWxhdQgiDiH4jXinl_R5HbvYRDTi-Or-Pyk38DwatnyHYKxJRshhI9BmMQlyFw%3D%3D)
[**I know that the holidays can be a busy time with many distractions, so please take a moment to contribute immediately.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9IC52J1l493mc-m1FGdre1jZ_WOvFevn6uSmkygVfzBe8o7MaC30Bi3Jliv_OycP8rEQJ3Im1etnYHHOhwjhByxRQM1hwQkSgDHVGJVAcRgbhDX_J2Eaegc8ulDZE1U43AqsnoNzfgB_3D5s5fsxdX1Va4i5FI7qw_GcZPbE7G9e60adR5uY94aQnSg5dUye-tqeIHBuFgghJ2FZjPToT-9uw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S. As I travel around the state of California, I see so many Californians fighting to restore their constitutional rights. It is becoming evident to me that 2022 will be a good year for Republicans. 2010 was the year of the Tea Party, but 2022 will be the year of the Parent Party.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9ICTetZCW_bttVGF9QXNSjHgcH4l7C5fm6xEpUPgxktaCZQKsS8-_8Qu_XXrdSPNLIIyahyxQAXRAlMSXFdPsUBMgBAhTMG3dgzeY27sJk-Z3eiNP7MLutIC53Timf1iNx8R0vCyV3uzMa6lJUJA0-GZojiJ5bqfcTQVheW9odeBbpxDdk0StrcfxvYKeQqvhI52dEtAeFkABD_1TEKWzeoDA%3D%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=642d9126ef7f455eba89bec5a6bd585e&_e=0YhXh7p9D_QRjy3YtBZeW-JpPbWwcU6LAtjCMmg2OJ_wGrKztn-Q1ILRNUqlBZxFcHWZI-9fAhVsm39fVwIrYV_49DOx_ZK1_RJQaVD0KveO6gyVeCUn10Dzc9Z_o9ICNx8YiqcK_JVIjjbFZUlaJjHC8JJFRnoVqcww6rM3grdELY1KceGyCdyq3PvzPbDstTPWfQyCBUVONg3X9VVJhTx4Sdmu08FZHOcvXt3cMSsUnHBE7PA1JeuBMVhMKZ7Nk-J4pxFDVv35bRiB-nY8UcxPhbBFWlGezoPN7QRjZ_R_rS0qLyOlE9HKI_g6uehTJ6vcrDf87vdxi1LnsM5OOQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO54G2d331NgKOSy20qAJ4-yIK4Y0_hCjbUfTbwKx7hLAqzhxd_k5Xs81fRWR1bbpn9t_keODoGcCa-OP0KO4uxV3tXG9zOIEI72ZjqcHXPzKdscEcNCFaW-PurpJHahCErl2aCGdbvwbv4hbXkeatzB2LU89O6NFPdJuawvTTyoTM3eFK_EYA27Sm7ucBcKjvRUDoDKIfAToqDVyXjUUMGYQ%3D%3D)

Peter - Where has this year gone?

Can you believe it is December already? In just a few short weeks, my campaign will file our end-of-the-year campaign finance reports. This is one of the most critical campaign disclosures of the entire election cycle.

One of the first things the media will do in January is look at the financial reports and see which candidates are raising money. They will only cover the campaigns that are making a serious effort to raise money.

[**So my team and I set a goal to find 500 conservatives who will make at least a $100 contribution.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO52zlEeu2BZczclEXksBB1k8Vd6OkUlykfWkL6FGS14YJc7YEbjtGtWtItqj7wMKAM_385xlzTFTmZ4mih7HkQKoNi4VnEP_Cs9CnTiZ51CuYuxDNu9LvqFM1VrtnTXNGo5heNA3fLwxZU9bB-D6lRD5X2JQ-GjCU5W6Yc8O0KljoDcEE4d2B3hWdNufkKkNLyf47SmOxg5E8n9HilCOWgRw%3D%3D) This kind of grassroots support will go a long way in showing the media that we are a serious campaign.

[**Can I ask you to be one of those 500 donors? Will you make a $100 contribution today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO55x4TQTY79jPMFJWTb8bSr5S4_CpemOCceEC4qVn0GfaRhI-WZXxc1KxqrxAVX3D2QhikLmL9vBwCees0mC6kZCzNiZoYVY5ln37HQjp42ft60Uvjjn4DviWxQrxIlTvioUSqXH2k3khLWDBsuWB7JsWAGkvV1NFbpy0xWerld75uOFAW3V1SqhFlykWRcLlnIiOBK7kp2vfsKA-wExnsaw%3D%3D)

[** Donate $100**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO5q6Y2XUjMl3d9cLhK6kKg_W2eDjWzLsCzvjNH6Z_02s-QyELpxSi5T7hUf9sjm-1PYRhHgP_hkHfc-tqv9qqpv1y6zJW_Ndcg7Ek7ku57Rn2gf2yWqhgHqRBMq12X00cObwqZbtF9c4G7fx-9tcLjNBP_NZx9zU_GoKUBphHF8yY1OvvZFD1U_ri_k0qJls0oPinEcamPCM4ruTHugagu1Q%3D%3D)
**A generous contribution of $100 or more will show that this campaign is ready to ride the Red Wave all the way to Election Day 2022.**

I understand that you might not be in the position this holiday season to make a contribution that large. [**But even a small monthly commitment of $5 or $10 can make a major impact on my campaign.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO5oL_oxmnafU_byhlRQ98PY0pc8z_uYZBMFI1K88T5CKRBCcALWPcQ4hX-x9QnlzEDjEASOjFqtBtLREMhNCZOpRNSto5CSRm3HuNzUMhZZYq1EphybY4ahO8mjLrgOVSg_pxyDYmeUo-PTayUGG7lktcySQtOsmJ5JZ8wehLDohuXzABmg88ReWHbXTumh_pCpVLwGohP8LYawlS8hdoaiA%3D%3D)

These monthly contributions help us plan our budget for the next 11 months.

[** make a monthly contribution**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO5teRrWA8rLPB9c7RY4hxB_wR0jizf-L6cpvocryMIOg1wGdZAgXr2KCgQwk47gDmvAqyDy32dn41_ouU24EgM67wrnygkUl4TDuZLCrCe1Rt9SegLqZeVYE5gYkhi7DHoOVbbK1IfsLf1baBAsfjcQIy8R5zDSib0gYMFponhb-vwz4_H1KlMC2SSsfKyj10Ns1aoM1bbg3qcRxazoxo9HQ%3D%3D)
[**I know that the holidays can be a busy time with many distractions, so please take a moment to contribute immediately.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO5xD-rcTZqCF3-AzFVeZcHyF4bop6Y3V8fEGibQlR1Po3nwEfC5z43Ir_WtqnvAvpswDDudvLOz3gNlgtWWy2HyeRaNw8rXMEptVNpmWFg5CJY8NbJO33WYSKMdVuQgys266Qnv1cDVbiwuGMn4BPmog9bEO-ZzNeqw8XJQhy-1KL1gB95EshLAwu4qdPlfn-FnzYYI2UVLb0PJAZ7IggDEA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S. As I travel around the state of California, I see so many Californians fighting to restore their constitutional rights. It is becoming evident to me that 2022 will be a good year for Republicans. 2010 was the year of the Tea Party, but 2022 will be the year of the Parent Party.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=80c095d674e541379b0ed3203b5675b8&_e=zaNBaqZQA4nYbZtRZNXNU8G9W2DVKafMjGTTz3YLmOZIyEyUB-d0WxEY_4UrE0vI1L3hWuDqeAmUbFwrGQAsTfFyf04X1pg4ogjQazGDkbP5W6PvRtc6lrug6UUa7BO5d8WMRsAyRExkG00EF2gB0p-ToWZIhGsxjM1FtZez7ZOwCIlT1H8L0fBqPq9pVsiIQxWSWr1a1e5SyjZzsBETIUDS879mCy8TGSAz-18pr_0Cn3yBECBDEaUDlDWa0K2wcnfBslMeA6DbVvzTJzCxmViFUw4m86j-RI3pGNRaxzJ2bUJLkqA3Op4Oon9odZw0pAXS2yyUxlvmgKu-Hu53RA%3D%3D)

Peter,

Throughout his career, Senator Ron Johnson has spent his time telling lies, spreading misinformation, and repeating conspiracy theories. **It takes a lot to be America’s worst Senator, but Ron Johnson has done it.**

Yesterday, on World AIDS Day, Ron Johnson said Fauci “overhyped” AIDS just like he did with COVID.

To all those whose lives have been affected by AIDS or COVID, do not let this Senator’s horrible words diminish what you went through. We need a change in Wisconsin, and it starts at the ballot box in 2022.

**Wisconsin needs a Senator, not a side-show.** Ron Johnson continues to embarrass Wisconsin on the national stage, and no matter how radical he is, National Republicans will always rush to his defense.

It takes a lot to be America’s worst Senator, but Ron Johnson has done it. Yesterday, on World AIDS Day, Ron Johnson said Fauci “overhyped” AIDS just like he did with COVID. To all those whose lives have been affected by AIDS or COVID, do not let this Senator’s horrible words diminish what you went through. We need a change in Wisconsin, and it starts at the ballot box in 2022. Wisconsin needs a Senator, not a side-show. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff=20Cozzens=20for=20Congress?=
subject: WMUR: Cozzens calls on Kuster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COZZENS FOR CONGRESS]( "PAID FOR BY COZZENS FOR CONGRESS")
body:
Today, I called out Ann Kuster for her support of Joe Biden's mandates. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a5f5bf2e8ed8/wmurcozzens-calls-on-kuster?e=d96869e887)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw this article from WMUR. We called out Ann Kuster for her silence over Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates and her donations from big pharmaceutical companies like Pfizer and Johnson & Johnson.

While Kuster relies on Big Pharma to fund her campaign, we are building a New Hampshire campaign funded by the conservative grassroots.

[If you can, please chip in $10 today to help us beat Ann Kuster.](https://jeffcozzens.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bcab25df2dbb2f241da1b7c2&id=4832e2697c&e=d96869e887)

Best,

Jeff Cozzens
Conservative Republican
Candidate for Congress, NH-02
---
|
---
|
## **NH Primary Source: Cozzens calls on Kuster to say if she supports or opposes Biden vaccine mandate**
By: John DiStaso
[WMUR](https://jeffcozzens.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bcab25df2dbb2f241da1b7c2&id=afff699e6d&e=d96869e887)
---
| **MANDATE ISSUE.** Republican 2nd District U.S. House candidate Jeff Cozzens is calling on Democratic U.S. Rep. Annie Kuster to say whether she supports President Joe Biden’s proposed mandate for health care workers at facilities that receive federal Medicare or Medicaid funding. Cozzens joined Gov. Chris Sununu in praising a federal court order issued Monday that temporarily blocked the Biden mandate from taking effect. Kuster has made it clear that she supports Biden’s vaccine-or-testing mandate for employees of businesses with more than 100 workers, but she has not yet said if she supports the mandate for health care workers. The influential New Hampshire Health Care Association came out in support of the Biden proposal in August. **But Cozzens said, “While nursing homes were on the brink of closing, Ann Kuster was silent.** **“I’m thankful that Governor Sununu and Attorney General John Formella pushed back against this unconstitutional mandate.** **“It’s clear that Kuster puts her orders from Washington Democrats and special interest donors like Pfizer ahead of Granite State seniors.”** “While my family and I are vaccinated and I encourage others to consider this option as well, it should be a personal choice made between you and your health care provider. **Our message is clear: Washington vaccine mandates have no place in New Hampshire.”** Cozzens campaign said, and New Hampshire Primary Source independently confirmed through the Federal Election Commission, that **Kuster has received about $20,000 from political action committees associated with Johnson & Johnson and Pfizer since 2013.** The Kuster camp declined to comment on the attack by Cozzens.
---
| |
---

A group of far-right Republicans recently introduced a bill that would **PROHIBIT** all federal funding for one of NPR’s critical funders, threatening a news organization that has brought truthful, non-profit journalism to Americans for _decades._

Republicans want to tear down, defund, or delegitimize EVERY trusted news organization that threatens ultra-conservative outlets like Fox or OAN -- and that's why we URGENTLY need Democrats like you to speak up.

body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39280249/319134157/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_na_20211202thankyou_JM_openers_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGYzYTE0NC1iNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lU7_JpjGoR-OfF4twdPPi4bid2OmBjtIBK-X7tZFqvk=)
---
THANK YOU, Peter.
Because of your support, our campaign continues to push full steam ahead. With 2022 just around the corner, there’s no question that the urgency is mounting — but thanks to the strong grassroots support we’ve gathered in just a few short months since launching this campaign, we’re prepared.
**And you’re a central part of that.** Whether you’ve given $5 or $500, or even if you’ve just read our emails and passed them along to like-minded Tennesseans who are ready for change — it’s all so important to what we’re trying to build, and I’m grateful.
That said, the toughest part of this race is still yet to come, so buckle up! Together, we’ll reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship.
Thanks again.
Dr. Martin

name: Ann Roe
subject: I am angry and sickened
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39280254/319134217/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUzODU2Zi1iNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-dhM7_IUMZTEKUhRANx3mcm3lFqkLCY4QZ4OzXGzig=&emci=2c00e70f-af53-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a753856f-b653-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15639879)

Hi,

We don't have any time to waste --

**Any minute now, the Supreme Court is going to release a decision that could overturn Roe v. Wade.**

Wisconsin is one of the 8 states that _still_ has a law in place banning any abortion -- from 1849, long before Roe was decided in 1973. By failing to repeal this law, our state has left the health of our women in the hands of a partisan court that couldn't care less about our livelihood.

**[A woman's right to healthcare is not debatable, negotiable, or political. We can't let the GOP take this from us. Rushing a donation of $5 will help us stop Wisconsin Republicans from keeping this law on the books.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39280255/319134218/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211202_WIban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUzODU2Zi1iNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-dhM7_IUMZTEKUhRANx3mcm3lFqkLCY4QZ4OzXGzig=)**

And let me be clear -- **I am angry and sickened that we still have to fight for this basic right.** We've known that this is the Republican's long game for a while now - they haven't been shy about that. Even Bryan Steil has stated that he is "against a woman's right to her own reproductive freedom."

What's more, we all know Bryan Steil won't stand up to his party members -- on this issue, or any other.

**[We need Representatives in office that will champion womens' rights -- not remove them. If the right to choose is important to you, we need you to chip in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39280256/319134225/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211202_WIban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUzODU2Zi1iNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-dhM7_IUMZTEKUhRANx3mcm3lFqkLCY4QZ4OzXGzig=)**

Many people are terrified of what this decision can bring. Low income and minority women are the most likely to seek an abortion. Taking this right away from us is nothing short of an effort to continue the cycle of poverty and systemic racism that **we will not allow.** It's disgusting that a 172 year old law could strip away our ability to make decisions about our bodies. That's not the world I want for my daughter, or for any other woman.

**Remember that this isn't over. We will not stop fighting for the right to choose. They may win this battle, but we WILL win this war.**

In solidarity,

\-- Ann Roe [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39280257/319134232/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211202_WIban&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUzODU2Zi1iNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-dhM7_IUMZTEKUhRANx3mcm3lFqkLCY4QZ4OzXGzig=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39280258/319134240/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211202_WIban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUzODU2Zi1iNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-dhM7_IUMZTEKUhRANx3mcm3lFqkLCY4QZ4OzXGzig=)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2c00e70f-af53-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/a753856f-b653-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzUzODU2Zi1iNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-dhM7_IUMZTEKUhRANx3mcm3lFqkLCY4QZ4OzXGzig=&id=117463758). PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
PO Box 1075
Janesville, WI 53547

name: MattandCynthiaforRI.com
subject: HAPPENING NOW: Sleep out at the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_NOA_AC_20211202_AM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=293%2E43343%2Eb21oT5 ]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

Team, we’re so proud.

On Tuesday night, Cynthia and Matt organized a powerful protest to bring
attention to the ongoing housing crisis in Rhode Island.

Cynthia and Matt, along with housing advocates, activists, and other RI
Political Co-op members are sleeping outside the Capitol until they are
sure that our government has addressed the homelessness crisis and no one
will freeze to death this winter.

[2]Cynthia with advocates in front of the state house confronted by Police
officers

Right now, Rhode Island faces an unprecedented crisis of homelessness, and
Governor McKee and the rest of the political establishment have an
obligation to address it immediately. They could do so by spending just
one percent of the $1.1 billion allocated to Rhode Island by the American
Rescue Plan.

But they refuse to act — and with hundreds of Rhode Islanders who are
unhoused and already suffering in below-freezing temperatures — sitting on
more than a billion dollars as his constituents sleep outside is
unacceptable.

A Governor’s top responsibility is to protect their constituents, and both
Cynthia and Matt aren’t backing down until unhoused families are protected
and we ensure that no one freezes to death this winter.

Cynthia knows first-hand the struggles that unhoused families go through.
It’s personal for her, because she was unhoused briefly with her daughter,
and was fortunate enough to stay with friends while she was in between so
they could find a place to live.

The establishment has the power to stop this crisis, right now. Which is
why Cynthia and Matt will refuse to leave until Governor McKee and the
rest of the political establishment who control our state address this
emergency immediately.

Besides the radio silence from Governor McKee and Lt. Governor Matos, the
only response we’ve seen from the state government is to call the Capitol
police on Cynthia, Matt, and the other advocates to threaten them with
arrest.

[3]Cynthia with advocates in front of the state house confronted by Police
officers

But Matt and Cynthia aren’t backing down, and they are still in front of
the Capitol today, demanding immediate relief for people experiencing
homelessness so that unhoused families can survive this winter. They’ll be
there as long as it takes.

We’ll keep you posted on our progress, but for immediate updates, [ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2914?t=1004&akid=293%2E43343%2Eb21oT5 ]you
can follow Cynthia on Twitter and send along your own words of
encouragement!

Onward,

Team Matt and Cynthia

P.S. Want even more up-to-the-minute updates from Cynthia as she demands
action at the Capitol? Turn on the “notify” button to receive an alert
every time she tweets!

clean_body: [ ]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island Team, we’re so proud. On Tuesday night, Cynthia and Matt organized a powerful protest to bring attention to the ongoing housing crisis in Rhode Island. Cynthia and Matt, along with housing advocates, activists, and other RI Political Co-op members are sleeping outside the Capitol until they are sure that our government has addressed the homelessness crisis and no one will freeze to death this winter. [2]Cynthia with advocates in front of the state house confronted by Police officers Right now, Rhode Island faces an unprecedented crisis of homelessness, and Governor McKee and the rest of the political establishment have an obligation to address it immediately. They could do so by spending just one percent of the $1.1 billion allocated to Rhode Island by the American Rescue Plan. But they refuse to act — and with hundreds of Rhode Islanders who are unhoused and already suffering in below-freezing temperatures — sitting on more than a billion dollars as his constituents sleep outside is unacceptable. A Governor’s top responsibility is to protect their constituents, and both Cynthia and Matt aren’t backing down until unhoused families are protected and we ensure that no one freezes to death this winter. Cynthia knows first-hand the struggles that unhoused families go through. It’s personal for her, because she was unhoused briefly with her daughter, and was fortunate enough to stay with friends while she was in between so they could find a place to live. The establishment has the power to stop this crisis, right now. Which is why Cynthia and Matt will refuse to leave until Governor McKee and the rest of the political establishment who control our state address this emergency immediately. Besides the radio silence from Governor McKee and Lt. Governor Matos, the only response we’ve seen from the state government is to call the Capitol police on Cynthia, Matt, and the other advocates to threaten them with arrest. [3]Cynthia with advocates in front of the state house confronted by Police officers But Matt and Cynthia aren’t backing down, and they are still in front of the Capitol today, demanding immediate relief for people experiencing homelessness so that unhoused families can survive this winter. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Please help me save Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, after hearing oral arguments in a case challenging Mississippi's extreme abortion ban, a majority of conservative Supreme Court justices appear likely to significantly weaken reproductive freedoms or let states erode them altogether.
This is appalling, and it's scary. When I served in the Iowa House, I was horrified to see legislators playing doctor and controlling women's health care decisions in our state. I'm equally horrified to see the U.S. Supreme Court doing the same. To those across the country who would be impacted by this potential blow to Roe v. Wade, I want you to know that I'm with you. I fought for our right to choose in the statehouse in Iowa and in Congress, and I will do the same as the next U.S. senator for Iowa.
**I also want you to know I am more resolved than ever to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and pass legislation in Congress that will protect our right to choose.**
You see, Sen. Grassley has tried to overturn Roe v. Wade and erode reproductive justice for his entire career. Not only that, but as the former chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, he was instrumental in ramming through the Trump-appointed justices who expressed hostility to abortion rights just yesterday. It is no exaggeration to say that Sen. Grassley has a direct role in putting Roe v. Wade on life support.
But, Peter, there's hope: We may not be able to depend on the courts to protect our right to choose, but Congress has the power to pass legislation that would codify Roe v. Wade into law – enshrining a woman's right to choose, no matter what, at the federal level. **That's why I'm counting on this team to rise to this moment and join me in protecting our constitutional right to choose. I've put this petition together and need 5,000 signatures before midnight tonight. Will you add your name?**
[**Please, add your name to demand Congress take action to enshrine a woman's right to choose into law.**** In times like these, we've got to band together and fight with everything we've got. I'm not giving up, but I can't win without strong grassroots support from people like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39280759/319136391/-1469736129?code=jtk468-fr-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fabby4iowa-grassroots-action&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjliODE2NC1iODUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGZ8kxS8X9vYNgjpt2IWq_UvfMdUlu8zo9OgHBtM4uo=&emci=091397f7-f652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=229b8164-b853-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13784334)

body:
I Am Asking That You Would Take A Moment And Pray For Me Over the next several days, I have a few very important meetings and decisions to make that
| | |
---
## I Am Asking That You Would Take A Moment And Pray For Me
---
Over the next several days, I have a few very important meetings and decisions to make that can be significant game changers. When I decided to run for the US Senate in Oklahoma there were 3 things that I asked for and continue to ask for:
1\. _Pray For Me_
2\. _Spread The Message Through Social Media & etc..._
3\. _Financially Support The Campaign_ This is a specific email request that you would take a moment and pray for me. Pray that I would have **FAVOR, WISDOM & DIRECTION** over the next several days. I believe there is _power in prayer_ and that is why I am asking you to pray. Our movement is a miracle itself and I believe we will continue to see miracles. **The Best Is Yet To Come!** Thank you in advance for your prayers,

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Can you please sign my petition telling my colleagues in the Senate we must pass legislation protecting a woman’s right to choose and reproductive health care?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The ability to make your own health care decisions — including whether or not to have an abortion — is a cornerstone of reproductive health care
#

Friends —
The ability to make your own health care decisions — including whether or not to have an abortion — is a cornerstone of reproductive health care. I will always fight to make sure Arizonans can make that decision for themselves.
_Roe vs. Wade_ is the law of the land.
But just yesterday the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case called _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ that is the biggest threat to women’s reproductive health care in decades.
So let me be clear: Congress must pass legislation that codifies _Roe vs. Wade_ as the law of the land and guarantees women the right to choose an abortion. While this case is being considered, all of us need to make our voices clear. So, I’m asking:
[**Can you please sign my petition telling my colleagues in the Senate that we must pass legislation protecting access to reproductive health care?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/roe_petition?source=em211202-1-15&t=1&akid=1743%2E6688874%2E0sk9zH)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/roe_petition?source=em211202-1-15&t=2&akid=1743%2E6688874%2E0sk9zH)**
Women have the right to choose. And I am going to stand up to defend that right against those who seek to take it away.
All my best,
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1743%2E6688874%2E0sk9zH).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

subject: Kim Schrier needs our support to beat the GOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
A new conservative challenger just announced their campaign in WA-8.
#
Peter,
My friend, Congresswoman Kim Schrier, has been working hard to bring Washington state’s values to Congress and fight for the issues families care about -- affordable health care, quality public education, and an economy that works for everyone.
Kim is the kind of strong, Democratic leader we need in the other Washington, which is why she’s a top target for Republicans who are looking to roll back Democrats’ progress -- in fact, just this week Reagan Dunn joined the already crowded Republican primary race against her.
**[Our Democratic majority and our progress for Washington state is on the line. Will you make a $5 contribution now to reelect Kim Schrier and keep Washington state blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39281034/319137913/1291013622?refcode=pm_em_211202_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTJmMmZhNy1iYTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bU2grBhWTF33z8fXrjEdfJ93837z-jQu-yyeSYFz9-0=)**

Patty

subject: Another Break in the Supply Chain
body:
Georgia is hurting |

| Friend, Georgia families and businesses are hurting. The supply chain is preventing parents from buying Christmas gifts for their children, and shop owners from providing products for their customers.

Joe Biden created this mess, and instead of doing anything to fix it, his White House spokespeople are gaslighting the American people, denying the existence of hyperinflation, and stating that the people of our country can afford to pay more for food, gas, housing, clothes, furniture, raw materials, etc.

My wife and I run a small business right here in McDonough. We’ve had to close our doors on multiple occasions because we can’t keep up with the massive shortages in labor and goods brought on by this idiotic administration.

Georgians want Biden to GET OUT OF OUR WAY and stop ruining our economy. We need to take back the House of Representatives and send _**_reliable_**_ Conservatives to clean up this mess.

Our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access.

Friends --

Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that has the potential to overturn _Roe v. Wade._

And because the Republicans were able to stack the Court with far-right leaning justices, there is a very real chance it could happen. **If it does, abortion could become illegal here in Wisconsin.**

Abortion rights are too important to allow them to be decided by the whim of the Supreme Court. They need to be codified into law so they can be protected for people who need them forever.

But our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. And if he is elected, he will try to take away those rights.

**Brad will always fight to protect and codify abortion access. So at a time so perilous for abortion rights, it’s more important than ever to send him to Congress. But he needs your help to get there.**

clean_body: Our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. | = Friends -- Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that has the potential to overturn Roe v. Wade. And because the Republicans were able to stack the Court with far-right leaning justices, there is a very real chance it could happen. If it does, abortion could become illegal here in Wisconsin. Abortion rights are too important to allow them to be decided by the whim of the Supreme Court. They need to be codified into law so they can be protected for people who need them forever. But our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. And if he is elected, he will try to take away those rights. Brad will always fight to protect and codify abortion access. So at a time so perilous for abortion rights, it’s more important than ever to send him to Congress. But he needs your help to get there. = | = = = = = = Thanks for everything, Pfaff for Congress | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

Friend,

The House of Representatives just passed Joe Biden’s******Build Back Broke** socialist takeover of America. This bill even included AOC’s Green New Deal, which will DESTROY the American Energy Industry.

It gets worse. In the midst of the worst border crisis in American History, this bill will give amnesty to millions of illegal aliens and reward them for breaking our laws. This bill will forever change our country and destroy the America that we know and love.

This American nightmare bill must be stopped. We must elect a Congresswoman that will fight back against this radical Administration, not join them in partisan witch hunts.

This is why I am running for Congress. I am unwilling to sit back and watch America be destroyed from within. We can and will take this country back, but I need your help.

clean_body: | | | | We must stop this bill Friend, The House of Representatives just passed Joe Biden’s****Build Back Broke socialist takeover of America. This bill even included AOC’s Green New Deal, which will DESTROY the American Energy Industry. It gets worse. In the midst of the worst border crisis in American History, this bill will give amnesty to millions of illegal aliens and reward them for breaking our laws. This bill will forever change our country and destroy the America that we know and love. This American nightmare bill must be stopped. We must elect a Congresswoman that will fight back against this radical Administration, not join them in partisan witch hunts. This is why I am running for Congress. I am unwilling to sit back and watch America be destroyed from within. We can and will take this country back, but I need your help. The American Dream is on the line. This is our last chance. I cannot do this without you. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Thank you & an update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
With the stakes as high as they are, I'm so thankful for your continued support.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/P482Spa0DRtD/VWZ2OWhIQUN1ZlhYTEZsVG5wZWlkdWU4S1FZZURFVVZ1STZIczlXWExqUTNqUHdCYzB5cFJPSTM3ZnhsOG53MW9BajkrNDNWOWhDTmR6Vk1zT1dHYVBKZGZEYTBrMUVwaW04U3AydkUvbE09S0/UFg2a0NvRzdZck5aUEZ0Q1VPWE95aTg3OURIVVllanhlZThyVGl1TlRaMD0S1) Friend -- I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. I am so grateful for our supporters who chipped in to our November end-of-month goal to build our movement to avert all-out climate disaster. **While we have so much work left to do to fight for the future of our species, with folks like you on this team, I am more confident than ever that we will meet this make-or-break moment with imagination, optimism, and action.** I also wanted to let you know that, as of midnight on Friday, December 10th, I won't be able to fundraise for two whole months -- all while Big Oil continues to raise nearly limitless sums and spends millions pushing their anti-climate agenda. This state-mandated fundraising "freeze" will be another big fundraising deadline for our movement, so I will be reaching out a few more times ahead of then to share more about the gravity of this moment and to ask for your continued support. Fellow Conservative,

**Do you support the inherent right to life?**

I know I do.

Radicals, like my Democratic opponent, have voted in lockstep with Bernie Sanders and Chuck Schumer to further their pro-abortion agenda. **That includes heinous acts like late-term abortions, which no one in their right mind could defend.**

I need you to join my team to help conservatives take back the Senate and stop the radical pro-abortion agenda.

clean_body: | | | | | Hi folks -- Governor Steve Sisolak here. Due to state law, our campaign has been under a fundraising blackout for our special legislative session on redistricting. And I’ll be honest: we’ve lost major momentum due to this blackout with less than a year to go before Election Day -- especially since my six MAGA opponents have undoubtedly used this time to stockpile their war chests. That’s why I’m letting you know personally, that I’m hitting the ground running. I’m setting a relaunch goal for this campaign of $25,000 and I need your help to get there. | | | | | | | | | | | | | SIX Republican opponents are vying to unseat me and roll back all the progress this team has made for Nevada. But with the help of dedicated supporters like you, I know this team can overcome anything. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with me, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. subject: Submit your comment against the vax mandate TODAY!
body:
| |

**You have until December 6th to leave a comment opposing the proposed OSHA rule mandating the Covid vaccine (also known as an Experimental Biological Product) for all employees of businesses with 100+ employees.**

subject: Team, time and again, you all come through for me.

body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39281540/319140528/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Zjg4OGNiZC1iYzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbAd_rr-9ggz-vsByElJA7YWC4f5raiqLeKjAQ0v8r4=)

Good news, team,

**I'm ecstatic to say we successfully met our November fundraising goal -- and it's all thanks to this incredible team.**

Friend, I always like to thank supporters like you personally. Because it's not always an easy decision to give your hard-earned money to the campaigns and causes you believe in.

But time and again, this team has come through for our movement to flip New York's 1st, and that's really meaningful to me. As we begin to close the door on 2021 and look forward to 2022, I just wanted to tell you directly that I am so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

clean_body: | = Good news, team, I'm ecstatic to say we successfully met our November fundraising goal -- and it's all thanks to this incredible team. Friend, I always like to thank supporters like you personally. Because it's not always an easy decision to give your hard-earned money to the campaigns and causes you believe in. But time and again, this team has come through for our movement to flip New York's 1st, and that's really meaningful to me. As we begin to close the door on 2021 and look forward to 2022, I just wanted to tell you directly that I am so grateful to have your support. Thank you, Kara Hahn P.S. If you'd like to be a little more involved in the work my campaign is doing to flip this seat, you can follow us on or to get the latest updates! | I know you’ve received a lot of emails from myself and my campaign in the last few days, and I appreciate you bearing with us as we fought hard to hit our November fundraising goal.

On top of that appreciation, **I’m proud to report that we hit our fundraising goal because of supporters like you!**

Your continued support shows me, our campaign, and, perhaps most importantly, Elise Stefanik, that we are a force for change in Upstate New York. Elise, with her reliance on enormous corporate donors and right-wing extremist contributors, raises a lot – she’s reported $2.6 million in the bank.

That means your contributions are all the more impactful as we battle both against a figure who endangers our democracy, but also in the name of a brighter future for the North Country – one where honorable leadership and dedication to our community guides all we do.

So, thank you again for accompanying us on this journey, and I can’t wait to keep battling alongside you. body:
If Roe is overturned, states will be able to completely ban reproductive healthcare. We must flip Texas and protect Texans from a rogue GOP legislature and GOP’s tailor-made SCOTUS. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39281777/319141378/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTliZGJkYy1iZDUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=woEvaqnwRtF1xbjbEkgzgrh0pSa5fpadPbhF3UhD8Pg=)
**_NPR:_ Roe v. Wade's future in doubt

[**If _Roe_ is overturned, states will be able to completely ban reproductive healthcare. We must flip Texas and protect women’s rights from a rogue GOP legislature. Chip in $5, $15, or even $35 today to back Donna Imam's grassroots campaign for Congress >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39281778/319141379/1898666321?refcode=em-12.2.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTliZGJkYy1iZDUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=woEvaqnwRtF1xbjbEkgzgrh0pSa5fpadPbhF3UhD8Pg=)**
There's no way to sugarcoat it, team.

Oral arguments before the US Supreme Court on Mississippi's law banning reproductive healthcare after 15 weeks indicate that the GOP’s tailor-made court is about to overturn _Roe v. Wade._

The Mississippi law is similar to the Senate Bill 8, which was passed by the Texas GOP this year. S.B. 8 bans reproductive healthcare at six-weeks and places a $10,000 bounty on those that violate it. But it gets worse. If _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned, it would also implement a law already passed by Texas, that not only bans reproductive healthcare, but makes it a felony without the need for any legislative intervention.

Winning top-ticket races and flipping Texas statewide is our only way to prevent this from becoming a reality for Texans. If we can win even one of these seats, we can start to reverse the damage and take action to repeal S.B. 8.

Last year, we ran up Democratic voter turnout to historic numbers in our district, and we're ready to do it again to not only send Donna Imam to Congress as an ally for working families, but to help elect Beto O'Rourke to governor and flip Texas blue. **We need every single Democratic vote from Austin in order to flip Texas, and Donna Imam has already proven she can get out the vote.**

[**If you're fired up about this news and ready to do something, please chip in $5, $15, or even $35 today so that we can beat back the Texas GOP and protect reproductive rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39281779/319141380/1898666321?refcode=em-12.2.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTliZGJkYy1iZDUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=woEvaqnwRtF1xbjbEkgzgrh0pSa5fpadPbhF3UhD8Pg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39281780/319141381/1898666321?refcode=em-12.2.21-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTliZGJkYy1iZDUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=woEvaqnwRtF1xbjbEkgzgrh0pSa5fpadPbhF3UhD8Pg=)

clean_body: If Roe is overturned, states will be able to completely ban reproductive healthcare. We must flip Texas and protect Texans from a rogue GOP legislature and GOP’s tailor-made SCOTUS. | = NPR: Roe v. Wade's future in doubt = There's no way to sugarcoat it, team. Oral arguments before the US Supreme Court on Mississippi's law banning reproductive healthcare after 15 weeks indicate that the GOP’s tailor-made court is about to overturn Roe v. Wade. The Mississippi law is similar to the Senate Bill 8, which was passed by the Texas GOP this year. S.B. 8 bans reproductive healthcare at six-weeks and places a $10,000 bounty on those that violate it. But it gets worse. If Roe v. Wade is overturned, it would also implement a law already passed by Texas, that not only bans reproductive healthcare, but makes it a felony without the need for any legislative intervention. Winning top-ticket races and flipping Texas statewide is our only way to prevent this from becoming a reality for Texans. If we can win even one of these seats, we can start to reverse the damage and take action to repeal S.B. 8. Last year, we ran up Democratic voter turnout to historic numbers in our district, and we're ready to do it again to not only send Donna Imam to Congress as an ally for working families, but to help elect Beto O'Rourke to governor and flip Texas blue. We need every single Democratic vote from Austin in order to flip Texas, and Donna Imam has already proven she can get out the vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Team Donna HQ = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. name: Team Holly
subject: Our BIGGEST month ever - thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
Paid for by Holly for Congress
Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States

name: Ken Russell
subject: Did you see this? FWD: Falling behind…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw the email Jennifer sent yesterday. We are falling behind, and we need to outperform everyone's expectations in December if we want to keep up! Florida deserves better than pay to play politics. That is why I am running a grassroots campaign. Can you show your support by making a $25 donation to my campaign today?
Kind Regards,
Ken Russell
--- Forwarded Message ---
Hi Peter,
I’m Jennifer Khosla, and I’m the Finance Director responsible for making sure Ken Russell is the next U.S. Senator from Florida! I have no doubt that Ken is the man for the job. And with our combined efforts, Ken will win this race next November.
That said, unfortunately we did not reach our November fundraising goal. I know it may not seem like it, but these goals are incredibly important. They keep us on the path to victory. Without your help, Ken won’t be able to make it all the way to the Senate.
We need your help to get back on track in December. Will you chip in $25 right away to help us out?
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211202-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211202-email]
Ken has delivered for the people in South Florida, and I know that he will bring that same result-driven energy for the entire state to the Senate. Florida deserves better than corporate cronies and special-interest-focused legislators. Ken believes in the will of the people, and that's why we are running a grassroots, people-powered campaign. That means we need your support. Can you chip in to Ken’s campaign today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211202-email]

I’m a political outsider - while other candidates in the field were busy poll-testing their statements and worrying about their image, I was keeping Nevada’s largest county safe from crime, anarchy, and Antifa as Sheriff. **And now look how much momentum is building to get that kind of leadership - our campaign now leads the field of Republican candidates by almost _20 POINTS!_**

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, you 're one of them!_

245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

America's Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you've got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58923486:6yZ_OjEN9:m:1:3253819041:BD89DBBFF82FCFD2BE5CBD52AA2E1A40:r)

1776 Donor Club

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

Hello,
When a candidate for office asks you to lend them your support — you should be confident about what they stand for.
[**After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, I'm home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa — and I'm writing today to ask you to become a founding donor to this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282658/319145649/-42398318?refcode=em20211202pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NiNDc5MS1jMzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hLUTARMa5_DexAxRY_lC6r7qhzqFZYCdAdiLK_AeuAA=)
So, here's some substance about where I stand on the issues:
* Every American should enjoy comprehensive healthcare. That includes dental, mental, and preventive care, and ultimately, Medicare available to all who need it.

* The threat posed by the climate crisis is enormous, but so are the benefits we can enjoy by addressing it. That’s especially true in Iowa thanks to renewed leadership in agriculture and bioenergy.

* It's appalling that large corporations and the very wealthy pay a lower tax rate than ordinary Iowans. It's time to stop giving working families a raw deal and start eliminating loopholes for the ultra-rich.

* Too many of our students right here in Iowa don't get the quality of education they deserve. We need to pay our teachers what they're worth, and we can take steps to improve education in rural areas by making sure they get their fair share of per-student spending.

* And finally, I believe that Americans deserve a movement of steel-jawed Democrats who win with the first punch and don't back down. We don't need to coddle Chuck Grassley and others who were aware of attempts to overthrow our democracy; we need to show them the barn door.

[**If all of this sounds right to you, friend, then there is something you can do about it: Chip into our campaign today. We're going to run this race the right way, focusing on our vision for the future of every Iowan and every American — and your gift today will help make sure voters hear our message.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282660/319145652/-42398318?refcode=em20211202pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NiNDc5MS1jMzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hLUTARMa5_DexAxRY_lC6r7qhzqFZYCdAdiLK_AeuAA=)

I've said this before, but I'll repeat it here. I think you deserve a Senator who is pragmatic enough to achieve what’s achievable, but bold enough to aim for what we haven't yet been able to achieve. It's my sincere hope I can be that Senator for you.
Thanks for your support, and thanks for doing what it takes to win this election.
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I need your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I’m sincerely asking: will you add your name?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282780/319145945/958816626?source=20211202_em_pet_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg3NTllMy1jMzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZlF6WRfQkNBaJR4ZwIk5N2VbkkdY544UX_bjum8SbU=&emci=b99ffd22-9453-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=718759e3-c353-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889) [**_If 1,000 supporters sign on, I’ll show everyone that I have the momentum to win this important race for Democrats. But if I miss my goal, it’ll be that much harder to get my campaign off the ground. Can I count on your endorsement at this pivotal moment? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282782/319145947/958816626?source=20211202_em_pet_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg3NTllMy1jMzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZlF6WRfQkNBaJR4ZwIk5N2VbkkdY544UX_bjum8SbU=&emci=b99ffd22-9453-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=718759e3-c353-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889) I made it through my critical End-of-Month Deadline. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. [**_If you already have my back, you can go ahead and sign your name here. >>_ If you’re not sure yet, please give me a chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282784/319145949/958816626?source=20211202_em_pet_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg3NTllMy1jMzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZlF6WRfQkNBaJR4ZwIk5N2VbkkdY544UX_bjum8SbU=&emci=b99ffd22-9453-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=718759e3-c353-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889)

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. I’m running for Congress to be the champion hardworking folks deserve, but this is going to be a close race. Republicans are pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red

**Peter, this is urgent: Republicans are pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red, and I'm heading into a three-month fundraising blackout _this weekend._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282946/319146671/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1120-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhlY2E0OC1jNDUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xm2iLDDf5N5TYplbOWLFJJoqlJKBrRa73nQ6007ShaM=)
**I'm falling $22,881 short of my fundraising goal at the worst possible moment, so I have to ask: [Will you please rush $5 right now to help me close this fundraising gap and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282947/319146672/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1120-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhlY2E0OC1jNDUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xm2iLDDf5N5TYplbOWLFJJoqlJKBrRa73nQ6007ShaM=)**
I couldn't be more proud of what our movement has accomplished: Together, we've strengthened our education system, taken bold action on the climate crisis, cut taxes for working families, legalized cannabis, and so much more.
The problem is, all of this progress could be erased in an instant if the GOP wins. I'm working to protect our state from far-right extremism, but I can't do it alone. With a huge fundraising deadline coming up in only FOUR DAYS, **I need your help more than ever.**
**Starting on Monday, I won't be able to fundraise for three months because of a special legislative session. That means if I don't meet this goal tonight, I could start off 2022 behind the GOP. In a race this important, that's not an option, so I'm counting on you now:**
**[If everyone reading this email donates whatever they can, we can close this fundraising gap tonight. Peter, will you please donate $5 – or whatever you can spare – to help me meet my goal and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39282948/319146673/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1120-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhlY2E0OC1jNDUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xm2iLDDf5N5TYplbOWLFJJoqlJKBrRa73nQ6007ShaM=)**

name: Jordan Moskowitz - Political Director
subject: Major Election Integrity Update
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_submissions_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- We are proud to announce that Republicans just**submitted close to 5,000 election inspectors** to be our first line of defense in the fight to uphold election integrity. Thanks to the hard work from our grassroots leaders, **this will be the largest number of Republican poll workers ever submitted in the history of Wisconsin politics!** Below are a few highlights from this effort:

* Milwaukee County submitted around 500 election inspectors
* Outagamie County grew their number of submitted election inspectors by **900% compared to 2019**
* Dane, Kenosha, La Crosse, and Rock Counties all grew their respective number of submitted election inspectors by **500% compared to 2019**
* Brown, Eau Claire, Marathon, St. Croix, Walworth, Washington, Waukesha, and Winnebago Counties **submitted over 200 election inspectors per county**
* ...and many more!

Thank you to all those who were helpful in this effort and for your continued support of the Republican Party to ensure that our elections are free, fair, and secure. Sincerely, Jordan Moskowitz
Political Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_submissions_v3&n=2).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_submissions_v3&n=3) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_submissions_v3&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_submissions_v3&n=5), software for leaders.
