**BREAKING:****Stacey Abrams announces her run for Governor of Georgia!**
We need voting rights champions like Stacey Abrams running for statewide offices across this country. That’s why, for the next 24 hours only, we are doing a split fundraiser to raise $5,000!

As we have seen over the last several years - democracy and voting rights are on the line. Now, more than ever, we need voting rights champions in office who will protect access to the ballot box and make our democracy stronger across the country.

We are a much stronger nation when women like Stacey hold seats of power. Stacey has, of course, already made her mark for years as a voting rights champion - and the people of Georgia deserve to have her in office.

That’s why we’re throwing this 24-hour fundraiser to help us both win our seats to protect our democracy and ensure a brighter future across our entire nation.

We know that these are going to be tough races - and we’ve got to be prepared to fight back hard.
[**_Can you donate $25 right now to keep our American democracy strong? Your contribution will be split between Stacey and me._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39283347/319148213/336739970?refcode=EM_FR_211202Abrams_RR_MTO_FULL_7_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzA4YjUxNi1jNjUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NI7h-y8JIV4XYrCiLrsggX8se9zLREx3IfBzZnzNN9c=)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: New Twitter CEO Already Singling Out Conservatives

body:
President Trump would be so, so disappointed. &n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2zlze--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Hey Fellow Conservative -- I woke up to some miserable news today...
We just came up a few contributions short of my End-of-Month goal. If you’re wondering why I’m so disappointed, know this: **it was the first test of our strength and determination since finding out Democrats outraised us by over two million bucks...**
_Yep, this is a disaster._
There’s only one thing we can do. We need to mobilize [**128 American heroes**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zlze-1njku-4qqlpo7/) to step up by midnight and save the day. Can you help us out? Please?
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zlze-1njkv-4qqlpo8/)
Ronna McDaniel, Kevin McCarthy, Tom Emmer, Marco Rubio, Tim Scott, and Donald Trump Jr. all reached out to you personally. If we don’t spring into action now that we came up short, we’re doomed!
**President Trump would be so, so disappointed.**
[**THIS OFFICIALLY YOUR LAST CHANCE TO HELP.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zlze-1njkw-4qqlpo9/)
For America,
Steve Scalise

body:
Sign the card to congratulate President Obama >>
| | | **BREAKING: President Obama nominated for THIRD Grammy**

We're SO proud!!

President Obama was just nominated for his **THIRD** Grammy award.

And we can't help but feel emotional about his success and all he's done for our country.

[**So we wanted to CONGRATULATE President Obama on his incredible achievement with a card signed by his best supporters --_but your name isn 't on it yet!_**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTR9_)

Can we count on you to add your name and congratulate President Obama before midnight tonight?

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
President Obama was nominated for his memoir recounting his AMAZING years in the Oval Office.

During that time, he:

_\--**EXPANDED** affordable health care access,
\-- **DEFENDED** our democracy,
\-- and **CONFRONTED** the climate crisis._

And now, President Biden is BUILDING on his incredible legacy.

**So to celebrate his HISTORIC achievement, we want to congratulate President Obama with a card signed by his best supporters. Can we count on you to add your name before midnight?**
| [Sign the card to congratulate President Obama >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)

Thanks,

DCCC

body:
We are cracking down... [](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=78f38e6cb9ff4075b016a15218d20271&_e=mgG8O14UNiKfMeQ3Zb04O4SzHrM1Mrmabrxx3a7FGE2l9iDN49j1Hoyo1zCypbK9gWDkM3lpaabAum6ypTeH4a6VJ26JQ5cDEbHw0nA76fEiFJWfMqApF-JRlFAsH9kWtHe6vwanaaX8_NF5zCDBLiTDnsM7end7D75Xpm8Ef5XH7CCH12qLb6L8gLw1sPI9ohpBP-9s7UGferFBAyZ-MKbgt96v28U561aFAmbEeE0V3Tmw-I3FxI9fwegDwjCY9XO4zko425EEYMdO7Pg78FGiT5vmmM-u3VaiiJRH6bM%3D) Friend,
_In Wisconsin,_we care about election integrity.__ [**__If you agree, click here immediately to add your name in support!__**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=78f38e6cb9ff4075b016a15218d20271&_e=mgG8O14UNiKfMeQ3Zb04O4SzHrM1Mrmabrxx3a7FGE2l9iDN49j1Hoyo1zCypbK9gWDkM3lpaabAum6ypTeH4RNLlMT5tt-o5Y_tp0PRq9cW4p2KvymJiZdQbJjhWXt9MN8Z8vBZnm4ZtkQ-mp4Zk6pMtj9RU7eWqPT5UWOxjWwf6vD9BPI6n6hBJlwfVBQXVbEzdtmyg7BlXaUqM2qJsR4nfUaxkUDekDZoAUEJvo0y1B2N78EHvcMvRp99Zs5cyOG-BJjmSWqo_GwnSW3hD67PFPTFYzcUyrW4jqwEgf0%3D) **In November, I demanded answers and action in the Senate. I was proud to write and pass Senate Resolution 11.**_This resolution will hold the Wisconsin Elections Commission ACCOUNTABLE for ignoring the law, sidestepping the administrative rulemaking process, and not doing their jobs._ My message is simple: **_if you break Wisconsin's election laws, you will be held accountable. _** [**Do You Agree? Support Election Integrity in Wisconsin**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=78f38e6cb9ff4075b016a15218d20271&_e=mgG8O14UNiKfMeQ3Zb04O4SzHrM1Mrmabrxx3a7FGE2l9iDN49j1Hoyo1zCypbK9gWDkM3lpaabAum6ypTeH4Q48tDyEKJVpHSIk9e1Li--anI5VymWJ_flj-flNCU-HtbcxahAQBuDnDRSF5mK52qttFJd8Z9JXP1FNZDhvN8G8duAnBEr4HBdeRDVrWgksGY1N0uYE8yjjB8OXWLVMRltp0Zoywf9NYTlJCgCIlwaP9GxTiezmK1n7kjxwXeif_x95-jQl7-cIC2hrBwFMXOEa6O9ySU2HdJc8ynvBis4%3D) The worst part about all of this is the Elections Commission is the one who's supposed to be PROTECTING us from abuses of election security. I will always stand up for our election integrity here in Wisconsin and demand accountability from those who are supposed to be protecting it. **We have a long way to go in Wisconsin and this is just the first step in a long journey, but make no mistake – I will be with you the entire way.** **If you're with me – if you agree that our elections are worth protecting –[click here to add your name](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=78f38e6cb9ff4075b016a15218d20271&_e=mgG8O14UNiKfMeQ3Zb04O4SzHrM1Mrmabrxx3a7FGE2l9iDN49j1Hoyo1zCypbK9gWDkM3lpaabAum6ypTeH4dM5ZUmRtAEP1bHflEzppapRjZEtWfy3osroM3pvB5v4bA0F95guQ9SJ37nSmnjgK9GYmzjXl_YpduyZoiTsWCYccTHyhPBPLNdR0Mghm4RAM-LpgmhpkjxHUvqsGxk61RJfYOMi2eKG7tgrGJw7c4u6CNDjYx-w0A4sVNcvtMP0tWujZcG8rhJhHTyXUvdtsWamLiB2kZiU5M1E0_fj8D0%3D).** Thank you, Roger Roth Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin [Please click here to unsubscribe](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_s=78f38e6cb9ff4075b016a15218d20271&_t=oxB6E21-r3yOuTZOAxNu4X5iZRdbiAEDMFMR_V6V6IIhyOjECJ-0JQM0OxIsY1iU19ThLFEMlYu2DzSZtS6sXuEC_rEVthaFoVhdraO-r0O3ufPXuByBmJCeCNavAv2zaV4CZayBwBb-GQSoOhUxP5Ypf76gZPLRbmYykjoTHg0%3D) [**Learn More**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=78f38e6cb9ff4075b016a15218d20271&_e=mgG8O14UNiKfMeQ3Zb04O8qA7QMCdjXfMv51v9rWSL07ZsdNjV7DU7At2UBBBGP1KuArs8opd6lih2wc7uijJl_70e1YBRTR0YE9S9Wd7HIUy4hPjtd7yOQNPlPET_6bjKosrFn0YlfuNMkgWw-TK15RlUI53AmzFWxkJrJCshnjkLX0lt8jm-7YPjHtKvR_Uh5AgkERsXMTykXk0hDY0FMfHaub11CPN8bXSNcV6TGyY3UEnXGx-PDmLSj6gobmX77LTYw0pLASBKC8AX_XVw%3D%3D)

clean_body: We are cracking down... Friend, In Wisconsin,we care about election integrity. In November, I demanded answers and action in the Senate. I was proud to write and pass Senate Resolution 11.This resolution will hold the Wisconsin Elections Commission ACCOUNTABLE for ignoring the law, sidestepping the administrative rulemaking process, and not doing their jobs. My message is simple: if you break Wisconsin's election laws, you will be held accountable. The worst part about all of this is the Elections Commission is the one who's supposed to be PROTECTING us from abuses of election security. I will always stand up for our election integrity here in Wisconsin and demand accountability from those who are supposed to be protecting it. We have a long way to go in Wisconsin and this is just the first step in a long journey, but make no mistake – I will be with you the entire way. If you're with me – if you agree that our elections are worth protecting –. Thank you, Roger Roth Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin

Will you help us hit our ambitious goal? We want to show the Trump family how many Americans appreciate all their incredible work.

name: Rob Secaur
subject: MEMO: New Senate Poll Data Shows Jane Timken Surging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio
body:
Jane Timken for Senate

<>
Good afternoon,

I wanted you all to be among the first to see exciting new campaign polling
data showing Jane Timken has surged on the ballot and is well within striking
distance of the lead.

This means Jane's message and hard work is paying off - and we've only just
begun. For more information, please read the below campaign memo on the State
of the Race.

Thanks,
Rob

MEMORANDUM

TO: Interested Parties
FROM: Rob Secaur
RE: Campaign Update
December 2, 2021
State of the Race

As we enter the last month of this year, we have exciting news to share with
you about the campaign and Jane’s winning strategy to be the Republican nominee
for U.S. Senate in Ohio.

Brand new survey results show that Jane Timken is surging on the ballot and is
now within striking distance of Josh Mandel.Climbing six points since our last
survey, Jane’s relentless focus on the issues that matter to Ohio families, the
air support from our aggressive TV ad campaign, and our unparalleled grassroots
ground game is rocketing Jane into a position to win this race in May.

The momentum Jane has gained on the ballot is coupled with her ever-increasing
favorability with voters. With amore than a 2:1 positive image with primary
voters, Jane continues to gain traction – and as more primary voters become
aware of Jane as a mom, a fighter, and an authentic champion of the America
First agenda, this will only keep growing.

Bottom line: Jane is poised to peak at the right time and win this race. This
is her first run for office, and she’s doing what she needs to do to introduce
herself to primary voters, share her message, and close the gap...and the
strategy is working!

Josh Mandel has flatlined. Month after month, Josh Mandel clings to the name
ID he gained from running for statewide office five times in the last 12 years.
But as voters consider yet another statewide campaign from the perennial
candidate, they don’t like what they see. Primary voters are looking for a
fighter who understands the issues important to Ohioans, not someone who is
running for self-gain. After losing in 2012, quitting the race in 2018,
hoarding money from his 2018 donors instead of supporting Republican causes,
making millions from companies he regulated as State Treasurer, and continuous
personal baggage and scandal, voters are not buying what Mandel is selling.
Mandel is simply unable to convert his near universal name ID into votes. Ohio
voters are clearly looking for an alternative.

Never Trumper J.D. Vance is drowning. While J.D. Vance may be the preferred
candidate of coastal elites and Big Tech billionaires, J.D. Vance’s act isn’t
working on Ohio voters. Withan underwater favorable/unfavorable rating of 22/26
, it’s clear that the more Ohioans learn about J.D. Vance, the less they like
him. Ohioans want a champion for the America First agenda – not someone who
spent four years trashing President Trump and belittling his supporters, only
to do an abrupt about-face when it was politically convenient. Ohioans are
smart enough to see Vance’s reversals on Trump and his Big Tech hypocrisy
coming from miles away.

Grassroots Organization

Our campaign continues to build on the early investment in our ground game, a
key component of turning grassroots support into actual votes on Election Day.
Jane has garnered over 165 endorsements from GOP elected officials and party
leaders across the state, is the only candidate with grassroots chairs in all
of Ohio’s 88 counties, and is leading a campaign team that has already contacted
more than 870,000 primary voters. Our grassroots operation is unparalleled by
any other candidate in this race and likely in any Senate primary in the
country.

Jane knows that Ohio is won by a robust field operation. It’s what she did as
Ohio Republican Party Chair to hold the conservative line and win races for
President Trump and Republicans up and down the ballot in 2018 and 2020, and
it’s the strategic advantage we’ll capitalize on to win the primary in May and
beat Tim Ryan in November.

Jane is also thrilled to have the support of national conservative leaders and
groups who know Jane is the best candidate in this race. South Dakota Governor
and Conservative Champion Kristi Noem has endorsed and traveled the state with
Jane with future events to come. Jane also has the support of Maggie’s List, a
national conservative group committed to electing more women like Jane to
Congress.

Fundraising & Resources

Our phenomenal field program and outpouring of grassroots support is matched
by the tremendous in-state support from Ohio donors. With more than 3,200
Ohioans donating to support Jane’s campaign and over 80 percent of our total
contributions coming from within the state, Jane absolutely dwarfs her
opponents in support from those who will actually vote in this primary.
Combined, the other candidates in this race have just 2,400 Ohio donors and
Jane DOUBLES the Ohio donor support from her next closest opponent.

Due to the support of folks like you, we will have the resources we need to
compete and win. With more than $5 million raised this cycle, we are in the top
two for total dollars raised. That’s because Jane is in Ohio every day, talking
to Ohioans, and earning their support through hard work, determination, and the
right message for Ohio voters.

All of this is to say that Jane Timken is the only viable option for Ohio
Republicans to keep this seat and beat Tim Ryan next November. She has the
strategy, she has the message, she has the operation, and she has the momentum
to win this race.
###

Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio

clean_body: Jane Timken for Senate <> Good afternoon, I wanted you all to be among the first to see exciting new campaign polling data showing Jane Timken has surged on the ballot and is well within striking distance of the lead. This means Jane's message and hard work is paying off - and we've only just begun. For more information, please read the below campaign memo on the State of the Race. Thanks, Rob MEMORANDUM TO: Interested Parties FROM: Rob Secaur RE: Campaign Update December 2, 2021 State of the Race As we enter the last month of this year, we have exciting news to share with you about the campaign and Jane’s winning strategy to be the Republican nominee for U.S. Senate in Ohio. Brand new survey results show that Jane Timken is surging on the ballot and is now within striking distance of Josh Mandel.Climbing six points since our last survey, Jane’s relentless focus on the issues that matter to Ohio families, the air support from our aggressive TV ad campaign, and our unparalleled grassroots ground game is rocketing Jane into a position to win this race in May. The momentum Jane has gained on the ballot is coupled with her ever-increasing favorability with voters. With amore than a 2:1 positive image with primary voters, Jane continues to gain traction – and as more primary voters become aware of Jane as a mom, a fighter, and an authentic champion of the America First agenda, this will only keep growing. Bottom line: Jane is poised to peak at the right time and win this race. This is her first run for office, and she’s doing what she needs to do to introduce herself to primary voters, share her message, and close the gap...and the strategy is working! Josh Mandel has flatlined. Month after month, Josh Mandel clings to the name ID he gained from running for statewide office five times in the last 12 years. But as voters consider yet another statewide campaign from the perennial candidate, they don’t like what they see. Primary voters are looking for a fighter who understands the issues important to Ohioans, not someone who is running for self-gain. After losing in 2012, quitting the race in 2018, hoarding money from his 2018 donors instead of supporting Republican causes, making millions from companies he regulated as State Treasurer, and continuous personal baggage and scandal, voters are not buying what Mandel is selling. Mandel is simply unable to convert his near universal name ID into votes. Ohio voters are clearly looking for an alternative. Never Trumper J.D. Vance is drowning. While J.D. Vance may be the preferred candidate of coastal elites and Big Tech billionaires, J.D. Vance’s act isn’t working on Ohio voters. Withan underwater favorable/unfavorable rating of 22/26 , it’s clear that the more Ohioans learn about J.D. Vance, the less they like him. Ohioans want a champion for the America First agenda – not someone who spent four years trashing President Trump and belittling his supporters, only to do an abrupt about-face when it was politically convenient. Ohioans are smart enough to see Vance’s reversals on Trump and his Big Tech hypocrisy coming from miles away. Grassroots Organization Our campaign continues to build on the early investment in our ground game, a key component of turning grassroots support into actual votes on Election Day. Jane has garnered over 165 endorsements from GOP elected officials and party leaders across the state, is the only candidate with grassroots chairs in all of Ohio’s 88 counties, and is leading a campaign team that has already contacted more than 870,000 primary voters. Our grassroots operation is unparalleled by any other candidate in this race and likely in any Senate primary in the country. Jane knows that Ohio is won by a robust field operation. It’s what she did as Ohio Republican Party Chair to hold the conservative line and win races for President Trump and Republicans up and down the ballot in 2018 and 2020, and it’s the strategic advantage we’ll capitalize on to win the primary in May and beat Tim Ryan in November. Jane is also thrilled to have the support of national conservative leaders and groups who know Jane is the best candidate in this race. South Dakota Governor and Conservative Champion Kristi Noem has endorsed and traveled the state with Jane with future events to come. Jane also has the support of Maggie’s List, a national conservative group committed to electing more women like Jane to Congress. Fundraising & Resources Our phenomenal field program and outpouring of grassroots support is matched by the tremendous in-state support from Ohio donors. With more than 3,200 Ohioans donating to support Jane’s campaign and over 80 percent of our total contributions coming from within the state, Jane absolutely dwarfs her opponents in support from those who will actually vote in this primary. Combined, the other candidates in this race have just 2,400 Ohio donors and Jane DOUBLES the Ohio donor support from her next closest opponent. Due to the support of folks like you, we will have the resources we need to compete and win. With more than $5 million raised this cycle, we are in the top two for total dollars raised. That’s because Jane is in Ohio every day, talking to Ohioans, and earning their support through hard work, determination, and the right message for Ohio voters. All of this is to say that Jane Timken is the only viable option for Ohio Republicans to keep this seat and beat Tim Ryan next November. She has the strategy, she has the message, she has the operation, and she has the momentum to win this race. Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? Unsubscribe <>

**We've built this movement one person at a time, and every single one of us is helping to create an Arizona worthy of its residents. But we can't rely on good news to win this race – we also need _resources_.**
Columnists at The Washington Post have made one thing crystal clear: The ONLY surefire way to defeat GOP extremism is to elect Democratic governors like Marco. But when we missed our November fundraising goal, we put our entire movement in serious danger.
**We know our strategy is working – so we CAN'T slow down now. With Trump's allies pledging MILLIONS to back his handpicked candidate, this will be one of the most competitive races of 2022. We have to use these final hours of our deadline extension and hit our goal or we'll be even further behind the extremists.**
**[We're only $2,094 short of our EXTENDED November goal and cannot afford to fall a single cent short – not with so little time left before the FINAL deadline for this goal. **Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39284698/319155242/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY5YWNhOS1jYzUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jod1B1LGNK1UyjvHPWeeOUB4aPb0sK8s5_Uf-i5d95c=) Thank you so much.

| Friend,
---
For too long Republicans have allowed Democrats to play by a different set of rules. But that ends with this governor’s race.
---
Ever since we launched this campaign, we’ve been going on the offensive to secure our elections and FIRE Tony Evers at all costs...

body:
| | | **BREAKING via NPR: “ _Roe v. Wade_ 's future is in doubt after historic arguments at Supreme Court”**

Team -- MSNBC, NPR, and the _New York Times_ ALL report that yesterday's Supreme Court arguments could signal the END of _Roe v. Wade_. **We've launched an emergency petition to defend _Roe_ and protect abortion rights, but we're still MISSING 43 signatures from Pennsylvania!**

**[Add your name to call on the Supreme Court to uphold _Roe v. Wade_ >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5677?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211202-BreakingNews-RoeHeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211202-BreakingNews-RoeHeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=2124%2E9716520%2E26kazi)**

---

Team -- Yesterday’s arguments before the Supreme Court were the biggest threat we’ve seen to _Roe v. Wade_ in DECADES.

Reports from inside the courtroom indicate that Donald Trump’s far-right justices and the other conservatives could be on the verge of OVERTURNING _Roe_ and erasing the rights of millions of Americans.

As Justice Sonia Sotomayor said, we cannot stand by while the conservative-leaning Court endangers our basic human rights and treats the reading of the Constitution as a _**“political act.”**_

**We need 50,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT** to answer Justice Sotomayor’s warning and show that Americans will do whatever it takes to save _Roe v. Wade_ \-- **but right now we're 43 signatures _short_ in Pennsylvania! Please:**

**[Add your name to call on the Supreme Court to uphold _Roe v. Wade_ >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5677?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211202-BreakingNews-RoeHeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211202-BreakingNews-RoeHeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=2124%2E9716520%2E26kazi)**

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: 🚨 Endorsement Alert 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

We have
exciting news:

The Progressive Campaign Committee (PCCC) just endorsed Erica’s campaign
for North Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District!

PCCC is a million-member grassroots organization building progressive
power at all levels of government — and Erica is honored to receive their
endorsement.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/28792?refcode=em20211202-662&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=662%2E3698%2E5HhUvn ]Sending a bold, progressive champion to Congress who will stand up to
corporate interests and fight for working-class families has never been
more important — that’s why the fight to elect Erica is so crucial. Will
you join PCCC in supporting our campaign by making a $5
contribution today?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/28792?refcode=em20211202-662&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=662%2E3698%2E5HhUvn ]Donate $5

Erica has always been a proud progressive and a fierce advocate for
working people. She’s spent her life fighting for the small communities
and farmers in our district as an educator, a minister, and a three-term
state senator.

In Congress, Erica will fight against the corporate monopolies that have
hollowed out NC-02 and for higher wages, more rural hospitals, universal
broadband, and universal healthcare.

But Erica can’t do this alone. She doesn’t come from wealth, and she
refuses to take a dime of corporate PAC or fossil fuel money. That means
it’ll take a lot of people power to compete against our corporate-backed
opponents.

That’s why your donation today is so important. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/28792?refcode=em20211202-662&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=662%2E3698%2E5HhUvn ]Can you chip in right
now so we can build a powerful movement to send Erica to the halls of
Congress where she will advocate for the working people of North Carolina?

Thank you for your support,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211202-662-footer&t=1022&refcode2=662_3698_5HhUvn&akid=662%2E3698%2E5HhUvn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=662%2E3698%2E5HhUvn

name: Greg Casar
subject: Our new comprehensive civil rights ordinance!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress**
body:
Workers rights and civil rights protections can finally be fully enforced. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOWJY-tixsAGdZ-iepyIpgQwUlTCwVyuxkyHVyPgP75Lyg6ARx4Wcpm1esMobDSIkg7MRXc-RexytvOYIkaFydIYh5aBSDmOFIRWmGT3Iy7WG78JX_snEm9ubcJ8vgdVwmFMxpGCTOjJn_nbqG5Y3INxXJyM7i8Zpsfd0mh9RIGKYS_dbderm87slO8aiipsH0pcyVN4OOCu3sNLabX9k6wxkdJhJxY92pewauvJrdL5WBimY7H8I2rON-arJc2JRKUTaPSLruhQih8YBoAw_7LFQPzi9Tk35HuOd-hWVNCt/3hi/p5XK079jTgW9Co1pwr4WwQ/h0/x80t3007_CQeBVdK8LH1CYZEUT9ebbtMldkI6hCqgTk) _Español abajo_
Hi Peter, We finally passed Austin’s comprehensive civil rights ordinance! That means our workers rights and civil rights protections can finally be fully enforced by the Civil Rights Office, protecting Austinites from discrimination and sexual harassment in the workplace. Every single Austinite has the right to a safe workplace, free from discrimination. We have passed laws that create higher wages, safer workplaces, and expanded civil rights, and this ordinance will ensure that all those rules are enforced. We’ve won better wages, safer workplaces, and civil rights before, now we can continue to advance worker protections and care for our community. To all Austinites: our Civil Rights Office is here to help. Thank you for your advocacy,
Greg

* * *

Hola Peter,
Finalmente pasamos una ordenanza comprensiva de derechos civiles. Esto significa que nuestros derechos laborales y civiles serán implementados por la Oficina de Derechos Civiles, prtoegiendo a las personas que viven en nuestra ciudad en contra de discriminacion y acoso sexual en el trabajo. Todas las personas en Austin tienen el derecho a un trabajo seguro y libre de discriminacion. Nuestras ordenanzas de contratación de oportunidad justa, días de enfermedad pagados y disciminacion serán implementadas por esta oficina y vamos a seguir trabajando para expandir estas protecciones. Ya hemos ganado mejores sueldos, más seguridad en el trabajo y derechos civiles. Ahora continuamos avanzando y expandiendo protecciones y cuidado a nuestra comunidad. A todas las personas en Austin: nuestra oficina de Derechos Civiles está aquí para ayudar. La lucha sigue,
Greg

name: Jana and Larry Long, Greg Abbott Supporters
subject: Our first ever offer: DOUBLE MATCHING all gifts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
As proud Greg Abbott supporters, we’re so excited to announce that we’ve decided to match ALL CONTRIBUTIONS in SUPPORT of our Republican Governor.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2znak--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

As proud Greg Abbott supporters, we’re so excited to announce that _**we’ve decided to match ALL CONTRIBUTIONS in SUPPORT of our Republican Governor.**_

Governor Greg Abbott is a PROUD conservative who always fights for the people of Texas. He’s CONTINUING to fight to secure the border in the wake of Joe Biden’s absence, create jobs across the state, defend the 2nd Amendment, and protect our law enforcement.

Now, in the wake of liberal Beto O’Rourke’s run for Governor, support is needed now more than ever, **[and that’s why we’ve decided to DOUBLE MATCH all contributions.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2znak-1njq4-4qqlpo1/ "and that’s why we’ve decided to DOUBLE MATCH all contributions.")**

subject: 🎟️ 🧕🏾 🛫 One way ticket . . .
body:
With Ilhan Omar grabbing as many headlines as she can through her perpetual state of manufactured victimhood, I wanted to remind you of who she is and why when I’m elected to Congress, I’ll be buying Ilhan a one-way ticket back to Somalia and delivering it to her on the floor of the House!

clean_body: = Friends, On Steve Bannon’s podcast, Marjorie Taylor Greene admitted “she wants nothing to do with politics” and lamented that Republicans “weren’t going far enough” when it came to obstructing the Biden agenda. = Well, here’s the good news: none of us want Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress either. That’s why we’re working day in and day out to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and elect Democrat Marcus Flowers in her place. Marcus understands that serving in Congress is an honor, and he’ll actually work for his constituents instead of the radical-right special interests. While we may not agree with Marjorie Taylor Greene on, well, much of anything, we’re in total agreement that we want her to have NOTHING to do with politics in this country. = | = Marjorie Taylor Greene’s days of obstruction, bigotry, and conspiracy theories are numbered. Grassroots donors like you are powering a campaign that CAN flip this seat into Democratic hands. But we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas now. Talk soon, Team Flowers for Congress Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. | = **** **** ****** ** ** **** Paid for by Marcus for Georgia Marcus for Georgia PO Box 725 Bremen, GA 30110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ********=**

body:
Satisfied with Joe Biden?
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---

Fellow American,

In the months since Joe Biden took office, our country has continued to face an uphill battle.

Americans remember when Joe Biden campaigned on “shutting down” the coronavirus, yet here we are. With every new variant, we are seeing our government take more and more control from the American people.

**_Are you satisfied with how the Biden Administration has handled the pandemic since taking office?_** [**YES**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=1c5dfbcdd4e642bfb1429d84f7df3f61&_e=42aRQvP8_LL4yacb1faJcm0O2mrb0qOzagRW-Bam8DNAttMdSy3knLQs67KpKELatdbgOf0wwXNzYe9kEB8YEAbfRrGlCWRQ2zCNSeFypUOAvzZr_uU1SNsDeRo7SOQdI6kD248bCirkAL26eWH4qQZsJogXc9BRM--O7uWY7OHTzAuZWC971YaOnvDplV1QHZMZGA0cIId5iRCOAyAFlZiMMJyrnW75zUCC0GyICgRUdbc-BpF49bD5zu2RxsHh1U9mTi4b8Y9__xcamzMOr0ZXUjNQG95CURc9s35wkKn75Fgbb_QBdIybQEb3_P8nFufXkEZCkCsUee3Yo58dexsUs5eJznIB3k4YZiB1MJPqymhxXvogwp7kPLt2kGUwtCjseD7YRltuvBHvH27TXR6DDBEsAvBphlCsP7a_M8XY4F_luqDeFcDpenZmGoQnCRbK3uoG_T_U4WnDzb1-L6lP05DuOrjDySlbrYO1xt1tuz-Jy8DMORLdR801iwF_njsAc8AHa000LjETnEpTVQ%3D%3D)

name: Dan Goldman
subject: We must protect reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for Attorney General
body:
Peter,

First, I want to say thank you to everyone who has joined our campaign
over the past few weeks. Already, we’ve seen an incredible amount of
support since we launched. In fact, our launch video has reached nearly
one million views. Thank you. Because of you, we have the resources to hit
the ground running to achieve one standard of justice for all, and that
work begins right now.

Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard arguments on a Mississippi law that is
a direct challenge to Roe v. Wade, and the conservative majority hinted
that they would allow the Mississippi law to remain in effect.

The law would make most abortions illegal in Mississippi after 15 weeks,
and if the court decides the law is constitutional, it will undermine all
of our fundamental rights, effectively overturn Roe, and set gender equity
back 50 years. Not only that, but a Supreme Court endorsement of the
Mississippi law will pave the way for other Republican-led states to pass
laws that effectively eliminate the fundamental right for every citizen to
direct their own health care.

I want to be very clear: The right to choose is a constitutional right.
Period.

We’re facing the biggest threat to reproductive freedom in decades, and
frankly, we simply can’t rely on the GOP-packed Supreme Court to uphold
fundamental rights.

[ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/signup/repro-rights-petition-20211202/?t=1003&akid=21%2E63204%2EX_8Ql9 ]Peter, add your
name if you know that we need an Attorney General who will always protect
reproductive rights and every woman’s right to choose.

[ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/signup/repro-rights-petition-20211202/?t=1004&akid=21%2E63204%2EX_8Ql9 ]ADD YOUR NAME

No matter what the Court rules, as New York’s Attorney General, I will
always stand up for a woman’s right to choose. And I will use every legal
tool available to ensure that anyone, no matter where they live, can
exercise their right to reproductive freedom.

Thank you for standing with me to protect a woman’s basic right to control
her own body.

Dan

PO Box 3306 New York, NY 10008

[ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/go/354?t=1001&akid=21%2E63204%2EX_8Ql9 ]www.dangoldmanforag.com | [ mailto:info@dangoldmanforag.com ]info@dangoldmanforag.com | [ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/go/353?t=1002&akid=21%2E63204%2EX_8Ql9 ]Privacy

name: Tobias Read
subject: Our children deserve to stay in the classroom
body:
The recent proposal by the Portland teachers union to decrease in-person instruction for our kids is unacceptable.
---
| | Dear Peter,

I’ll be blunt – the recent proposal by the Portland teachers union to _decrease_ in-person instruction for our kids is unacceptable. As any parent of school kids will tell you, remote learning has failed our students. **We should be talking about ways to _expand_ in-person instruction this year and in the future.**

[**Our teachers are struggling and our students deserve better. I’m running for Governor because we need to start building a better future for our kids. Will you chip in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39286375/319180964/1385179419?refcode=em1202&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODYwZWFkMC1kYTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k30Ii4WnotiZ-U8xEh1byqtkaZOWw0auesX8YXtbXK4=)

The past year has been incredibly difficult for our kids’ education, for parents having to juggle jobs and virtual learning, and for teachers working with inadequate resources while teaching remotely with heightened uncertainty. **But any proposal now for cutting in-person instruction for kids is a non-starter.**

The plan to eliminate roughly 20 days of in-person instruction for high school students and 10 for elementary and middle school is heading in exactly the wrong direction. And what are parents who cannot work from home supposed to do, pay for childcare? **Our children need and deserve to stay in the classroom.**

As Governor, I will address the immediate learning gaps that emerged during the last two academic years. I will step up and make clear that our kids are a priority and that teachers must be well equipped and well supported to deliver that great education.

[**I need your support now to ensure that our students get the education they need and deserve. Please contribute today to support our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39286377/319180967/1385179419?refcode=em1202&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODYwZWFkMC1kYTUzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k30Ii4WnotiZ-U8xEh1byqtkaZOWw0auesX8YXtbXK4=)

Thank you for everything you do,

---

body:
| | | After Rep. Paul Gosar posted a cartoon video of him killing Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Democrats in the House of Representatives voted to censure him, and strip him of his committees.
If Republicans take over the House, Kevin McCarthy has voted to restore Gosar and Q-Anon conspiracy promoter Marjorie Taylor Greene to powerful committee posts.
**We can’t let that happen.**
******[In Congress, Melanie D’Arrigo will fight back, and hold seditionists and violent conspiracy theorists accountable. Can you chip in to her campaign today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8J1TUqP3T1175jV6KtRcfnH-4fVPkB2IrXA0J_G4Gn5qsJx-o8WoNY6gQrur12Qq2FShwnGokxbWNUpEoj5AYASPj-8tHXe4g3_Cpud9T6iKGtJMnE7KdRomGE_0PvEmh_Ssw5ppkarNzcnW5D072bEXmEFgPo5C1g3YJCdVVpdqAw0-ovdgaccsXdHHxvE_s030RiQE6l5-GlW8AM_SgIRJneOcZGKoGOfcYlZEKUlKZ3FNCAqmAYYWFnHjar-9hH9whgNzYLrQCzITZi4gjPi8Zq8qjikWj8QXcMyj6cj1du2iZQK2OQecGGtgyPPxU/3hi/rhBWNaO2SceJ880hhlIYoQ/h0/Kgcmx83vPiBQNADI7i1lLU2O82-7A8VLLRU3_VNVvj4)**
We haven’t forgotten what today’s Republican Party stands for.
Marjorie Taylor Greene mocked gun violence survivors, spread lies about COVID-19 vaccines, and has racked up over $60,000 in fines for refusing to wear a mask on the House floor.
Paul Gosar’s violent rhetoric, support for insurrectionists, and ties to white nationalism are so offensive, even his own siblings have demanded he be defeated.
**[We need more Democrats in Congress who will stand up to right-wing extremists. name: Derek Schmidt
subject: BIG WIN for rural Kansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
In case you didn’t get a chance to watch my appearance on Fox News yesterday, I wanted to make sure you heard the big news... Joe Biden’s unconstitutio Friend, In case you didn’t get a chance to watch my appearance on Fox News yesterday, I wanted to make sure you heard the big news... **Joe Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandates were dealt another MASSIVE blow in federal court this week: we obtained a preliminary injunction blocking the CMS mandate for health care workers. ** I believe that Kansans should be trusted to make their own medical decisions, and that no president has the authority Joe Biden is claiming, which is why I took him to court. clean_body: In case you didn’t get a chance to watch my appearance on Fox News yesterday, I wanted to make sure you heard the big news... Joe Biden’s unconstitutio Friend, In case you didn’t get a chance to watch my appearance on Fox News yesterday, I wanted to make sure you heard the big news... Joe Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandates were dealt another MASSIVE blow in federal court this week: we obtained a preliminary injunction blocking the CMS mandate for health care workers. I believe that Kansans should be trusted to make their own medical decisions, and that no president has the authority Joe Biden is claiming, which is why I took him to court. This is a major win for the fundamental rights of every American to make their own health care decisions, and a major win for rural Kansas health care that could be devastated if this mandate ever goes into effect. WATCH me discuss on Fox & Friends here: This win is just the next step in our battle against Biden’s excessive federal overreach. I’m not stopping here, but I’m going to need your help to sustain our efforts. Thank you for any support you can give, friend. It means a lot to have you on my team, and I promise to keep leading the charge day in and day out to protect you and your family. Sincerely, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Obstruction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Who stands in our way of securing paid family leave, an expanded child tax
credit, climate action, housing, and more? Senators Manchin and Sinema,
whose status as Senate holdouts have secured them an outsized role in
determining the future of the Build Back Better Act.

They’ve already been rewarded for their efforts to pare down the bill.
Campaign contributions from Wall Street, Big Pharma, corporate PACs, and
conservative donors have been pouring into Manchin and Sinema’s
re-election campaign.

But with the future of popular progressive proposals in the balance, we
can’t afford to let Manchin and Sinema — and their corporate mega-donors —
get in the way.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85570?refcode=em20211202-20788&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye ]If you believe that Senator Joe Manchin and Senator Sinema can’t stand
in the way of our progressive agenda — will you stand with us and make a
contribution right now? We need to fight them, and the dark money donors
that back them!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85570?refcode=em20211202-20788&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye ]Contribute $3

As we face a fight to secure Medicare expansion, universal pre-K, paid
leave, and climate action – it’s become evident that we desperately need
to elect more members of Congress who won’t be afraid to make big and bold
investments on behalf of the American people.

We need members of Congress who won’t be afraid of raising taxes on the
ultra-wealthy or corporations in order to ensure all Americans have the
resources they need to survive.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85570?refcode=em20211202-20788&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye ]If you’re with us in this fight, can you please make a
$3 donation to power the fight against Joe Manchin and
Kyrsten Sinema and towards electing leaders who will stand up for working
people? Your support ensures we can continue growing our progressive
movement.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85570?refcode=em20211202-20788&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211202-20788-footer&t=1026&refcode2=20788_1203867_ojywye&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=20788%2E1203867%2Eojywye

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Thank you, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1619%2E3611125%2Eb4qd73 ][IMG]

Folks --

I wanted to drop you a note to say thanks.

Last month’s fundraising got off to a very rocky start -- but with your
help, dollar by dollar, we turned things around.

And that’s how we’ll win this thing -- with the support of folks like
Frank in Cincinnati who chipped in $10, Lisa in Dublin who gave $25, and
John in Toledo who donated $100. We can’t do this without you and I’m so
grateful for your support.

But we can’t let up now. My opponents are millionaires with billionaire
backers, who think if they throw in enough money they can buy this seat.

Well, they’ve got another thing coming because our grassroots team is
ready to give them a run for their money.

I noticed you haven’t made a donation to our campaign yet,
folks. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6230?t=1007&akid=1619%2E3611125%2Eb4qd73 ]I really need your support to win this race, so will
you be like Frank, Lisa, or John and join our team by making a
contribution today?

Never bet against Ohio!

-- Tim

P.S. If you’ve made a contribution to our campaign, rest assured we have
it and I’m so thankful for your support. Sometimes it takes a while for
our records to update!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1619%2E3611125%2Eb4qd73 ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

We were reviewing responses to a critical we sent you earlier this month on whether there should be a investigation of Trump’s role on January 6th. | | | | | National Republicans are applying HEAVY PRESSURE to stop the January 6th Committee -- That’s why we reached out to get your opinion. Unfortunately, you’re one of the only top Democrats that didn’t respond. So, please, we need you to let us know whether you support a thorough investigation into Trump’s involvement in the insurrection: | | | Thank you, your input is critical. \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? **In revisiting his conversation with Doug, Kurtz noted:
---
_"Former state Attorney General Douglas F. Gansler highlighted his estimable environmental record as AG and touted his very lengthy plan to fight climate change. He talks far more extensively about land use and development than any of the other Democratic candidates."_ Doug knows it's impossible to successfully combat climate change without taking on reckless sprawl development and the resulting deforestation, carbon emissions, fossil fuel consumption, and destruction of our rivers and streams. Which is why Doug's detailed Green Maryland plan will make Maryland a national leader by suspending development within the Chesapeake Bay Critical Area, expanding Maryland's Program Open Space, creating new affordable housing markets in downtown areas, and so much more. Doug has the knowledge, experience, and dedication to make real improvements on climate change for the state of Maryland. Doug knows that climate change affects everything -- from our health, to the economy, to the very survival of future generations. **[Maryland needs a governor like Doug who will make protecting our environment a top priority. name: Team Morganize
subject: Last chance: Can we send you a sticker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We wanted to give you one more chance
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211202-432-footer-ak&t=2&akid=432%2E90090%2EWd2v38)
We saw an outpouring of support for our end-of-month fundraising push, and because they were so popular, **[we wanted to give you one last chance to get a free Morganize sticker if you donate any amount to the Morgan Harper campaign today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16554?t=3&akid=432%2E90090%2EWd2v38)**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16554?t=4&akid=432%2E90090%2EWd2v38)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16560?refcode=em20211202-432&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=432%2E90090%2EWd2v38)**
These stickers have been super popular at our organizing events, like when we held our volunteer kickoff _in a blizzard_ and folks _still_ came out to help Morganize their communities._
**We’re out here to Morganize our friends, our neighbors, our communities, and our whole state to prove that a better Ohio is possible if we come together.**
We’ll have a shot if we go door by door, block by block, community by community to prove to Ohio that Morgan is the progressive candidate who can flip this Senate seat blue.**[Your donation of any amount today makes that possible — that’s why we’ll send you a free sticker to say thanks _(and once these stickers are gone, they’re GONE)._](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16554?t=24&akid=432%2E90090%2EWd2v38)**
Thanks for being on our team!
Team Morganize

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211202-432-footer&t=25&refcode2=432_90090_Wd2v38&akid=432%2E90090%2EWd2v38)**

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Not many campaigns do this in their first weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We don’t take a single dollar for granted.
#
On this grassroots-funded campaign, we don’t take a single dollar for granted.
With less than a year until Election Day, we are putting all the resources we have into rallying support for Beto, reaching Texans where they live, and having as many face-to-face conversations as possible about our big, bold vision for Texas.
Right now we’re focused on building the biggest and best organizing program Texas has ever seen — but we simply can’t pull it off without a foundation of early, strong grassroots support.
[Can you make a contribution of $3 today? Every dollar made today will help us reach our goal of organizing in all 254 Texas counties.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50306?refcode=ema20211202-165158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=165158%2E444211%2Eq2RjId)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50306?refcode=ema20211202-165158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=165158%2E444211%2Eq2RjId)**
As soon as we launched, Beto and our campaign team hit the road. Already we’ve held events, listened and learned from folks, and rallied support in over 12 counties from El Paso to Nueces to Dallas.
Not many campaigns travel so far in their first weeks. Now, we're on the road again to hit another 19 counties over the next two weeks. You and your fellow supporters made it all possible — and you’re the ones who will decide whether we can keep this momentum going.
[Please, if you want Beto to win this race and get Texas back on track, will you consider chipping in $3 now to help us build organizing programs that reach Texans in all 254 counties?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50306?refcode=ema20211202-165158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=165158%2E444211%2Eq2RjId)
Together, we will register a historic number of new voters, defeat Greg Abbott, and elect a leader who listens to, learns from, and serves all the people of this state.
Keep fighting,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211202-165158-footer&t=22&refcode2=165158_444211_q2RjId&akid=165158%2E444211%2Eq2RjId)**

clean_body: We don’t take a single dollar for granted. On this grassroots-funded campaign, we don’t take a single dollar for granted. With less than a year until Election Day, we are putting all the resources we have into rallying support for Beto, reaching Texans where they live, and having as many face-to-face conversations as possible about our big, bold vision for Texas. Right now we’re focused on building the biggest and best organizing program Texas has ever seen — but we simply can’t pull it off without a foundation of early, strong grassroots support. As soon as we launched, Beto and our campaign team hit the road. Already we’ve held events, listened and learned from folks, and rallied support in over 12 counties from El Paso to Nueces to Dallas. Not many campaigns travel so far in their first weeks. Now, we're on the road again to hit another 19 counties over the next two weeks. You and your fellow supporters made it all possible — and you’re the ones who will decide whether we can keep this momentum going. Together, we will register a historic number of new voters, defeat Greg Abbott, and elect a leader who listens to, learns from, and serves all the people of this state. Keep fighting, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: We both recorded this video message for you, Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We just can’t express our gratitude to you often enough.
#
What's up, Derek — it's John and Gisele Fetterman!
We just wanted to reach out to say THANK YOU for making this a *true* grassroots-powered campaign. Thanks to the _thousands_ (and thousands 🤯) of working folks who generously chipped in online this November, we were able to hit our ambitious fundraising goal in the final few hours before our deadline this week.
None of it would have been possible without YOU, Derek.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37893?refcode=ema20211202-3688&t=1&akid=3688%2E434096%2Et701_J)
As you may have heard by now, **we're trying to call as many grassroots donors as we possibly can to personally say THANK YOU for supporting our campaign.** That's *a lot* of calls to make, but we believe it's time well spent — and we love to hear directly from folks like you. **[In the meantime, we wanted to record a special video message for you to express our deepest gratitude. You can use this link to check it out.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37893?refcode=ema20211202-3688&t=2&akid=3688%2E434096%2Et701_J)**
**[Watch the video →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37893?refcode=ema20211202-3688&t=3&akid=3688%2E434096%2Et701_J)**
Every ounce (and every goddamned penny) of support means the world to us, and we can’t express our gratitude to you often enough.
We're hoping that we’ll be able to thank you personally on the phone soon. 🥰 [**Until then, please take just a sec to check out this quick video message. Thank you!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37893?refcode=ema20211202-3688&t=4&akid=3688%2E434096%2Et701_J)
Yours always,
John + Gisele Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211202-3688-footer&t=5&refcode2=3688_434096_t701_J&akid=3688%2E434096%2Et701_J)**

clean_body: | | | | Now we’re all suffering Friend, Lisa Murkowski is UNBELIEVABLE! She cast the deciding vote to confirm an anti-energy cabinet secretary and then acted surprised at the terrible policies that secretary made, which were entirely predictable. It’s obvious Liberal Lisa Murkowski does not care at all for hardworking Alaskans! She’s allowing an attack on Alaska’s energy workers and, as Joe Biden’s Chief Enabling Officer, she’s eager to give him what he wants at our expense. We cannot let Radical Insiders and Extremist DC Politicians turn our state into a National Park playground for the rest of the country while we suffer! Murkowski has no idea about the needs of Alaska or the people. It’s time to retire Liberal Lisa and time to start putting Alaska First. Thanks, Kelly | | | | =

Donald J. Trump December 1st, 2021
Stacey “The Hoax” Abrams has just announced that she’s running for Governor of Georgia. I beat her single-handedly, without much of a candidate, in 2018. name: Ally For Utah
subject: Ally celebrates Utah’s diversity
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nGzHcBnXmRR4nAphEvhUL8xkQBuckS7f8OtUoPO9n2ciOk-jwrXav1EQ50BbCx3OroLwFvd51AIRXrjL3HygrlYAeyltZBcolHN60PD6ETQdV_lG3oqEkiK403Fn7obiL1oa5WsP5hQIETB_HnJxbA==&c=_Z5RBlVSmlgEp8j1FAnkgGHAY96Ve5i7hYf-ecZM5xDC6OSMZBLxDw==&ch=_Up1m6-fwDZ_BS2bWgek9kUrxrpFoQXXURjeuzq1eya31C5kUsI02w==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Hi there,
Ally Isom celebrated religious and ideological diversity this week. With a background in interfaith and intercultural work, Ally knows how to listen and embraces diverse perspectives and experiences. Here is the latest from the #AllyForUtah campaign.
---
|
---
|
---
| Happy Hanukkah!
Ally celebrated Hanukkah this week: "Happy Hanukkah to all of my friends who celebrate!" Ally wrote on[ social media](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nGzHcBnXmRR4nAphEvhUL8xkQBuckS7f8OtUoPO9n2ciOk-jwrXavxZnjWlNMDRmbLspfnr9CBSZ2Ew1StnjjFgvehTGP7RxC1I8ox3KlKMmNdHPQS7ZExOwnp9DK0M_WXYELAhXa93m7acYIn3GRM3kQd3RFAhtWOnpTzEYpTc=&c=_Z5RBlVSmlgEp8j1FAnkgGHAY96Ve5i7hYf-ecZM5xDC6OSMZBLxDw==&ch=_Up1m6-fwDZ_BS2bWgek9kUrxrpFoQXXURjeuzq1eya31C5kUsI02w==). "I find the holiday a great reminder that miracles happen and there is enormous benefit to us each using our light to serve others. Chag chanukah sameach!"
As the former director of family and community relations at The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Ally has worked on many interfaith and intercultural initiatives.
---
|
---
| Volunteers needed! Team Ally needs YOU right now! Volunteers are crucial at this stage in our campaign. We need to gather at least 28,000 signatures from registered Utah Republicans to get all on the June ballot. So...we need your help!! This Saturday, December 4, is our first volunteer training meeting. Click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nGzHcBnXmRR4nAphEvhUL8xkQBuckS7f8OtUoPO9n2ciOk-jwrXav24e6ZjrVvlU46Iw1WyNisvCQeKLz7mHUxVzFmQXcsn9mrQAcRpbmtaBZjHhKvyFxI1Nwpwvfn8YSkOpJ9tiDGFodzJWhpzw4u5CWoavyGs4K1p2Fwa9bDDyQxGDjwZUs9AUbjlHd3WlNBj9o79_EjTmVC9Ys7jQjC2dB5Vc-e1I9fMLindyF9knVOXukmlz3ZeSNDFG63RN&c=_Z5RBlVSmlgEp8j1FAnkgGHAY96Ve5i7hYf-ecZM5xDC6OSMZBLxDw==&ch=_Up1m6-fwDZ_BS2bWgek9kUrxrpFoQXXURjeuzq1eya31C5kUsI02w==) to sign up. There's no time to waste!
---
|
---
| Walk-A-Mile Tour update
On her walk-a-mile tour, Ally recently visited Probst Farm in Charleston, UT. "I met with business owner Kam Brown. His team makes amazing syrup! I will think of them every time I'm in Costco getting a Kodiak Cakes product," Ally [wrote on social media](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nGzHcBnXmRR4nAphEvhUL8xkQBuckS7f8OtUoPO9n2ciOk-jwrXavxZnjWlNMDRmHndm5eDBALdu4hgVORDoWKkRYkOFz_eJVr-Cpxd9OrFNoVsHMB1VIw6AXqkVvjEk-aaL11rTvTOMGp_yZgKPVw1FinrKrRdROk10WBNh5og=&c=_Z5RBlVSmlgEp8j1FAnkgGHAY96Ve5i7hYf-ecZM5xDC6OSMZBLxDw==&ch=_Up1m6-fwDZ_BS2bWgek9kUrxrpFoQXXURjeuzq1eya31C5kUsI02w==). "Kam and his father, Alan (a long-time community leader), shared the many changes they've seen in Heber Valley over the years. I appreciated their insight about both trust and independence from DC. Clearly, Washington's bureaucracy unnecessarily complicates something as classic as farm conservation."
For more information about Ally's walk-a-mile tour, or to see all the Utah communities Ally has visited so far, visit [allyforutah.com/walkamile/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nGzHcBnXmRR4nAphEvhUL8xkQBuckS7f8OtUoPO9n2ciOk-jwrXav6g0br4TeeKmQfg9QFuMxpTsQRXfH2rNDRWUy3oH_hb8NrQjaZBVK0NMUcE2JXZVWVw22WNRv-HETtz0Q7CBWPNalQeGPrgdTCJ1UIjQpps2&c=_Z5RBlVSmlgEp8j1FAnkgGHAY96Ve5i7hYf-ecZM5xDC6OSMZBLxDw==&ch=_Up1m6-fwDZ_BS2bWgek9kUrxrpFoQXXURjeuzq1eya31C5kUsI02w==).
---
| Thank you for being a part of #TeamAlly. Your support makes all the difference.
If you are interested in hosting Ally for a virtual cottage meeting in your home, or if you'd like to introduce Ally to your friends and neighbors, please email [info@AllyForUtah.com](mailto:info@AllyForUtah.com).

clean_body: #AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign | | | | | | | == | | | | | Hi there, Ally Isom celebrated religious and ideological diversity this week. With a background in interfaith and intercultural work, Ally knows how to listen and embraces diverse perspectives and experiences. Here is the latest from the #AllyForUtah campaign. | | | Happy Hanukkah! Ally celebrated Hanukkah this week: "Happy Hanukkah to all of my friends who celebrate!" Ally wrote on==. "I find the holiday a great reminder that miracles happen and there is enormous benefit to us each using our light to serve others. Chag chanukah sameach!" As the former director of family and community relations at The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Ally has worked on many interfaith and intercultural initiatives. | | Volunteers needed! Team Ally needs YOU right now! Volunteers are crucial at this stage in our campaign. We need to gather at least 28,000 signatures from registered Utah Republicans to get all on the June ballot. So...we need your help!! This Saturday, December 4, is our first volunteer training meeting. Click == to sign up. There's no time to waste! | | Walk-A-Mile Tour update On her walk-a-mile tour, Ally recently visited Probst Farm in Charleston, UT. "I met with business owner Kam Brown. His team makes amazing syrup! I will think of them every time I'm in Costco getting a Kodiak Cakes product," Ally ==. "Kam and his father, Alan (a long-time community leader), shared the many changes they've seen in Heber Valley over the years. I appreciated their insight about both trust and independence from DC. Clearly, Washington's bureaucracy unnecessarily complicates something as classic as farm conservation." For more information about Ally's walk-a-mile tour, or to see all the Utah communities Ally has visited so far, visit ==. | Thank you for being a part of #TeamAlly. Your support makes all the difference. If you are interested in hosting Ally for a virtual cottage meeting in your home, or if you'd like to introduce Ally to your friends and neighbors, please email mailto:info@AllyForUtah.com. | | | == | | | == | | | -Team Ally | == == == == | | | | | Ally For Utah | 3350 S. 2940 E. #9032, SLC, UT 84109 | | Sent by mailto:info@allyforutah.com powered by

clean_body: | | | | Support our grassroots effort to stop radical Democrats Peter, With each passing day, the failed Biden Presidency continues to fall in support, making it clear that the radical Democrat agenda has undeniably abandoned Americans. The Biden economy’s rising costs and shortages are taking away our ability to prosper and celebrate the holidays that we hold dear to our hearts. If this agenda continues unchallenged, we won’t just have Christmas ruined this year, we’ll have every holiday and celebration swept from under our feet until our government can get its act together. As we’re entering the holiday season, I ask that you please make a donation to this campaign that is advocating for our government to use common sense policies instead of starting crisis after crisis. | | | | | | With our Conservative movement gaining support from everyday Americans like yourself, we will give the boot to out-of-touch politicians for good! body:
The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Ou Peter, The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Our friends and neighbors around the state are fired up about bringing REAL change to New Mexico by firing Governor Lujan Grisham. New Mexicans need _practical_ relief from out-of-control taxes, inflation, and a devastating border crisis. We need **true** leadership in these divisive times. clean_body: The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Ou Peter, The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Our friends and neighbors around the state are fired up about bringing REAL change to New Mexico by firing Governor Lujan Grisham. New Mexicans need practical relief from out-of-control taxes, inflation, and a devastating border crisis. We need true leadership in these divisive times. Peter, because I know you’re a strong conservative I wanted to personally invite you to a special group of supporters that I’m calling our Founding Members. The Founding Members status is designated only to those who I know I can count on and depend on when this race gets tough... It’s also for those who I know are committed to seeing New Mexico elect a conservative Governor to turn our state around. But here’s the catch, Peter: There are only 150 open slots to join the Founding Members team and I would encourage you that if you want to join, now is the time to do so... BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER Email: Founding Member Status: MISSING Once you officially join the team, I’ll be relying on hearing from you directly about what’s happening on the ground, I’ll be reaching out to share exclusive updates, and more... and I’m confident we will be able to win this race with your continued help and support. Mark Ronchetti, Candidate for New Mexico Governor | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. body:
they STILL think they’re winning...

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=29676a712682402abe4f162415815457&_e=l29BAhox43M8Fvum9lO6HLwNCD6iV5ZTRwjD4FruWg96iXmgUb2i4nb3721NG_zYfwFbd0DieYEw8E_INsAUnbvPk94c3EcgBCJ6gDnJxkYAn9hXyUqeCoCYBPv0AJMgxJKWPubBxPQamME9izKCnd_32yv-c_g6Mwi0agMdyOztQMr8-zApye-L9yVBQjMTBywjqDrlnOoLgwht-BuGdpR0RA0IY4lAKchv5Nne7pwHUXj_v3Z-jeA_wvzdzQ3P_hRrJDF6tknoPnumOmOKItPS6-iZxYmqlLsf6h9Za0JU784QMI9qWMIL4sEQ9aNo4Zf5oQi8buYIav6OFanFeZ-VoPEhCeCdffityBvkt8aH6oi3245RBa1sHpYbL4XmLRmYMuGSDQlijtVL-55SvtDKzAlhM2q6Df9U1ajFDq8fjutNW1Ohl8SrhruuOTwiVpUSy63GmakrOSpcMfYJtZ3Vfudr33s8x1_6erFZHgk%3D)
---
Friends,

It’s crunch time.

_I don’t know about you, but we need to put America’s radicals in their place._

That all starts with taking back the Senate.

**And I don’t think I’ll ever be able to put into words how important this is:_we absolutely MUST win back the Senate Majority._ **

subject: Cuomo out at CNN, holiday gift deal
body:
and more... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/80f9a3a049ea/cuomo-out-at-cnn-holiday-gift-deal?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
|
---
## What Chris Cuomo ‘Did More than Anything Is Lie to His Viewers’ ...
On Tuesday Chris Cuomo was “indefinitely suspended” at CNN amid controversy over his involvement in advising brother Governor Andrew Cuomo through sexual harassment claims. If you want to hear more on my thoughts on this check out this conversation I had with Alex Marlow of Breitbart:
| [Listen here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7f82792dec&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
## ICYMI: Sat down with the Schlapps for “CPAC: Thanksgiving Uncanceled,” check it out:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d316d7b870&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
|
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[After VA Elections, Democrats Heard the Message. They Just Don’t Care.](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1b9d124c97&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Townhall.com Okay technically I'm not reading this one because I wrote it, but you should read it. ______________[Donations to the Clinton Foundation plummeted to $16 million last year, down nearly 75% from the organization’s peak when former Secretary of State Hillary Rodham Clinton was running for president](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=38727ec0a7&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Axios Could have seen this coming, no power = lower donations. ______________[2022 will bring accountability to CT](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=eddcd9be3f&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via CT Post______________[Roe v Wade: Unscientific and outdated](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c6393ba816&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Charlotte Lozier InstituteJustice Kagan: "Not much has changed since Roe and Casey." Actually, there have been huge advancements in science and medicine, which CLI's Dr. David Prentice discussed in this recent article.______________[Symone Sanders to leave the VP’s office](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c285eafff7&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Politico Another one quits... ______________[Alec Baldwin exclusive: 'The trigger wasn't pulled. I didn't pull the trigger'](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8b4955b966&e=f6564bbe3b) — via ABC NewsAlec Baldwin said he couldn't discuss shooting the of Halyna Hutchins but now he is sitting down with ABC and claiming he never pulled the trigger.
|
---
|
---
Last week I asked when it was appropriate to decorate for Christmas, most of you agreed with me that its AFTER Thanksgiving. This week I want to know:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fcb1291ee8&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c06bd02863&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## Don’t miss your chance to get signed copies of all of my books...
Get the perfect gift for the political junkie in your life in time for the holidays if you order this week. If you’re looking to get Radical Nation as a gift, order on Amazon, send a screenshot of your order to Contact@SeanSpicer.com and I will send you a customized book plate to put in it. |
---
[Get yours here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9daa093062&e=f6564bbe3b)

subject: We need to take a stand against late-term abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
Do you want to take a stand against the left’s radical pro-abortion agenda? | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5111ceef3b39454fbcb5bee3b4bd11a2&_e=rM-oGPMmr7KObuUjXhe8ZRlbIHEp_PP1CuPPMulBvcA0d5l2dTSUv1JXSttzT_KezaItnG9MXW-TB5ERtewbFincF2pRXRwyrvmA8WxHuV--wtShoRZB6x_hh70Thr0kIv93DhoxxOc9prwzBEnaWPf7TnFoIBU1eoMs922yWM6lrPWZEPZPU75Jn3wNP7v9Nhn1osLm76HIopJREFuWeuhWokL-nCn1UYlXOIJK6RDGriDeTtOXu6ZBdVgflProaZOCwzp4Zi56-4y9DCweyi7GMA_8H_AiAZaYsVJjwgLVjvpYHS6jqHnLuPSB34Bk59emAGspGLcW4ad-ooYgyEmF8VF_1WTx-xpTdL13HfYoWSetRymh8EFSEczwbuyqkG06BsV4UUPQcB2B8D9cUxmrGx6UGLgclh09xbCgKkLiRfYx46-xlXV0HigkmWdIVLT1COIOBekCjEbO5K3z8CBdWWd1KKlCfjXEjG6Q8ErNMy5K1t-kPFeynlyQJkwq37qblox0_lKrCeduRcc2Xyv5Tnl0lvQonxi10DeBxvQJODpw0_39jAiArvAPhgx-2swtUtBYgHfC4ic391h9Ih9cR-y553kuajwU7bZlr2s%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**Do you support the inherent right to life?**

I know I do.

Radicals, like my Democratic opponent, have voted in lockstep with Bernie Sanders and Chuck Schumer to further their pro-abortion agenda. **That includes heinous acts like late-term abortions, which no one in their right mind could defend.**

I need you to join my team to help conservatives take back the Senate and stop the radical pro-abortion agenda.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: End the filibuster and pass the Women’s Health Protection Act — so we can codify Roe v. Wade into law once and for all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is personal for me and millions of people across the country.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case concerning Mississippi’s dangerous abortion ban. This cruel law represents the biggest threat to _Roe v. Wade_ in nearly 50 years.
This is personal for me and millions of people across America. I’m not only a Congresswoman, the chair of the Progressive Caucus, and a dedicated member of the Pro-Choice Caucus. I’m not only an organizer who knows that reproductive rights are human rights. **I’m also one of the one in four women in America who has had an abortion.**
Inaction is not an option right now. We must fight back. That begins by ending the filibuster and passing the Women’s Health Protection Act through the Senate — _so we can codify Roe v. Wade into law once and for all._ [**Can you chip in $3 to fuel my fight to end the filibuster and protect reproductive freedom nationwide?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8988?refcode=em20211202-848&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=848%2E420207%2EH-AAB4)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8988?refcode=em20211202-848&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=848%2E420207%2EH-AAB4)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8988?refcode=em20211202-848&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=848%2E420207%2EH-AAB4)**
For me, terminating my pregnancy was not an easy choice — but it was MY choice. Because of the cruel Mississippi abortion ban and the other abortion bans currently being litigated, many people may not have the same choice as I did.
Peter, it is nobody’s business what choices we as pregnant people make about our own bodies. This is a constitutionally protected, intensely personal choice about control of our own bodies. And the consequences of that choice are ones that only WE will have to live with.
We must organize for reproductive justice as we protest against these cruel bans in Mississippi, Texas, and too many other states. That’s why I was so proud to help pass the Women’s Health Protection Act through the House earlier this year so we can combat these attacks. **Now, it’s time to END the filibuster and pass this critical legislation through the Senate. It truly can’t wait.**
[**Chip in $3 or anything you can to support my work to end the filibuster and prorect abortion rights across the country. Time is running out to stop these cruel bans.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8988?refcode=em20211202-848&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=848%2E420207%2EH-AAB4)
Thank you for joining me, Peter. It really makes a difference.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211202-848-footer&t=5&refcode2=848_420207_H-AAB4&akid=848%2E420207%2EH-AAB4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=848%2E420207%2EH-AAB4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=848%2E420207%2EH-AAB4)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:

Marcy Kaptur | |

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux1aTkEyHheqLNZ8YKSzpWvRLw0QaN5GFCQtOudOwAq3JHuRQkmCn37FpIJ8lb7G6C24X1iqVAnBnCjIOIaCgzcvCn0Mtyi-Feip8RbUSei2CD62f9ikiD-mSTQMfCeArdIyIQeatk8f334FT2WiynZygMXvGDX72x7f_DE1OOE4W-I35jTHR32fvo-vb75lz88pvGC2J6TE3geO8-kyw8gKKvXz5OdG0fl9bDNcNo6XJ_e4yqoMrdKtOXcyDGRXG2Iq6p6pN_9UrRRtfQBjXj8cDAP3t0sR7uecqP6g_Awox3VsSQUcWmF-0qrxJnWlrlojjXdSJLhtxVfTie7dENXnBk3tbWUm9g7z8hNU-SnlqwvVqnnhIVKg6cGafKTr3QRV7g1y_PMYTIrrQbi0D8Q8/3hi/pfKZa2P8Sjugrv8au5is0Q/h0/Slg0l0YWSYTNEj8GGz0kWcWuAna5gBciWQpSNb6Amzs)

| | Team -- it's a **new low** for extreme gerrymandering in the new congressional maps proposed by Ohio’s “one party rule” Republicans.

We were right to fear the worst; **the new maps brutally target Marcy Kaptur,** putting her district at extreme risk of flipping red and eliminating everything we’ve worked so hard for.
**
** **The GOP is not interested in being fair _nor_ giving the people of Ohio proper representation. **

Instead, they have shown us that **they are ready to disregard the overwhelming majority of Ohio voters who want fair districts** and violate both the spirit and letter of the constitutional reform in order to further tip the scale their way.

We were right to fear the worst; the new maps brutally target Marcy Kaptur, putting her district at extreme risk of flipping red and eliminating everything we’ve worked so hard for. The GOP is not interested in being fair nor giving the people of Ohio proper representation. Instead, they have shown us that they are ready to disregard the overwhelming majority of Ohio voters who want fair districts and violate both the spirit and letter of the constitutional reform in order to further tip the scale their way. Ohio's Republican governor, Mike DeWine, signed these maps into law. Marcy's going to have to fight back against Ohio Republicans at the ballot box. [We can’t let them get away with this.
